title: Nehal Mota champions a holistic approach to financial fitness through Finnovate
description: As conversations around personal finance increasingly move beyond investments and returns, a growing number of financial professionals are advocating for a more comprehensive approach to managing money. Among them is Nehal Mota, Co-Founder of Finnovate, who has spent nearly two decades promoting financial fitness as a long-term discipline rather than a short-term pursuit of wealth creation.Founded in 2007 by Nehal Mota and Naveen Singh, Finnovate was established with the objective of helping individuals and families make informed financial decisions through structured planning. Over the years, the firm has worked with thousands of families across India, focusing on goal-based financial strategies designed to align with different life stages and aspirations.Mota's approach stems from the belief that financial well-being cannot be measured solely through investment performance. Instead, she advocates a broader framework that encompasses multiple aspects of personal finance, including cash flow management, risk protection, wealth creation, retirement preparedness, estate planning, and financial goal setting.This philosophy led to the development of a financial fitness model that seeks to bring clarity and discipline to the way people manage their finances. Rather than emphasizing products, the model focuses on creating long-term financial habits and decision-making frameworks that can help individuals navigate changing economic circumstances.Under Mota's leadership, Finnovate adopted a hybrid advisory structure that combines technology with human expertise. The model aims to provide personalized financial guidance that is structured and purposeful, while maintaining transparency and consistency throughout the planning process.According to Mota, financial planning should remain unbiased and aligned with the interests of clients. “My main objective with Finnovate was to build a fiduciary advisory model that remains unbiased, product-agnostic, and deeply personalized. We believe financial planning should empower families to make confident decisions and unlock their true financial potential,” she said.As financial literacy continues to gain prominence across India, Mota remains focused on encouraging individuals to view financial planning as an ongoing journey rather than a one-time activity. Her work reflects a growing shift within the industry toward holistic financial wellness, where long-term security and life goals take precedence over short-term market outcomes.The pages slugged ‘Brand Connect’ are equivalent to advertisements and are not written and produced by Forbes India journalists.

title: The next-generation leaders reshaping business
description: New Delhi [India], June 22: A new wave of entrepreneurs, founders, and executives is transforming industries through innovation, strategic vision, and bold leadership. These next-generation leaders are not only driving business growth but also creating meaningful impact by challenging conventions and embracing change. In this special feature, we spotlight emerging changemakers whose ideas, resilience, and forward-thinking approach are shaping the future of business and inspiring the next era of leadership.Richa Gangani, Founder, Richa’s Fitness LabRicha Gangani, Founder of Richa’s Fitness Lab, is dedicated to helping individuals build healthier lives through practical, personalized wellness solutions. Her approach is rooted in the belief that sustainable health comes from understanding each person’s unique lifestyle, habits, and nutritional needs rather than following one-size-fits-all trends. Through her work, she empowers clients to adopt realistic routines that fit seamlessly into their daily lives, making long-term consistency achievable. Richa advocates a balanced approach to fitness and nutrition, focusing on lasting well-being over quick fixes. By simplifying health and encouraging mindful lifestyle choices, she continues to inspire individuals to achieve meaningful and sustainable transformations.Mr. Chakravarthi Mittapalli, Vice Chairman, Narasaraopeta Engineering CollegeFor over two decades, Narasaraopeta Engineering College (NEC) has shaped technical education in Andhra Pradesh through academic excellence, industry collaboration, innovation and career-focused learning. With a 48-acre campus, autonomous status, NAAC A+ accreditation and NIRF 201-300 ranking band, NEC is advancing AI-led engineering education under Vice Chairman Chakravarthi Mittapalli, a technologist, entrepreneur and education visionary. The institution’s AI & Robotics Centres of Innovation, industry skilling programmes, incubation initiatives, Intel-backed AI Lab, certified training, internships, research exposure, next-generation tools and Microsoft AI Odyssey recognition reflect its focus on building a future-ready youth.Mr. Tejas Chavan, Director, Green SpacesMr. Tejas Chavan is the Director of Green Spaces and a purpose-driven entrepreneur committed to advancing sustainable living and eco-conscious hospitality. Under his leadership, Grape County Eco Resort & Spa has emerged as one of Maharashtra’s leading eco-tourism destinations, guided by the philosophy of “Co-Exist with Nature.” He has spearheaded transformative initiatives including the plantation of over 60,000 native trees, creation of five rainwater-harvested lakes, 100% water recycling systems, and biodiversity restoration projects. A passionate advocate for sustainable development, regenerative farming, rural empowerment, and responsible tourism, Mr. Chavan continues to demonstrate how environmental conservation and economic growth can work together to create lasting value for communities and future generations.Rituu Jai Mehhta is Director – Marketing (South) & Centre Director, Phoenix Mall of AsiaRituu Jai Mehhta is Director – Marketing (South) & Centre Director, Phoenix Mall of Asia , where she leads marketing and destination strategy across more than five million square feet of premium retail developments in Bengaluru, Chennai, and Pune. With over two decades of experience in retail, marketing, and consumer engagement, she has been instrumental in advancing experiential retail by integrating fashion, entertainment, beauty, gastronomy, and community-led experiences into destination ecosystems. Recognized for combining strategic business leadership with innovative marketing, Rituu has received multiple industry honours, including The Times of India's Woman Power Award as well as Karnataka Woman Entrepreneurship Award among others for her contributions to retail and destination marketing.Mr. Karteesh Reddy Madgula, Mr. Lakshmi Narayana G., and Mr. Sharat Ventrapragada, Designated Partners of GHR Lakshmi Urbanblocks Infra LLPDeveloped by Mr. Karteesh Reddy Madgula, Mr. Lakshmi Narayana G., and Mr. Sharat Ventrapragada (Partners of GHR Lakshmi Urbanblocks Infra LLP), The Cascades Neopolis is a landmark ultra-luxury residential project in Kokapet, Hyderabad. Spanning 7.34 acres, the development features five 63-storey towers housing 1,189 residences and 10 triplex penthouses.As India’s first and the world’s largest WELL pre-certified residential project, this international collaboration prioritizes wellness-led, future-ready living. The joint venture solidified its regional realty leadership by securing Neopolis Plot 15, a premium 4.03-acre corner land parcel boasting dual 150-foot road frontages, with a record-setting highest bid of ₹151.25 crore per acre, ensuring immense long-term value.Mr. Rishi Bharadwaj, CEO and Mr. Krishna Pradyumna, CTO of CultNerdsIT SolutionsCultNerds, Co-founded by Mr. Rishi Bharadwaj, CEO and Mr. Krishna Pradyumna, CTO in 2021 and headquartered in Hyderabad, CultNerds IT Solutions is an award-winning digital transformation agency serving 50+ clients across real estate, hospitality, luxury clubs, retail and education. With 65+ professionals, the company blends technology, marketing, data and AI to improve customer acquisition, engagement and business performance. Its in-house products support data analytics, enrichment, customer nurturing, automation and intelligent workflows. Rishi drives a framework-led culture focused on creativity, accountability and outcomes, while Krishna leads technical innovation and scalable product development for thousands of users.Jimmy Mistry, Founder & Chairman, Della TownshipsDesign Futurist, Jimmy Mistry founded Della Townships, one of India’s fastest-growing asset-light real estate integrated township platforms, to redefine how India lives, works, and dreams through design-led, future-ready, theme-based lifestyle cities. From a 30-key glamping resort in Lonavala to a ₹46,480 crore township pipeline spanning 4,288 acres across India, Jimmy Mistry believes "We become the new Uber or the new Airbnb of the real estate industry. We are an asset-light real estate model." Removing the two biggest barriers to real estate expansion, Della's asset-light model eliminates the need for land ownership and direct regulatory approvals. Instead, the company partners with landowners and developers, focusing on what it does best—conceptualisation, design, development, marketing, and operations through its proprietary CDDMO model.Piyush Jhunjhunwala, Founder & CEO, StockifyPiyush Jhunjhunwala is a seasoned finance professional, Chartered Accountant (India), and Certified Public Accountant (USA) with over 20 years of experience across global markets. Before founding Stockify, he held senior leadership roles at PepsiCo, Reckitt, and Coty, building expertise in finance, strategy, governance, and business operations across India and international markets. As Founder and CEO, Piyush has led Stockify’s mission to democratize access to India’s pre-IPO and unlisted shares market. Under his leadership, the company has expanded into alternative investments with the launch of its Alternative Investment Fund (AIF), evolving into a comprehensive WealthTech platform. He is now focused on broadening investor access to global private market opportunities, including U.S. private equity investments, helping drive long-term wealth creation and portfolio diversification.Dr. Eadhu Krishna K, Managing Director & Chief Consultant, SKCCR Care, Ernakulam, Kerala.Dr. Eadhu Krishna K is a healthcare entrepreneur and the Managing Director & Chief Consultant of SKCCR Care – Ernakulam, Kerala. Building on the institution’s 46-year legacy, he began training under his father at 18 and has since accumulated over 14 years of clinical research and experience in integrative cancer care. He has treated thousands of patients through evidence-based homoeopathic protocols and was honored with the Leading Innovator in Homoeopathic Cancer Care award by the Health Minister of Kerala. At 25, he founded Dr.BOZ Pharma, a company developing plant-based nutraceuticals and homoeopathic formulations for chronic lifestyle diseases, combining clinical expertise with pharmaceutical innovation.Jesicaa Siingh, Founder & CEO, Stanley CommunicationsJesicaa Siingh is the Founder & CEO of Stanley Communications, a global PR agency specializing in luxury, fashion, beauty, hospitality, and culture. As an entrepreneur, she has built a 135+ member women-led team while expanding the agency’s presence to Dubai. Driven by a passion for storytelling and brand building, she has helped shape the India narratives of global brands including Valentino, Bvlgari, Messika, Amiri, Dyson, Versace, SK-II, and Galeries Lafayette.A champion of women in leadership, Jesicaa has built a culture of creativity and accountability, earning recognitions including Times 40 Under 40 and TV9 Network SHE Star Honours.Together, these next-generation leaders represent the evolving face of business—bold, innovative, and impact-driven. Through their vision, adaptability, and determination, they are not only transforming their respective industries but also setting the benchmark for the future of leadership and enterprise.The pages slugged ‘Brand Connect’ are equivalent to advertisements and are not written and produced by Forbes India journalists.

title: MBA faces crisis in AI era, demands urgent rethink from business schools
description: For a degree that teaches disruption, it is quite remarkable how little the traditional MBA model has changed in the 118 years since its inception at Harvard. In fact, one could argue that the MBA has done a remarkable job of avoiding disruption. Over these years, there have probably been only five major innovations—the introduction of the case method at Harvard in 1924, the launch of the executive MBA at Chicago Booth in 1943, the advent of the quantitative MBA in the 1950s, the birth of the one-year MBA at INSEAD in 1959, and the launch of the stackable online MBA in the 2010s.Apart from these, the MBA has remained remarkably resilient, seemingly immune to changes in the world around it. It has endured the dot-com bust, the global meltdown in 2008, and the global pandemic. At various points, commentators have sounded the death knell for the MBA, convinced that it is losing its sheen and value. Yet, it continues with a product that supporters argue has stood the test of time, while detractors dismiss it as being out of touch with reality.Today, we are once again at a crossroads as we confront AI and its impact on jobs. If I were to pose the question in the title of this essay to an MBA class, I would expect about 20% to say “Yes”, about 30% to say “No”, and 50% to sit on the fence with a typical “It depends” or “Maybe”. This essay is aimed at these “Maybes”. I argue that over the last 100-plus years, the MBA has survived change but has barely evolved. The time is ripe for a radical rethink.In India, the IIMs were founded in the 1960s, driven by the urge to create world-class management institutions. IIM Ahmedabad partnered with Harvard, and IIM Calcutta with MIT Sloan. The aim was to move away from the rigidities of the traditional university system and enable these institutions to pursue high-quality research and pedagogy.Sixty-plus years later, one could argue that while we have got the pedagogy right, we continue to lag behind global b-schools in creating new knowledge. This may have been acceptable when changes in the global environment were slow or predictable. That is no longer the case. AI has transformed the career landscape, accelerating the emergence of non-linear pathways.Also Read: Why MBA education in the age of AI must move beyond analysis for leadershipDisruptions abound—driven by entrepreneurs who challenge the status quo, question traditional business models, and take on well-established incumbents. India is at the forefront of these disruptions. Shouldn’t we be driving more research in this area? Shouldn’t we be creating new knowledge and disseminating it in the classroom? In fact, shouldn’t we be practicing what we teach and disrupting the way MBAs are designed and structured?Instead, the system has spawned innumerable PGDM and MBA programmes, most of them virtually identical except for placement outcomes, campus infrastructure, and brand name. We are becoming victims of the very rigidity we once sought to escape.To be sure, there is innovation at the margins. Most b-schools today include AI and analytics as core components of their curriculum. Courses on e-commerce, digital marketing, and data science are widely offered to ensure that graduates are tech-literate. Several institutions are also experimenting with pedagogical approaches such as simulations, flipped classrooms, and role-plays.Yet, the core architecture remains largely unchanged. There have been few attempts to challenge the traditional two-year format aimed at students with limited work experience. Even fewer have questioned the functional silos in which students specialise—finance, marketing, operations, OB/HR, and others. Governed by regulations and rankings, incentives are aligned towards consistency and incremental change.This creates a widening gap between what recruiters need from fresh graduates and what institutions are able to deliver.Also Read: AI readiness in Indian business schools beyond the signallingAs institutions around the world grapple with a commoditised offering, value-conscious students, and increasingly sceptical recruiters, there is a clear need for a more agile MBA—one that not only adapts to changing market needs but anticipates them. Institutions must adopt a growth mindset: challenging long-held assumptions, listening closely to recruiters and students, experimenting even at the risk of failure, and executing at a far greater pace and scale. AI presents an opportunity to make this shift.The widespread adoption of AI across organisations will require graduates who are skilled in using these tools. However, the ability to simply use AI is unlikely to create significant value. A study in the US by neuroscientist and entrepreneur Vivienne Ming found that students performed poorly on long-term prediction tasks without AI, with any LLM outperforming them.More strikingly, when students were allowed to use an LLM, over 90% simply copied responses, performing no better than the tool itself. However, about 10% demonstrated superior outcomes by thinking critically and engaging with the output.It is this ability—to think, reason, and solve ill-defined problems—that will endure. The market is ready for an agile MBA that challenges the status quo and builds career-ready skills for a future that will be increasingly shaped by AI.

title: Companies powering India’s Aatmanirbhar Bharat vision
description: Samarth Elder-care Asheesh Gupta , FounderSamarth Elder Care: Making India’s Elders AatmanirbharSamarth is India’s most trusted, professionally managed elder care organisation serving 40,000 members in 350+ cities. Founded in 2016 by alumni of IIT, IIM, Cambridge, Yale, and McKinsey, it is a Social Alpha investee.For families in India and across 33+ different countries, Samarth bridges the distance, delivering accountable care to ageing parents back home. It is also the preferred parent-care partner for employees and customers, in many progressive organisations, including leading banks, insurers and multinationals.Beyond Samarth’s Eldercare Plans, they also activate older adults as mentors, advisors, and neighbourhood anchors, through their Community Leaders Programme and Multi-Activity Centres.“Sixty or seventy years of judgment, patience, and relationships. Every senior is like a library that has not yet been discovered,” says founder Asheesh Gupta. Samarth’s alignment with Aatmanirbhar Bharat runs deep, and they are reframing India’s elder population as a national asset.AGNOSHIN Gomathi Perumal ( VP) & Team AgnoShinAgnoShin: Future-Ready CXM Solutions Rooted in Innovation, Responsibility, and Recognition.In an era of rapid digital change, AgnoShin stands out as a technology-agnostic leader in Customer Experience Management (CXM). Its platform, protocol, and device-independent solutions help organizations navigate shifting landscapes with confidence—safeguarding tech investments while enabling seamless adoption of new innovations.Customer-centricity drives everything AgnoShin does. The company’s professional services team designs solutions that enhance engagement, improve efficiency, and strengthen relationships across the customer journey turning routine interactions into memorable experiences that build trust, loyalty, and sustainable growth.AgnoShin serves clients across North America, Europe, Asia-Pacific, and the Middle East and Africa. Its flagship products include AI-driven CX analytics, omnichannel engagement platforms, and protocol-agnostic integration tools that unify legacy and modern systems.Through CSR initiatives focused on digital literacy, community development, and environmental sustainability, AgnoShin proves that great customer experiences start with a responsible purpose. This commitment has earned multiple industry awards for innovation and operational excellence in CXM.Gomathi Perumal, Head of Business Operations, plays a pivotal role in driving operational excellence and the successful delivery of innovative CXM solutions across industries.Nextel Meta Private Limited Mikkilineni Srikanth, CEONextel Meta CEO to Publish CBN @ 361-Degrees (The Polymath) Free in Multiple Languages.Mikkilineni Srikanth, CEO of Nextel Meta Private Limited and Managing Director of Repati Kosam, has announced that CBN @ 361-Degrees (The Polymath) will be published and distributed free of cost in multiple languages. The English edition was launched and distributed free in Singapore on 16 June, while Telugu and other language editions are planned for free global distribution.Ahead of the 2024 General Elections, Srikanth released Chandrababu X.O.: The Infinite Ideologue in Telugu, English, Hindi, German and French, also free of cost. The book set three world records and received national and international attention.Founded in 2016, Hyderabad-based Nextel Meta Private Limited Developed E-Sign Meta Education, India’s first e-learning platform for hearing-impaired students, and operates educational platforms including Pathashala.com and Kalashala.com, alongside digital-commerce ventures such as ShriMall.com, Abharanam.com and vastram.com.D2S Technologies Devrishi Arora, Founder & CEOD2S Technologies: Fusing Technology, Creativity & Innovation for Digital Solutions!At D2S Technlogies, we help businesses connect with their target groups and build a strong online presence by putting emphasis on new ideas and measurable growth. Our skilled professionals create personalized solutions that help businesses become more visible, work more efficiently, and connect with their customers.With over a decade of experience serving organizations ranging from emerging SMEs to Fortune-listed enterprises, we have gained deep insights into the evolving digital landscape and the challenges businesses face at every stage of growth.We enable businesses to scale faster through digital solutions & AI Driven strategies that drive efficiency, innovation, and sustainable growth. D2S is fortunate to work with companies that are helping India become a globally competitive and self-sufficient economy.Driven by a vision to empower Indian enterprises, Devrishi Arora Founder of D2S, has successfully partnered with startups, SMEs, and large corporations, enabling them to build strong digital foundation in an increasingly competitive marketplace.SBOOCH  Kajall Manek (COO) & Nirraj Manek (CEO)Inside the Indian Startup Rewriting the Global Beverage PlaybookThe Indian brand that won two world awards before most people have heard of it: The SBOOCH Story.In less than a year, a new force is disrupting and reshaping India's beverage landscape. SBOOCH is emerging as the nation’s fastest-growing kombucha. category leader. Brewing a new culture of clean, functional beverages, the brand stands apart with its unique flavor profiles crafted from 100% real ingredients, infusing Indian culture in every bottle with *ZERO adulteration* (NO BS of nature-based colors or flavors).This commitment to purity recently propelled the brand onto the global stage, clinching two prestigious World Awards and putting Indian innovation on the international map.Behind this meteoric rise are co-founders Nirraj Satish Manek and Kajall N. Manek. Fusing their expertise in F&B and hospitality with a powerhouse 30+ year combined corporate and professional pedigree, the duo has successfully turned a shared lifestyle vision into a potential leader in a budding and fast-growing category, growing at upwards of 17% CAGR.Sboochers are pouncing on the premium, non-alcoholic, gut-friendly brew, as the market has taken notice, and SBOOCH is flying off the shelves across all major E/Qcom platforms and modern trade stores.The brand’s growth is fueled by an elite roster of partners and advisors, including top-tier CXOs from *Aditya Birla, Morgan Stanley, and KPMG, alongside legendary actor and investor **Mr. Suniel Shetty*. Together, they aren't just selling a drink—they are pioneering a clean beverage revolution.Nilkanth Engineering works Hardik H Solanki , Director- Sales & MarketingEstablished in 1982, Nilkanth Engineering Works is one of India's leading manufacturers of Concrete Batching Plants and AluminiumFormworkSystems, backed by over 43 years of engineering excellence, innovation, and customer trust. With a strong presence across India and international markets, Nilkanth has earned a reputation for delivering reliable, high-performance, and technologically advanced concrete batching solutions for infrastructure, industrial, commercial, and renewable energy projects.Our range of Concrete Batching Plants is designed to provide superior productivity, accuracy, durability, and consistent concrete quality, ensuring maximum efficiency at every project site. From compact/mobile plants to high-capacity stationary Concrete Batching Plant installations, Nilkanth solutions are trusted by contractors, developers, and infrastructure companies worldwide.Today, Nilkanth is widely recognized as a preferred and leading partner for wind farm and solar power projects, having supplied equipment for numerous renewable energy developments across the region. Driven by a commitment to quality, innovation, and customer satisfaction, Nilkanth Engineering Works continues to build the foundation for tomorrow's infrastructure while strengthening its legacy of excellence since 1982.MarsDevs Vishvajit Pathak , Founder & CEOFounded in 2019 by Vishvajit Pathak, MarsDevs is a global product engineering company that partners with startups, scale-ups, and enterprises to build, modernize, and scale digital products. Headquartered in Pune, India, we serve clients across 10+ countries and 12 industry verticals, delivering AI solutions, web and mobile applications, cloud platforms, enterprise software, and digital transformation initiatives.Our cross-functional engineering pods combine product strategy, design, software engineering, QA, DevOps, and AI expertise to accelerate delivery while maintaining enterprise-grade quality, security, and scalability. Whether acting as a technical co-founder for an early-stage startup or an engineering partner for an established enterprise, we focus on solving complex business challenges through practical technology.At MarsDevs, we believe innovation is driven by execution. By combining deep technical expertise with a partnership-first approach, we help organizations reduce time-to-market, adopt AI with confidence, modernize legacy systems, and build software that creates measurable business value.Gogreen Warehouses Pvt. Ltd Santosh Kumar Sahu , Cofounder & CEOGogreen Warehouses Pvt. Ltd. is one of India's fastest-growing agri-warehousing and collateral management companies, contributing significantly to the vision of Aatmanirbhar Bharat by strengthening post-harvest infrastructure and improving farmers' access to finance. Operating across 700+ locations in 25 states, Gogreen manages agricultural commodities valued at over ₹10,000 crore, working with 42+ banks, 4,000+ clients, 500+ Farmer Producer Organizations (FPOs), and supporting more than 5 lakh farmers across the country.The company's remarkable growth has been led by Mr. Maulik Shah and Mr. Santosh Kumar Sahu, whose combined expertise in agriculture, warehousing, logistics, and commodity value chains has helped build a trusted national platform. Under their leadership, Gogreen has developed a network handling 200+ commodities and created employment opportunities for 1,600+ professionals. Through scientific warehousing, collateral management, NABL-accredited testing services, and technology-driven operations, Gogreen is enhancing agricultural efficiency, reducing post-harvest losses, and empowering India's farming community while advancing the nation's food security and self-reliance objectives.Billabong High International School Priti Agarwal, Founder & CEOPriti Agarwal is an education entrepreneur and transformational school leader with over two decades of experience in shaping innovative learning environments. As Founder and CEO of Billabong High International School and Kangaroo Kids Kanpur, she has championed a child-first approach that combines academic excellence with creativity, character development, and future readiness.A graduate of Lady Shri Ram College for Women with a degree in Political Science (Hons.) and a qualified solicitor, Priti brings a distinctive blend of legal expertise, strategic leadership, and educational vision. Since 2001, she has led pioneering initiatives in experiential learning, inquiry-based education, social-emotional development, and global curricula.Under her leadership, Billabong High International School has gained recognition for academic excellence, Cambridge learner achievements, innovation, and global university destinations. Passionate about redefining education, Priti continues to advocate for learning experiences that empower young people to become confident, compassionate, and globally minded citizens.The pages slugged ‘Brand Connect’ are equivalent to advertisements and are not written and produced by Forbes India journalists.

title: Fantasy Football: Do defenses repeat performances year-over-year?
description: Looking at historical data to see if D/ST performance can translate year-over-year vs. each position for fantasy football.
content: By Jennifer Eakins, 4for4.comWe often turn to strength of schedule as a tool in determining a player's potential for success over the course of a season. In this study, we retreated to a dark corner of the fantasy library and compiled defensive data from 2015 to 2025, in an effort to see if fantasy points allowed to each position correlated strongly, somewhat, or not at all from one year to the next, hoping for a sticky stat or two to sink our teeth into.Join or create a Yahoo Fantasy Football league for the 2026 NFL seasonBelow is a position-by-position analysis of the best and worst defenses in terms of half-PPR fantasy points allowed last season, and what it all potentially means for 2026.Fantasy Points Allowed to QuarterbacksWhen examining year-to-year fantasy points allowed across all positions, points allowed to quarterbacks had the highest correlation coefficient of 0.27, which is still on the lower end of moderate. The top-five defenses against signal-callers repeated their performance 30% of the time the next season, with an average finish of DEF13.On the other side of the spectrum, the defenses in the bottom five versus quarterbacks ended up there again 20% of the time, with an average ending rank of DEF22.Here's a look at some of the worst D/ST for fantasy football vs. QBs. Jennifer Eakins 4for4.comRepeat offenders after the basement spot in 2024, the Cowboys struggled across the board against signal callers in 2025, and it wasn't even close. Dallas allowed the most passing yards (4,521) and the most passing touchdowns (35), they surrendered the highest number of rushing touchdowns to QBs (8), and the third-most rushing yards to the position (398).The Jets were tied with Dallas for the most passing touchdowns yielded, which is not ideal, but somehow they failed to intercept the QB even once throughout the entire 2025 season. Not one pick. The Commanders, Bucs and Titans were all pretty balanced in their defensive ineptness last season across both passing and rushing metrics.2026 Outlook: The Commanders are likely to end up here again this season despite some efforts to improve, with the addition of Odafe Oweh and K'Lavon Chaisson as EDGE rushers, as well as their seventh overall pick, Ohio State's Sonny Styles, who will replace Bobby Wagner at LB. Questions remain, particularly at cornerback. The Jets are also likely to appear here at this time next year, but they did make some changes to help stifle enemy QBs, with a pair of new edge-rushers in free agent acquisition Joseph Ossai and No. 2 overall pick David Bailey. Some new tackles are also in the mix with David Onyemata and T'Vondre Sweat now in New York. Right now, it's not looking fantastic for any of these five defenses to climb much farther in 2026.Top-5 Defenses vs. QB, 2025Fantasy points allowed — best defensesHere's a look at the top D/ST units for fantasy in 2025.Jennifer Eakins 4for4.comThe Vikings' defense went from fifth in 2024 to first against the QB position last season, yielding the second-fewest passing yards and touchdowns, along with being tied for first in the lowest rushing touchdown total to signal callers, at just one. L.A. was in the top 10 in 2024 but climbed up to second last year, thanks to the third-most interceptions, along with the third-fewest passing touchdowns and the fourth-lowest passing yards surrendered.The Bills shut down the pass last year, with just 170 air yards per contest, the lowest in the NFL, while the Texans and Browns were fairly well balanced, ranking in the top 10 in nearly all defensive categories versus signal callers.2026 Outlook: The Texans, Vikings and Chargers could end up near the top again in 2026 and are all top 10 fantasy defenses in 4for4's early ranks. The Browns have been dominant for the last two seasons under play-caller Jim Schwartz, who is now gone, so they may take a step or two back, but still have the talent to be a top-10 defense.Visit 4for4 for more fantasy football analysisFantasy Points Allowed to Running BacksThe running back position proved the second-highest year-to-year correlation in terms of FPA at .22, which makes sense as the good teams tend to remain that way, and game script is extremely important for running back production. The five defenses that finished the best against rushers repeated 20% of the time with an average ending rank of DEF12.For the poor defenses, the five worst units found themselves in the bottom 32% of the time in the following season, with an average rank of DEF19.Bottom 5 Defenses vs. RB, 2025Here are the worst D/ST units against running backs from 2025.Jennifer Eakins 4for4.comWe have a fresh top five worst against the run in 2025, as only the Giants and Cardinals were close, ranking 25th and 24th, respectively, in 2024 versus RBs. The Jets were porous in the touchdown department, yielding the second-most rushing end zone trips (17) and a whopping 11 scores via the air to the position, which was the most in the NFL. The Bengals, Cardinals, Commanders and Giants were all pretty balanced in their weakness against the rush, coming in the bottom 10 in yards and touchdowns, with Cincinnati and Arizona also coming in the lower 10 of NFL defenses at protecting the receiving side of RB work.2026 Outlook: Sadly, we could be looking at a very similar bottom five this time next season, as all five units have holes and didn't do too much to fix their problematic protection against the run this offseason. The Jets, Bengals, Cardinals, Commanders, and Giants all sit 27th or worse in 4for4's current ranks.Top 5 Defenses vs. RB, 2025Here are the top D/ST units against backs from 2025.Jennifer Eakins 4for4.comSeattle was a powerhouse against the run last year, allowing the fewest rushing touchdowns and the third fewest rushing yards, along with being tied for yielding the third fewest receiving touchdowns to RBs in 2025. The Jags were top four in defending the run in both yards and scores, with Denver top 5 across the board, plus they surrendered the fewest receptions to opposing backs last season.2026 Outlook: All five of these defenses should be solid again in 2026 and are projected to be drafted among the top 10 for fantasy purposes. Right now, Seattle, Denver and Jacksonville are all ranked among the top five, with Pittsburgh and New England just outside at sixth and eighth, respectively.Fantasy Points Allowed to Wide ReceiversThis is where we start to get very little year-to-year correlation, mostly due to the volatility of the position. Of the best five defenses versus pass-catchers, 23% repeated the next season, with an average rank of DEF13. At the bottom, the five least efficient groups against the receiver were there again 23% of the time, with an end ranking of DEF19.Bottom 5 Defenses vs. WR, 2025Here's a look at the worst D/ST units vs. wideouts from 2025.Jennifer Eakins 4for4.comIt's not surprising to see three repeat offenders from this article's bottom QB section again for WRs. The Cowboys allowed the most yards and end zone trips to opposing wideouts in the NFL; the Titans were 29th and 28th in these two categories, respectively, while the Commanders allowed the sixth- and eighth-most yards and touchdowns to WRs. Detroit and Chicago are new to the bottom, but both struggled to contain enemy pass-catchers in 2025, landing among the bottom-10 defenses in both receiving yards and touchdowns to the WR position.2026 Outlook: The Lions are coming off some detrimental injuries, but there is enough talent there to get out of the cellar. Chicago also has a shot, too, as they likely have settled into second-year defensive coordinator Dennis Allen's system, and their secondary is finally healthy heading into 2026.Top 5 Defenses vs. WR, 2025Here are the top D/ST units against wideouts from 2025.Jennifer Eakins 4for4.comMinnesota is the only repeat from the QB section, and they ended last season in the top four in the fewest receptions, yards and touchdowns allowed to enemy wideouts, with an overall top finish in fewest fantasy points surrendered across all positions. The Broncos and Eagles tied for the least number of touchdowns yielded to opposing WRs, with only six in all of 2025 to the position. Seattle appears again after coming in at the top versus RBs, as they allowed the second-fewest receiving yards, eighth-fewest receptions and the ninth-fewest scores to enemy WRs.2026 Outlook: All of these defensive units, except the Chiefs, could find themselves here at this time next year and are all ranked among the top seven at this point in the summer. Kansas City has some question marks heading into 2026, particularly in the pass rush department.Fantasy Points Allowed to Tight EndsWe saw the lowest year-to-year correlation points allowed to tight ends (.16), most likely because facing just a few dominant tight ends can really make a team appear worse against the position, since there are so few big names in general.Only 21% of defensive units that finished in the top five were there again the next season, with an average end ranking of DEF14. Of the five teams that were the worst at defending tight ends, 16% landed in the basement that next season, with an average finish of DEF19.Bottom 5 Defenses vs. TE, 2025Here are the worst defenses against tight ends from 2025.Jennifer Eakins 4for4.comI can only assume that no one is surprised to see the Bengals at the bottom of this list, as they were dead last against the TE in 2024 and 30th in 2023. As you can see, not only did they allow the most fantasy points to opposing TEs last season, they did it by a fairly wide margin. The Cincinnati defense surrendered the most receptions, yards, and touchdowns to the position, with the other four units ranking among the bottom six in each of those categories.2026 Outlook: Since the correlation is so insignificant here, there's not much point in going over any potential turnover, but if faced with a difficult draft decision and one tight end is in the same division as one of these bottom units, they could edge out the other based on the history of FPA.Top 5 Defenses vs. TE, 2025Here's a look at the top D/ST units against tight ends from 2025.Jennifer Eakins 4for4.comThe Eagles and Bills reigned supreme against TEs last season, with Philly allowing the second-fewest receptions and receiving yards, and Buffalo coming in first in both those metrics. The other three are slight surprises, considering they were all in the middle of the pack in overall fantasy points allowed across all positions. Props to the Raiders, who were 30th against TEs in 2024 and moved up a whopping 26 spots last year.2026 Outlook: The Eagles and Falcons are projected similarly for 2026, so treat them as you would for any other position you're looking at during the draft. The Bills and Chiefs duo is ranked in the middle of the league, with the Raiders near the bottom, so adjust strategy accordingly. I know that tight end is unilaterally the least favorite position after defense and kicker, of course, but there is a nice young crop of players emerging, so give them the due diligence when it comes to research.Bottom LineWe're all searching for an edge in fantasy football, and using strength of schedule is something that can benefit your roster and bottom line at the end of the season. At 4for4, we created the metric schedule-adjusted fantasy points allowed, or aFPA, which takes schedule bias out and rectifies the concerns over raw fantasy points allowed discussed above, leveling the playing field to compare matchups in an apples-to-apples manner.After looking at a decade's worth of data, we found that some positions had a stronger correlation than others when it comes to defensive points allowed from one season to the next.This story was originally published in its complete form on 4for4.com

title: തുടക്കത്തിൽ തകർന്നു, പിന്നെ തകർത്തടിച്ചു, ടക്കറും ഡെലാനിയും രക്ഷകരായി; ഇന്ത്യക്ക് മുന്നിൽ ഭേദപ്പെട്ട വിജയലക്ഷ്യം ഉയർത്തി അയർലൻഡ്
description: ടോസ് നഷ്ടത്തിന് പിന്നാലെ ക്രീസിലിറങ്ങിയ അയര്‍ലന്‍ഡിന് ആഗ്രഹിച്ച തുടക്കമല്ല ലഭിച്ചത്. പവര്‍ പ്ലേയില്‍ തന്നെ മൂന്ന് മുന്‍നിര വിക്കറ്റുകള്‍ നഷ്ടമായി അയര്‍ലന്‍ഡ് 36-3ലേക്ക് വീണു.
content: <p><strong>ബെൽഫാസ്റ്റ്: </strong>അയര്‍ലന്‍ഡിനെതിരായ ടി20 പരമ്പരയിലെ ആദ്യ മത്സരത്തില്‍ ഇന്ത്യക്ക് 183 റണ്‍സ് വിജയലക്ഷ്യം. ടോസ് നഷ്ടമായി ആദ്യം ബാറ്റ് ചെയ്ത അയര്‍ലന്‍ഡ് തുടക്കത്തിലെ തകര്‍ന്നടിഞ്ഞെങ്കിലും ക്യാപ്റ്റൻ ലോര്‍ക്കാൻ ടക്കറുടെ അര്‍ധസെഞ്ചുറിയുടെയും ഗാരെത് ഡെലാനിയുടെ ബാറ്റിംഗിന്‍റെയും കരുത്തില്‍ 20 ഓവറില്‍ 9 വിക്കറ്റ് നഷ്ടത്തില്‍ 182 റണ്‍സെടുത്തു. 36 പന്തില്‍ 50 റണ്‍സെടുത്ത ടക്കറാണ് അയര്‍ലന്‍ഡിന്‍റെ ടോപ് സ്കോറര്‍. ഡെലാനി 32 പന്തില്‍ 49 റണ്‍സെടുത്തു. ഇന്ത്യക്കായി ഹര്‍ഷിത് റാണ 24 റണ്‍സിന് മൂന്ന് വിക്കറ്റെടുത്തപ്പോള്‍ അര്‍ഷ്ദീപ് സിംഗും അക്ഷര്‍ പട്ടേലും രണ്ട് വിക്കറ്റ് വീതമെടുത്തു.</p><h2>തകര്‍ച്ചയോടെ തുടക്കം</h2><p>ടോസ് നഷ്ടത്തിന് പിന്നാലെ ക്രീസിലിറങ്ങിയ അയര്‍ലന്‍ഡിന് ആഗ്രഹിച്ച തുടക്കമല്ല ലഭിച്ചത്. പവര്‍ പ്ലേയില്‍ തന്നെ മൂന്ന് മുന്‍നിര വിക്കറ്റുകള്‍ നഷ്ടമായി അയര്‍ലന്‍ഡ് 36-3ലേക്ക് വീണു. രണ്ടാം ഓവറില്‍ റോസ് അഡയറിനെ(12) വിക്കറ്റിന് പിന്നില്‍ സഞ്ജു സാംസണിന്‍റെ കൈകളിലെത്തിച്ച ഹര്‍ഷിത് റാണയാണ് ആദ്യ പ്രഹരമേല്‍പ്പിച്ചത്. അടുത്ത ഓവറില്‍ ഹാരി ടെക്ടറിനെ(0) അര്‍ഷ്ദീപ് സിംഗ് സഞ്ജുവിന്‍റെ കൈകളിലെത്തിച്ചു. നാലാം ഓവറില്‍ ടിം ടെക്ടറിനെയും(17) ഹര്‍ഷിത് വീഴ്ത്തിയതോടെ അയര്‍ലന്‍ഡിന്‍റെ തുടക്കം പാളി. ബെഞ്ചമിന്‍ ക്ലിറ്റ്സും ലോര്‍കാന്‍ ടക്കറും ചേര്‍ന്ന് അയര്‍ലന്‍ഡിനെ 50 കടത്തിയെങ്കിലും ക്ലിറ്റ്സിനെ(11) പ്രസിദ്ധ് കൃഷ്ണ മടക്കി.</p><p>പിന്നീട് ഡെലാനിയും ടെക്ടറും ചേര്‍ന്ന 64 റണ്‍സ് കൂട്ടുകെട്ടാണ് അയര്‍ലന്‍ഡിനെ ഭേദപ്പെട്ട സ്കോറിലേക്ക് നയിച്ചത്. ടെക്ടര്‍ മടങ്ങിയശേഷം ഡെലാനിയും ഡോക്റെലും(19) ചേര്‍ന്ന് 49 റണ്‍സ് കൂട്ടുകെട്ടിലൂടെ അയര്‍ലന്‍ഡിനെ 17 ഓവറില്‍ 164-5 എന്ന ശക്തമായ നിലയിലെത്തിച്ചെങ്കിലും ഡോക്‌റെലിനെ മടക്കിയ അക്ഷര്‍ പട്ടേല്‍ കൂട്ടുകെട്ട് പൊളിച്ചതോടെ അവസാന ഓവറുകളില്‍ തുടര്‍ച്ചയായി വിക്കറ്റുകള്‍ നഷ്ടമായ അയര്‍ലന്‍ഡ് 182 റണ്‍സിലൊതുങ്ങി. നേരത്തെ ടോസ് നേടിയ ഇന്ത്യൻ ക്യാപ്റ്റൻ ശ്രേയസ് അയ്യര്‍ ഫീല്‍ഡിംഗ് തെരഞ്ഞെടുക്കുകയായിരുന്നു.</p><p><strong>ഇന്ത്യ പ്ലേയിംഗ് ഇലവൻ</strong>: അഭിഷേക് ശർമ്മ, സഞ്ജു സാംസൺ (വിക്കറ്റ് കീപ്പർ), ഇഷാൻ കിഷൻ, ശ്രേയസ് അയ്യർ (ക്യാപ്റ്റൻ), തിലക് വർമ്മ, ശിവം ദുബെ, അക്സർ പട്ടേൽ, വാഷിംഗ്ടൺ സുന്ദർ, ഹർഷിത് റാണ, അർഷ്ദീപ് സിംഗ്, പ്രസിദ്ധ് കൃഷ്ണ.</p><p><span><strong>ഏഷ്യാനെറ്റ് ന്യൂസ് ലൈവ് കാണാന്‍ ഇവിടെ ക്ലിക് ചെയ്യുക</strong></span></p>

title: बीजिंग की सबसे ऊंची इमारत से टकराकर प्लेन के उड़े परखच्चे, मंजर देख सहम गए लोग, देखें खौफनाक VIDEO
description: China Plane Crash: बीजिंग में एक छोटा विमान 109 मंजिला CITIC टावर (चाइना ज़ुन) से टकरा गया। हादसे के बाद इलाके को सील कर दिया गया। फिलहाल किसी के हताहत होने की आधिकारिक पुष्टि नहीं हुई है।
content:
Beijing Plane Crash: चीन की राजधानी बीजिंग में शुक्रवार दोपहर उस समय हड़कंप मच गया, जब एक छोटा विमान शहर की सबसे ऊंची इमारत CITIC टावर (चाइना ज़ुन) से टकरा गया। 109 मंजिला इस प्रतिष्ठित इमारत से टक्कर के बाद मलबा नीचे गिरता दिखाई दिया, जबकि घटनास्थल पर विमान का पिछला हिस्सा और एक क्षतिग्रस्त टैक्सी भी नजर आई।
सोशल मीडिया पर सामने आए वीडियो में हादसे के बाद इमारत से बाहर निकलते लोगों की भीड़ दिखाई दे रही है। सूचना मिलते ही फायर ब्रिगेड, पुलिस और एम्बुलेंस की कई टीमें मौके पर पहुंच गईं और राहत एवं सुरक्षा अभियान शुरू किया गया।
इलाके को किया गया सील
हादसे के बाद प्रशासन ने एहतियात के तौर पर इमारत के आसपास की सड़कों को बंद कर दिया। पूरे क्षेत्र में सुरक्षा व्यवस्था कड़ी कर दी गई है। प्रत्यक्षदर्शियों के अनुसार, पुलिस लोगों को घटनास्थल की तस्वीरें और वीडियो बनाने से भी रोक रही है। अभी तक इस दुर्घटना में किसी के घायल या मृत होने की आधिकारिक पुष्टि नहीं हुई है। विमान में कितने लोग सवार थे और उनकी स्थिति क्या है, इसे लेकर भी कोई आधिकारिक जानकारी सामने नहीं आई है।

今天下午，一架型号为 B-12PP 的国产轻型通航小飞机，撞到了北京第一高楼 &#8211; 中国尊 pic.twitter.com/CobNs6fSBA
— Sea (@Sea_Bitcoin) June 26, 2026

घरेलू स्पोर्ट्स एयरक्राफ्ट होने की आशंका
ऑनलाइन सामने आई तस्वीरों के आधार पर विमान का रजिस्ट्रेशन कोड चीन में निर्मित हल्के स्पोर्ट्स एयरक्राफ्ट Sunward SA 60L Aurora से मेल खाता बताया जा रहा है। बताया जा रहा है कि यह विमान एक स्थानीय जनरल एविएशन कंपनी के बेड़े का हिस्सा है। Flightradar24 डेटा के अनुसार, विमान अपनी निर्धारित उड़ान मार्ग से काफी दूर चला गया था। हालांकि इस दावे की आधिकारिक पुष्टि अभी नहीं हुई है और दुर्घटना के कारणों की जांच जारी है।
यह भी पढ़ें- Air India Bombing: कनाडा ने माना 1985 के विमान धमाके में था खालिस्तानियों का हाथ
बीजिंग में पहले से लागू हैं कड़े उड़ान नियम
गौरतलब है कि 1 मई से बीजिंग में नए सुरक्षा नियम लागू हैं, जिनके तहत ड्रोन उड़ाने पर कड़े प्रतिबंध लगाए गए हैं। शहर के अधिकांश हिस्सों में सरकारी अनुमति के बिना ड्रोन खरीदने, किराए पर लेने या उड़ाने की इजाजत नहीं है।

title: Scholarship Test | ఈనెల 28న ఎస్సై ,కానిస్టేబుల్ అభ్యర్థులకు స్కాలర్‌షిప్‌ టెస్ట్
description: Scholarship Test | పోలీస్ శాఖలో ఎస్సై , కానిస్టేబుల్ ఉద్యోగాలకు సిద్ధమవు తున్న అభ్యర్థులకు ప్రోత్సాహం అందించేందుకు శ్రీధర్ సీసీఈ, అఖిల రాజ్ ఫౌండేషన్ ఆధ్వర్యంలో రాష్ట్ర వ్యాప్తంగా స్కాలర్‌షిప్ టెస్ట్ నిర్వహిస్తున్నట్లు అఖిల్ రాజ్ ఫౌండేషన్ సిద్ధిపేట జిల్లా రాయపోల్ మండల అధ్యక్షులు సొక్కం స్వామి తెలిపారు.
content:
రాయపోల్ : పోలీస్ శాఖలో ఎస్సై (SI ), కానిస్టేబుల్ ( Constable candidates ) ఉద్యోగాలకు సిద్ధమవు తున్న అభ్యర్థులకు ప్రోత్సాహం అందించేందుకు శ్రీధర్ సీసీఈ, అఖిల రాజ్ ఫౌండేషన్ ఆధ్వర్యంలో రాష్ట్ర వ్యాప్తంగా స్కాలర్‌షిప్ టెస్ట్ ( Scholarship test ) నిర్వహిస్తున్నట్లు అఖిల్ రాజ్ ఫౌండేషన్ సిద్ధిపేట జిల్లా రాయపోల్ మండల అధ్యక్షులు సొక్కం స్వామి తెలిపారు. శుక్రవారం రాయపోల్ మండల కేంద్రంలో ఎస్సై, కానిస్టేబుల్ స్కాల‌ర్‌షిప్‌ టెస్ట్ గోడ ప్రతులను విడుదల చేశారు.
ఈ సందర్భంగా ఆయన మాట్లాడుతూ ఈ పరీక్షలో ప్రతిభ కనబరిచిన అభ్యర్థులకు నగదు బహుమతులతో పాటు కోచింగ్ ఫీజులో ప్రత్యేక రాయితీలు కల్పించనున్నట్లు పేర్కొన్నారు. పరీక్షలో మొదటి ర్యాంకు సాధించిన అభ్యర్థికి రూ. లక్ష, 21 మంది ప్రతిభావంతులకు నగదు బహుమతులు, రాష్ట్రవ్యాప్తంగా ఎంపికయ్యే వెయ్యి మంది అభ్యర్థులకు స్కాలర్‌షిప్‌లు అందజేయనున్నట్లు వెల్లడించారు. అదనంగా మెరిట్ ఆధారంగా కోచింగ్‌లో రాయితీలు, ఉచిత మెటీరియల్, ఇతర ప్రోత్సాహకాలు కూడా కల్పించనున్నట్లు వెల్లడించారు.
ఈ స్కాలర్‌షిప్ టెస్ట్ ఈ నెల 28న ఉదయం 10:00 గంటలకు వాగ్దేవి జూనియర్ కళాశాల బజాజ్‌ షోరూం దగ్గర ముస్తాబాద్ రోడ్డు దుబ్బాక , స్నేహ జూనియర్ , డిగ్రీ కళాశాల రామాయంపేట కేంద్రాలలో పరీక్షలు నిర్వహించనున్నామని వివరించారు. ఆసక్తి గల అభ్యర్థులు సమీప పరీక్షా కేంద్రాన్ని ఎంపిక చేసుకుని ముందస్తుగా నమోదు చేసుకోవాలని సూచించారు. రిజిస్ట్రేషన్ చేసుకోవడానికి 76808 87711, 76808 87722 నెంబర్లకు సంప్రదించగలరన్నారు. ఈ కార్యక్రమంలో అఖిల్ రాజ్ ఫౌండేషన్ ఉపాధ్యక్షులు దాతర్ పల్లి భాస్కర్, రాంపల్లి సతీష్, పోతరాజు శ్రీనివాస్, ప్రవీణ్, సత్యనారాయణ, నాగరాజు తదితరులు పాల్గొన్నారు.

title: TMC Panchayat Member Arrested | জমি দখলের অভিযোগ, গ্রেপ্তার তৃণমূলের পঞ্চায়েত সদস্য
description:
ইটাহার:জমি সংক্রান্ত বিবাদের জেরে সালিশি সভা করতে গিয়ে বিতর্কের মুখে পড়লেন ইটাহার গ্রাম পঞ্চায়েতের এক তৃণমূল সদস্য (TMC Panchayat Member Arrested)। জমি দখলের অভিযোগে অভিযুক্ত ওই সদস্যকে গ্রেফতার করেছে ইটাহার থানার পুলিশ। ধৃতের নাম ছবি লাল চৌধুরী (৪৪), তার বাড়ি ইটাহার থানার চাকলা ঘাট গ্রামে। শুক্রবার তাকে রায়গঞ্জ মুখ্য বিচার বিভাগীয় ম্যাজিস্ট্রেট আদালতে তোলা হলে […]
The post TMC Panchayat Member Arrested | জমি দখলের অভিযোগ, গ্রেপ্তার তৃণমূলের পঞ্চায়েত সদস্য appeared first on Uttarbanga Sambad.
content:
ইটাহার:জমি সংক্রান্ত বিবাদের জেরে সালিশি সভা করতে গিয়ে বিতর্কের মুখে পড়লেন ইটাহার গ্রাম পঞ্চায়েতের এক তৃণমূল সদস্য (TMC Panchayat Member Arrested)। জমি দখলের অভিযোগে অভিযুক্ত ওই সদস্যকে গ্রেফতার করেছে ইটাহার থানার পুলিশ। ধৃতের নাম ছবি লাল চৌধুরী (৪৪), তার বাড়ি ইটাহার থানার চাকলা ঘাট গ্রামে। শুক্রবার তাকে রায়গঞ্জ মুখ্য বিচার বিভাগীয় ম্যাজিস্ট্রেট আদালতে তোলা হলে বিচারক শর্তসাপেক্ষে জামিন মঞ্জুর করেন।
পুলিশ সূত্রে জানা গিয়েছে, চাকলা ঘাট এলাকায় দেড় বিঘা জমি নিয়ে দু’পক্ষের মধ্যে দীর্ঘদিনের বিবাদ চলছিল। বিষয়টি মেটানোর জন্য বৃহস্পতিবার রাতে অভিযুক্ত তৃণমূল সদস্য ছবি লাল চৌধুরী নিজেই একটি সালিশি সভার আয়োজন করেন। অভিযোগ, সেই সভায় দুই পক্ষের মধ্যে তর্কাতর্কি থেকে হাতাহাতি শুরু হয়ে যায়। পরিস্থিতি উত্তপ্ত হয়ে উঠলে খবর যায় ইটাহার থানায়। পুলিশ ঘটনাস্থলে পৌঁছে পরিস্থিতি নিয়ন্ত্রণে আনে এবং সরকারি কাজে বাধা ও বিবাদে জড়িয়ে পড়ার অভিযোগে ওই তৃণমূল সদস্যকে গ্রেফতার করে।
শুক্রবার দুপুরে তাকে আদালতে পেশ করা হয়। অভিযুক্তের বিরুদ্ধে ভারতীয় ন্যায় সংহিতার নির্দিষ্ট ধারায় মামলা রুজু করেছে পুলিশ।
নিজের গ্রেফতারির বিষয়ে ছবি লাল চৌধুরী বলেন, “দেড় বিঘা জমি নিয়ে দু’পক্ষের গন্ডগোল চলছিল। আমি বিষয়টি মিটিয়ে নেওয়ার পরামর্শ দিয়েছিলাম এবং সালিশি সভা ডেকেছিলাম। কিন্তু তারা নিজেরাই ঝামেলা পাকিয়ে ফেলে। আমাকে উদ্দেশ্যপ্রণোদিতভাবে গ্রেফতার করা হয়েছে।”
The post TMC Panchayat Member Arrested | জমি দখলের অভিযোগ, গ্রেপ্তার তৃণমূলের পঞ্চায়েত সদস্য appeared first on Uttarbanga Sambad.

title: സംസ്ഥാനത്ത് 8 പേർക്ക് കൂടി ഷി​ഗല്ല സ്ഥിരീകരിച്ചു; കോഴിക്കോട് 3 പേർക്ക് രോ​ഗബാധ
description: 21 ദിവസത്തെ നിരീക്ഷണം പൂർത്തിയാക്കിയ ഉയർന്ന റിസ്ക് വിഭാഗത്തിൽപെട്ട ഒരാളെയാണ് ഇന്ന് ക്വാറന്റൈനിൽ നിന്നു ഒഴിവാക്കിയിരിക്കുന്നത്.
content: <p>തിരുവനന്തപുരം: സംസ്ഥാനത്ത് എട്ട് പേർക്ക് കൂടി ഷി​ഗല്ല സ്ഥിരീകരിച്ചു. കോഴിക്കോട് 3, വയനാട് 2, എറണാകുളം, തൃശൂർ, മലപ്പുറം എന്നിവിടങ്ങളിൽ 1 വീതം എന്നിങ്ങനെയാണ് ഇന്ന് രോ​ഗബാധ സ്ഥിരീകരിച്ചിരിക്കുന്നത്. നിപയിൽ ഉയർന്ന റിസ്ക് വിഭാഗത്തിൽപ്പെട്ട ഒരാളെ ഇന്ന് ക്വാറന്റൈനിൽ നിന്ന് ഒഴിവാക്കി. 21 ദിവസത്തെ നിരീക്ഷണം പൂർത്തിയാക്കിയ ഉയർന്ന റിസ്ക് വിഭാഗത്തിൽപെട്ട ഒരാളെയാണ് ഇന്ന് ക്വാറന്റൈനിൽ നിന്നു ഒഴിവാക്കിയിരിക്കുന്നത്. രോഗബാധിതന്റെ സഹപ്രവർത്തകനായിരുന്നു ഇദ്ദേഹം. രോഗബാധിതൻ വെന്റിലേറ്ററിൽ തുടരുകയാണ്.</p><p></p><p>&nbsp;</p>

title: సాయికృష్ణ కేసుకు సంబంధించి వెలుగులోకి సంచలన విషయాలు!
description: Saikrishna Case : ఆంధ్రప్రదేశ్‌లోని విజయవాడలో కలకలం రేపిన సాయికృష్ణ మిస్సింగ్ కేసు విచారణలో ప్రత్యేక విచారణ బృందం (SIT) సంచలన విషయాలను గుర్తించింది. ఈ కేసులో...
content:
Saikrishna Case : ఆంధ్రప్రదేశ్‌లోని విజయవాడలో కలకలం రేపిన సాయికృష్ణ మిస్సింగ్ కేసు విచారణలో ప్రత్యేక విచారణ బృందం (SIT) సంచలన విషయాలను గుర్తించింది. ఈ కేసులో ప్రధాన నిందితుడిగా భావిస్తున్న సీఐ (CI) నాగరాజుకు కొందరు కింది స్థాయి సిబ్బంది మరియు స్నేహితులు నమ్మశక్యం కాని రీతిలో సహకరించినట్లు సిట్ దర్యాప్తులో తేలింది. హెడ్ కానిస్టేబుళ్లు అశోక్, నానిలతో పాటు సీఐ స్నేహితుడు సురేశ్ ఈ వ్యవహారంలో కీలక పాత్ర పోషించారని సమాచారం. వీరంతా కలిసి సాయికృష్ణను అంతమొందించి, సాక్ష్యాధారాలు దొరక్కుండా మృతదేహాన్ని పూర్తిగా మాయం చేశారనే బలమైన అనుమానాలు వ్యక్తమవుతున్నాయి. రక్షించాల్సిన పోలీసులే ఇలా అపహరణ, హత్య, శవాల మాయం వంటి దారుణాలకు సహకరించడం స్థానికంగా తీవ్ర దిగ్భ్రాంతిని కలిగిస్తోంది.



Read Also : మొహర్రం శుభాకాంక్షలు తెలిపిన సీఎం చంద్రబాబు!



Sai Krishna Case 







బంధువులపై సెటిల్మెంట్ ఒత్తిడి.. నిందితులు అజ్ఞాతంలోకి!



మరోవైపు ఈ కేసును తొక్కేసేందుకు నిందితులు ముందే పక్కా స్కెచ్ వేసినట్లు తెలుస్తోంది. గత నెల 29వ తేదీన హెడ్ కానిస్టేబుళ్లు అశోక్, నాని మరియు సురేశ్ కలిసి బాధితుడు సాయికృష్ణ బంధువుల వద్దకు వెళ్లినట్లు సిట్ విచారణలో బయటపడింది. కేసును పెద్దది చేయకుండా, లోపాయికారీగా సెటిల్మెంట్ చేసుకోవాలంటూ వారు బాధితుడి కుటుంబ సభ్యులపై ఒత్తిడి తెచ్చినట్లు సమాచారం. అయితే ఈ కుట్ర వెలుగులోకి రావడం, సిట్ అధికారులు దర్యాప్తు ముమ్మరం చేయడంతో అశోక్, నాని, సురేశ్‌లు ముగ్గురూ ఒక్కసారిగా అజ్ఞాతంలోకి వెళ్లిపోయారు. ప్రస్తుతం పరారీలో ఉన్న ఈ ముగ్గురి కోసం పోలీసులు గాలింపు చర్యలను వేగవంతం చేశారు.

title: Iran US Israel war Live Updates: Missile Alert Sounds Across Dubai, UAE Issues All-Clear Minutes Later
description: Days after US-Iran Switzerland talks, Pakistan on Thursday said that talks between the US and Iran are expected to resume next week. In a statement issued late on Wednesday, Pakistan's foreign office spokesperson Tahir Andrabi said “parties are on the table” and that the process was going on. The US and Iran last week signed a memorandum of understanding aimed at restoring peace in West Asia.Earlier this week, they engaged in technical-level talks in Switzerland's Burgenstock, in the presence of mediators Pakistan, which has signed the memorandum as a “guarantor”, and Qatar, following which they agreed on a roadmap towards a final peace deal in 60 days.“Talks are continuing. I believe that the talks will resume next week, probably on Tuesday... Basically, this is a temporary gap, and it is not as such a break,” Andrabi was quoted as saying in the statement.“Our delegation was there in Burgenstock for the 22nd June talks. I understand that our delegation will also be there when the talks resume next week,” he added.He also said the expected resumption of talks between the US and Iran next week was a "positive development".However, the US and Iran have not yet said anything on the possible resumption of talks.

title: IND vs IRE | ఐర్లాండ్‌ను ఆదుకున్న టక్నర్, గెలానీ.. భారత్ ముందు భారీ లక్ష్యం..!
description: IND vs IRE : పొట్టి సిరీస్‌ తొలి మ్యాచ్‌లో ఐర్లాండ్ బ్యాటర్లు ఆరంభంలో తడబడినా.. ఆఖర్లో దంచారు. హర్షిత్ రానా(3-24) విజృంభణతో టాపార్డర్ కుప్పకూలగా.. లొర్కాన్ టక్నర్‌(50) కెప్టెన్ ఇన్నింగ్స్‌తో ఐర్లాండ్‌ను ఆదుకున్నాడు.
content:
IND vs IRE : పొట్టి సిరీస్‌ తొలి మ్యాచ్‌లో ఐర్లాండ్ బ్యాటర్లు ఆరంభంలో తడబడినా.. ఆఖర్లో దంచారు. భారత పేసర్ హర్షిత్ రానా(3-24) విజృంభణతో టాపార్డర్ కుప్పకూలగా.. లొర్కాన్ టక్నర్‌(50) కెప్టెన్ ఇన్నింగ్స్‌తో ఐర్లాండ్‌ను ఆదుకున్నాడు. గరెత్ డెలానీ(49)తో కలిసి ఐదో వికెట్‌కు విలువైన రన్స్ జోడించాడు. పూర్తి స్థాయి సారథిగా టక్నర్ తొలి హాఫ్ సెంచరీతో రాణించగా.. టెయిలెండర్లతో డెలానీ టీమిండియా బౌలర్లను ఉతికేశాడు. ఫలితంగా ఐర్లాండ్ 182 పరుగులు చేయగలిగింది.
పొట్టి సిరీస్‌ తొలి మ్యాచ్‌లో భారత బౌలర్లు పంజా విసిరినా ఐర్లాండ్‌ భారీ స్కోర్ కొట్టింది. టాస్ ఓడిన జట్టుకు శుభారంభమివ్వాలనుకున్న ఓపెనర్ రాస్ అడైర్‌(12)ను ఔట్ చేసి హర్షిత్ రానా(3-24) తొలి వికెట్ అందివ్వగా.. హ్యారీ టెక్టర్‌(0)ను అర్ష్‌దీప్ సింగ్(2-28) పెవిలియన్ పంపాడు. తర్వాతి ఓవర్లో టిమ్ టెక్టర్‌(17)ను రానా డగౌట్ చేర్చగా 30 పరుగులకే మూడు వికెట్లు పడ్డాయి. ఆ దశలో ఆచితూచి ఆడాలనుకున్న బెంజమిన్ కాలిట్జ్‌(15)ను దూబే బోల్తా కొట్టించాడు. కష్టాల్లో పడిన జట్టును కెప్టెన్ లొర్కాన్ టక్నర్‌(50), గరెత్ డెలానీ(49)లు ఆదుకున్నారు.

Clean as you like! #BackingGreen | #IREvIND | #FailteSolar pic.twitter.com/PU4Qo5opro
— Cricket Ireland (@cricketireland) June 26, 2026

టపటపా నాలుగు వికెట్లు పడిన దశలో టక్నర్, డెలానీ నిలబడ్డారు. మరో వికెట్ పడకుండా.. రన్‌రేటు తగ్గకుండా స్కోర్ బోర్డును నడిపించారిద్దరూ. దూబే ఓవర్లో ఫోర్, డబుల్స్‌లో ఐరిష్ సారథి అర్ధ శతకం సాధించాడు. కానీ హర్షిత్ ఓవర్లో టక్నర్.. తిలక్ వర్మ చేతికి చిక్కడంతో 115 వద్ద ఐదో వికెట్ పడింది. డెత్ ఓవర్లలో గేర్ మార్చిన గెలానీ బౌండరీలు రాబట్టగా.. ఐర్లాండ్ నిర్ణీత ఓవర్లలో 9 వికెట్లు కోల్పోయి 182 పరుగులు చేయగలిగింది.

title: Shooting at MGM: 1 in Custody After Deadly Shooting Near MGM National Harbor; Road Rage Suspected
description: A shooting near MGM National Harbor in Maryland resulted in a man's death late Thursday, with authorities suspecting it may have been linked to road rage.
content: A man was shot and killed near MGM National Harbor in Maryland late Thursday night, and one suspect is now in custody as investigators examine whether the incident was triggered by a road rage confrontation, according to local authorities and sources familiar with the investigation.Police responded around 11:15 p.m. to the intersection of MGM National Avenue and Monument Avenue in Prince George's County after receiving reports of what was initially believed to be a personal injury crash.When first responders arrived, they found an adult man inside a vehicle suffering from a gunshot wound. He was pronounced dead at the scene.According to sources, detectives believe the shooting may have stemmed from a road rage incident. The gunfire occurred on a roadway near the casino complex and adjacent parking garages, not inside MGM National Harbor.The suspect later turned himself in to police and is currently in custody, sources said. Investigators are continuing to determine the motive behind the shooting and whether any other individuals were involved.The shooting prompted authorities to close roads in the area for several hours overnight while detectives processed the crime scene. Crews reopened the affected lanes at approximately 4:15 a.m.The incident comes just days after Prince George's County police announced an arrest in a separate homicide connected to MGM National Harbor. Earlier this week, authorities charged Dayon Neal in the 2024 fatal shooting of Daniel Thomas inside a parking garage at the entertainment complex.The latest homicide remains under investigation, and police have not yet released the identity of the victim or announced any formal charges against the suspect.
