title: Two Dolphins rookies earning some respect from fantasy football expert
description: The Miami Dolphins added over a dozen rookies in the 2026 NFL draft, and two of them are seen as possible contributors in fantasy football.
content: The Miami Dolphins brought in over a dozen rookies throughout the seven rounds of the 2026 NFL draft, and while a few of them are developmental pieces, some should be able to contribute in the near future.This week, CBS Sports' Heath Cummings ran a rookie only mock draft for the upcoming fantasy football season, and two Dolphins were taken in the first three rounds. Wide receiver Chris Bell went 17th (fifth in the second round) and wide receiver Caleb Douglas went 31st (seventh in the third round).Douglas, 22, caught 135 passes for 2,031 yards and 16 touchdowns between his time at Florida and Texas Tech. The All-Big 12 wideout was the first of three wide receivers that Miami took in this draft, and signs point to him being on the field early for the Dolphins this year.Bell, 22, caught 151 passes for 2,166 yards and 12 touchdowns in 47 games at Louisville. He could've been a first-round pick if he hadn't torn his ACL in November. While he's recovering, the wideout will probably be eased in during his rookie year, but when he's healthy, he could be the team's top wide receiver.The production of both Douglas and Bell will depend on the success of new Dolphins quarterback Malik Willis who had mixed results in his first two stops in the league. If he looks like he did in Tennessee, the rookies may not make much of an impact, but if he plays like he did in Green Bay, they could be fantasy relevant.This article originally appeared on Dolphins Wire: Two Dolphins rookies earning some respect from fantasy football expert

title: Shivam Dube Achieves Unique Birthday Record After Dismissing Ireland's Benjamin Calitz
description: Shivam Dube created a unique birthday record after dismissing Ireland's Benjamin Calitz in the first game of the T20I series. Dube is one of the senior members of the T20I team now.
content: Shivam Dube once again chipped in with his golden arm and scalped a wicket on the very first ball he bowled. The right-arm medium pace bowler dismissed Benjamin Calitz for 15. Dube achieved a unique birthday milestone and joined the list of Indians to take a wicket on their birthday. Dube, who was born on June 26 in 1993, is celebrating his 33rd birthday. Yuvraj Singh, Ravindra Jadeja and Kuldeep Yadav are the other bowlers who have achieved this feat.Interestingly, Dube is the first right-arm bowler to achieve this feat. He is a three-dimensional player on the field and has now cemented his spot. Dube, who made his India debut in 2019, became a regular in 2023.Dube was a member of the 2024 and 2026 T20 World Cup-winning teams. He has age on his side and can play at least one more T20 World Cup. Dube has only played 4 ODIs, with his last appearance coming in 2024. He isn't in the scheme of things to make it to the Test team.No debut for Vaibhav Sooryavanshi    Vaibhav Sooryavanshi missed out on making his debut in the series opener against Ireland as the team management retained the opening pair of Abhishek Sharma and Sanju Samson. Sooryavanshi could make his debut in the second game. He is part of the squad for the England series and the Asian Games as well."Unfortunately, no. He’s a gun player. But obviously, we’ve got tremendous experience in the squad who have done brilliant in the past couple of series for India. So we are backing majority of our cricketers who have been doing absolutely marvellous throughout the season. So I think he will get his opportunity when the time comes. But for now, we are going with three genuine seamers, one all-rounder, and two spinners," India captain Shreyas Iyer said at the toss.Sooryavanshi won the Orange Cap in IPL 2026 for piling up 776 runs. He played for India A following IPL and slammed 94 off just 29 balls in the final, that India A won.

title: American Overhead Door rallies for Little League city championship
description: Trailing 7-1 in the final inning, American Overhead Door scored seven runs to win a third straight Appleton Little League city title.
content: Appleton Firefighters couldn’t put out a fire in the final inning, opening the door for an epic come-from-behind win for American Overhead Door on June 25 in the Appleton Little League Major Baseball city championship game.Two-time defending champion American Overhead Door trailed 7-1 in the bottom of the sixth inning on Gromer Field at USA Youth Sports Complex, three outs away from seeing its title reign end.American Overhead Door improbably sent 11 batters to the plate, with the first eight reaching, and scored seven runs to pull out an 8-7 walk-off victory and win the city championship for the third year in a row under manager Bill Bowers.“That’s kind of what the kids did all year,” Bowers said. “In the last two years, I had a lot of experienced players. This one, we had five or six new players. But they all hung together and they always think they could win every game and, somehow, we scored seven runs.”The championship game began Wednesday, June 24, with Appleton Firefighters leading 2-0 in the bottom of the third inning when the game was suspended by weather and moved to the next night.When the game resumed, American Overhead Door scored a run in the bottom of the third, but Appleton Firefighters added two runs in the top of the fourth inning and three in the top of the fifth and was seemingly cruising to the win with a 7-1 lead.American Overhead Door had the top of its batting order up to start the bottom of the sixth inning.After a leadoff walk and a passed ball, Elijah Bowers singled to center field to bring home the first run. Ben Burroughs followed with a single. After a wild pitch, Will Schraufnagel brought home a run with an infield single to make it 7-3.After a pitching change, Preston Justinger brought home two runs with a single to make it 7-5. Riley Pinkham then blooped a double into shallow right field, putting runners on second and third.Roman Knox reached on catcher’s interference to load the bases with no outs, then Chad Schweitzer hit a slow roller toward third for an infield hit to bring home a run to make it 7-6 with the bases still full.After a strikeout for the first out, Henry Kallies hit a pop up just barely on to the outfield grass at second base for the second out, but Pinkham raced home from third to score the tying run.Elijah Bowers was next and he lined a smash to center field for a hit – his second of the inning and third in the game – with Knox scoring from second base with the winning run and the victory.“I'm really excited,” Elijah said. “We believed we could still have a chance of winning it, and we did end up winning it.”Asked if he was nervous coming up to bat with the game on the line, Elijah said: “A little bit, but I believed I could hit that.”His dad was watching intently from the third base coaching box.MORE: Timber Rattlers secure Appleton Little League city softball championship“I was hoping his leg was all right, because he got hit by the ball at first base [earlier in the inning],” Bill Bowers said. “He's been practicing since January and playing [since he was] 6 years old, so I wasn't too worried. And it was 7-7, so I didn’t have to worry as much.”American Overhead Door, which defeated JD’s Drive In 5-2 in the championship game last year and beat Appleton Police 11-2 in the title game in 2024, had its sights set on a three-peat all season.“Oh yeah, they knew it,” Bill Bowers said. “Our whole goal was to win it all. They thought they could win it all. … They worked hard. They practiced hard, they played hard, and they were good teammates. So it was a good bunch of kids and it was a nice way for them to win.”Sawyer Stanley and Breck Maves both had two hits for Appleton Firefighters. Hudson Rose had an RBI double in the first inning, Jamison Caskey had an RBI single in the fifth inning and Henry Denneau hit a triple to right-center in the sixth inning.This article originally appeared on Appleton Post-Crescent: American Overhead Door rallies for Little League city championship

title: Lamborghini Teases Massive Upgrade For Its Most Extreme SUV Yet
description: Lamborghini will unveil an updated Urus on July 1 to consolidate the existing Urus S, Performante and SE into a single hybrid model. This shift aligns with the brand's electrification strategy.
content: Lamborghini has confirmed a July 1 reveal date for an updated Urus, teased through a shadowy social media post showing a reworked rear end. The bigger news buried in that announcement: this single new model will replace the current Urus S, Performante and SE altogether, consolidating three variants into one. For Indian buyers, that matters because the Urus is already sold here at a starting price of Rs 4.57 crore, and a lineup simplification usually comes with a fresh price structure too.The reasoning ties back to Lamborghini's broader push toward electrification. Both the brand's Revuelto supercar and the smaller Temerario are plug-in hybrids and the company wants the Urus to follow that pattern with a single hybrid model rather than maintaining separate combustion and electrified variants side by side. Spy shots over the past year have repeatedly shown a camouflaged prototype borrowing styling cues from the current Performante which is reportedly the variant influencing this new model's character most directly.  A new chapter is taking shape.Join us live on https://t.co/VHPdvIp2EL and YouTube. July 1st. Save the date.#Lamborghini pic.twitter.com/9WOlGZIKw3— Lamborghini (@Lamborghini) June 25, 2026 What Changes Can You Expect on This New Urus?Going by the teaser and prior prototype sightings, expect SE-style daytime running lights, larger air intakes, a ducktail spoiler and revised front and rear lighting units alongside likely interior updates. The engine is expected to remain the familiar 4.0-litre twin-turbo V8 currently rated at 789 hp and 950 Nm in the outgoing Urus SE, with reports suggesting this new version could push power even higher though Lamborghini hasn't confirmed exact figures yet. If true, that would make it the most powerful Urus to reach production.What Does This Mean for Buyers in India?Currently, the Urus SE is the only variant on sale in India priced from Rs 4.57 crore (ex-showroom) with a waiting period that's stretched to around a year. Since this update is positioned as a direct replacement rather than an additional variant, existing Urus SE buyers shouldn't expect the current model to stick around much longer once the new one is unveiled. Anyone currently in the queue for a Urus or considering booking one, may want to wait for July 1 details before finalising anything since pricing and specification changes typically follow within months of a global reveal like this.

title: పడవ ప్రమాదంలో గాయపడిన వృద్ధుడు మృతి
description: పెన్‌పహాడ్ మండల పరిధిలోని సింగారెడ్డిపాలెం గ్రామానికి చెందిన జక్కుల వెంకన్న (65) అనే వృద్ధుడు ఆస్ప‌త్రిలో చికిత్స పొందుతూ మరణించినట్లు పెన్‌పహాడ్ ఎస్ఐ కస్తాల గోపికృష్ణ తెలిపారు. జక్కుల వెంకన్న గ్రామంలోని పెద్ద చెరువుకు మత్స్య కార్మికుడిగా పని చూసుకునేవాడు.
content: పెన్‌పహాడ్, జూన్ 26 : పెన్‌పహాడ్ మండల పరిధిలోని సింగారెడ్డిపాలెం గ్రామానికి చెందిన జక్కుల వెంకన్న (65) అనే వృద్ధుడు ఆస్ప‌త్రిలో చికిత్స పొందుతూ మరణించినట్లు పెన్‌పహాడ్ ఎస్ఐ కస్తాల గోపికృష్ణ తెలిపారు. జక్కుల వెంకన్న గ్రామంలోని పెద్ద చెరువుకు మత్స్య కార్మికుడిగా పని చూసుకునేవాడు. మే 14వ తేదీన విధుల్లో భాగంగా చేపలకు మేత వేసి వాటిని పరిశీలించడానికి ఆయన పడవపై వెళ్లాడు. ఆ సమయంలో ప్రమాదవశాత్తు పడవపై నుండి చెరువులో పడిపోయాడు. ఈదుకుంటూ ఎలాగోలా ఒడ్డుకు చేరి ఇంటికి వచ్చినప్పటికీ, ఎడమవైపు పక్కటెముకలు విరిగి తీవ్రంగా గాయపడ్డాడు. మొదట సూర్యాపేటలో ప్రాథమిక చికిత్స చేయించుకున్నా నొప్పి తగ్గకపోవడంతో, కొదాడ హాస్పిటల్‌కు, ఆపై సూర్యాపేట ఏరియా ఆస్ప‌త్రికి తరలించారు. అక్కడ ఆరు రోజుల పాటు చికిత్స అందించిన అనంతరం మెరుగైన వైద్యం కోసం హైదరాబాద్‌లోని నిమ్స్ ఆస్ప‌త్రికి తరలించారు. అక్కడ చికిత్స పొందుతూ జూన్ 25న ఉదయం పరిస్థితి విషమించి మృతి చెందాడు. వెంక‌న్న కుమారుడు జక్కుల భిక్షపతి ఇచ్చిన ఫిర్యాదు మేరకు కేసు నమోదు చేసిన‌ట్లు ఎస్ఐ గోపికృష్ణ తెలిపారు.

title: Marina Mabrey’s 53-point night earned Angel Reese Rolls-Royce invite
description: Marina's Mabrey's historic 53-point night earned her an unexpected reward: a ride in Angel Reee's Rolls Royce.
content: Marina Mabrey is going to be riding in style after scoring a WNBA record 53 points.In case you missed it, the Toronto Tempo torched the Los Angeles Sparks during a 125-97 blowout win Thursday night. Leading the charge was Mabrey, who joined the team in the 2026 WNBA Expansion Draft. The Tempo guard scored the game's first points with a fadeaway jumper, and punctuated her night with a 3-ball that tied a WNBA record for most points in a single game (53). Mabrey's huge night earned her a special perk: a ride in Angel Reese's Rolls-Royce."Yeah, I guess Marina deserves a ride in the RR," Reese said on social media postgame. Reese and Mabrey previously spent time together as teammates in Chicago during Reese's rookie season."Finallyyyyy," Mabrey said in response.Marina Mabrey's record-tying 53 points just earned her a spot in Angel Reese's Rolls Royce 🤣(via tehinapaopao/IG) pic.twitter.com/hqW6P1V0bG— TSN (@TSN_Sports) June 26, 2026Mabrey sank nine 3-pointers during her historic night, which also tied a league record for the most triples in a single game.She also put her name in the history books for another record that many may not have realized. Mabrey, who was drafted by the Sparks with the 19th overall pick in 2019, is now the first player in WNBA history to score 40-plus points against her former team."To do it in the WNBA is kind of like a dream come true, and to have teammates that support me, and just like looking for me everywhere, want me to do my best ― shoutout to them. And shoutout to Sandy (Brondello) for getting me in an offense where I can really thrive," Mabrey said.This article originally appeared on USA TODAY: Marina Mabrey’s 53-point night earned Angel Reese Rolls-Royce invite

title: ‘ప్రజాధనాన్ని ముట్టుకుంటే చేతులు కాలిపోతాయి’- ఐఏఎస్ వార్నింగ్
description: Krishnateja : అధికారులంటే కేవలం అక్రమాలు, అవినీతికి పాల్పడేవారే కాదు.. ప్రజల సొమ్మును కాపాడే నిజాయతీపరులు కూడా ఉంటారని ఆంధ్రప్రదేశ్ పంచాయతీరాజ్ కమిషనర్ కృష్ణతేజ ఐఏఎస్ మరోసారి...
content:
Krishnateja : అధికారులంటే కేవలం అక్రమాలు, అవినీతికి పాల్పడేవారే కాదు.. ప్రజల సొమ్మును కాపాడే నిజాయతీపరులు కూడా ఉంటారని ఆంధ్రప్రదేశ్ పంచాయతీరాజ్ కమిషనర్ కృష్ణతేజ ఐఏఎస్ మరోసారి నిరూపించారు. కాకినాడ జిల్లాలో తాజాగా వెలుగుచూసిన ఒక భారీ అవినీతి వ్యవహారంపై ఆయన తీవ్ర స్థాయిలో విరుచుకుపడ్డారు. జిల్లాలోని 61 గ్రామ పంచాయతీల్లో ఏకంగా ₹1.91 కోట్ల మేర ప్రజాధనం దుర్వినియోగం మరియు అక్రమాలు జరిగినట్లు తనిఖీల్లో తేలింది. ఈ నిధుల మళ్లింపు వ్యవహారంపై తీవ్ర ఆగ్రహం వ్యక్తం చేసిన కమిషనర్, బాధ్యులైన అధికారులకు నడిరోడ్డుపై గట్టి వార్నింగ్ ఇచ్చారు. అవినీతికి పాల్పడే వారి పట్ల శాఖాపరంగా ఎంత కఠినంగా ఉంటామో ఈ చర్యల ద్వారా స్పష్టం చేశారు.



Read Also : మొహర్రం శుభాకాంక్షలు తెలిపిన సీఎం చంద్రబాబు!











పన్నుల సొమ్ముపై నమ్మకం ద్రోహం.. ఉపేక్షించేది లేదు!



ఈ సందర్భంగా ఐఏఎస్ అధికారి కృష్ణతేజ మాట్లాడుతూ.. సామాన్య ప్రజలు ఎంతో నమ్మకంతో, కష్టపడి సంపాదించిన డబ్బును ప్రభుత్వానికి పన్నుల రూపంలో చెల్లిస్తున్నారని గుర్తుచేశారు. ఆ నమ్మకాన్ని కాపాడాల్సిన బాధ్యత క్షేత్రస్థాయి నుంచి ఉన్నతాధికారుల వరకు ప్రతి ఒక్కరిపై ఉందన్నారు. “ప్రజాధనాన్ని ముట్టుకుంటే చేతులు కాలిపోతాయి” అంటూ అవినీతి అధికారుల గుండెల్లో రైళ్లు పరిగెత్తించేలా హెచ్చరించారు. ప్రజల సొమ్మును స్వార్థ ప్రయోజనాల కోసం దుర్వినియోగం చేస్తే ఎట్టి పరిస్థితుల్లోనూ ఉపేక్షించబోనని, బాధ్యులపై కఠిన చట్టపరమైన చర్యలు ఉంటాయని తేల్చి చెప్పారు. కృష్ణతేజ తీసుకున్న ఈ నిర్ణయం మరియు ఇచ్చిన వార్నింగ్ ప్రస్తుతం ఏపీ వ్యాప్తంగా ప్రభుత్వ వర్గాల్లో హాట్ టాపిక్‌గా మారింది.

title: Friday morning Rangers things
description: Texas Rangers update for Friday, June 26.
content: Good morning, LSB.The Rangers held on for a win against the Blue Jays yesterday.Shawn McFarland says the sluggers gave the pitchers just enough breathing room, for once.Kennedi Landry writes about Joc Pederson’s 11-pitch at-bat which ended in the first of 3 Rangers homers.Corey Seager returned to action after recovering from a concussion.Evan Carter, meanwhile, is still working his way back from a strained oblique.Elsewhere MLB Pipeline has another mock draft.Evan Grant’s weekly Rangers stock report continues its troubling pattern.And Kevin Sherrington says don’t expect Ray Davis to loosen the purse strings any time soon with a labor dispute on the horizon.That’s all for this morning. The Rangers play the Blue Jays again tonight at 6:07 with Nathan Eovaldi on the mound for Texas.Happy Friday!

title: Shreyas Iyer Breaks Rohit Sharma's Record On T20I Captaincy Debut For India
description: Shreyas Iyer created history and broke a record previously held by Rohit Sharma. Iyer made his T20I captaincy debut against Ireland in Belfast.
content: Shreyas Iyer made his T20I captaincy debut in the first game of the two-match series against Ireland on Friday (Jun 26). The right-handed batter created history and broke an elite record previously held by Rohit Sharma. Iyer has become the Indian to make his T20I captaincy debut after leading in most T20s. He played 114 matches as the captain in T20s at different levels before making his debut as the India captain. He has captained Kolkata Knight Riders, Punjab Kings, Delhi Capitals and Mumbai in T20s.Rohit sits in the second position. He played 80 matches as the captain of Mumbai Indians (MI) before making his India captaincy debut in 2017. Rohit has never captained any other team in T20s.Virat Kohli sits in the third position. He captained Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) in 72 matches before being named India's full-time T20I captain. Interestingly, Kohli never got to lead India before 2017 despite making his ODI captaincy debut in 2013. KL Rahul (42) and Rishabh Pant (30) sit in the fourth and fifth spots, respectively.Shreyas Iyer's captaincy career      Shreyas Iyer kicked off his IPL captaincy career with Delhi Capitals (DC) in 2018 after replacing Gautam Gambhir in the middle of the season. In 2019, he captained DC to the second round for the first time since 2012. In 2020, Iyer-led DC played their first-ever final, where they lost to MI.He returned to captaincy in 2022 with Kolkata Knight Riders (KKR). In 2024, KKR ended their 10-year-long title drought by winning the trophy. In 2025, Punjab Kings (PBKS) qualified for their first final since 2014. They lost to Royal Challengers Bengaluru in the final.The selectors rewarded Iyer for his brilliant IPL run and appointed him the India captain. They sacked Suryakumar Yadav and dropped him from the squad despite him leading India to a title win in the 2026 T20 World Cup. Tilak Varma was appointed the new T20I vice-captain.

title: Why did Vaibhav Sooryavanshi not make his debut for India in 1st T20I against Ireland?
description: Against the expectations of fans, 15-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi did not get a spot in the playing XI for the 1st T20I against Ireland.
content: The new season is underway with the 1st T20I between India and Ireland. The match was expected to go down in history, as speculations about 15-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi making his debut were rife ahead of the game. However, the teenage sensation would have to wait a little longer to make his first impression on the international circuit, as he did not find a spot in the playing XI of the match.Ireland vs India Live Streaming: How to watch the 1st T20I in India, USA, UK, Australia, Afghanistan and IrelandWhy did Vaibhav Sooryavanshi not make his debut in the 1st T20I vs Ireland?The new captain of India's T20 team, Shreyas Iyer, revealed at the toss that Sooryavanshi is not a part of the team for today's game. Iyer acknowledged the talent of Sooryavanshi but preferred to go with a balanced XI."We have tremendous experience at the top. He will get his opportunity in due course. For now, we're going with three genuine seamers and one all-rounder," Iyer said at the toss.India's playing XI: India's playing XI: Samson, Abhishek, Kishan, Iyer (C), Tilak, Dube, Axar, Sundar, Rana, Arshdeep and Prasidh.India opt to bowlLuck favoured India's new captain, Shreyas Iyer, at the toss, and he opted to bowl first. The visitors started on a brilliant note, putting Ireland in a troublesome position at 51/4 inside eight overs. However, the wicketkeeper batter Lorcan Tucker got things going for Ireland. He registered a solid fifty with the help of five boundaries and a couple of sixes.Tucker's innings brought positivity to Ireland's side as they are on the cusp of posting a challenging total on the board. As per the recent update, Gareth Delany (37* off 24) and George Dockrell (19 off 9) are currently in the middle, and Ireland are 164/5 after 17 overs, heading toward the 200 mark.

title: Love, Murder, Cover-Up: Odisha Woman, Alleged Lover Arrested for Husband's Murder
description: In Jharsuguda, Odisha, a woman and her male accomplice have been arrested for the murder of her husband, Shaktidhar Sahu, following a violent altercation.
content: A shocking murder case has emerged from Odisha’s Jharsuguda district, drawing attention amid several high-profile relationship-related crime cases reported across the country.Police have arrested a woman and her alleged male friend for the murder of her husband in the Rengali police station area of Jharsuguda. Investigators say the duo allegedly killed the man and later dumped his body in a field in an attempt to conceal the crime.The incident took place in Tunguripada village under Sagarpali. The deceased has been identified as Shaktidhar Sahu, a 38-year-old man originally from Angul district. According to police, on the night of June 23, a heated argument broke out between Shaktidhar, his partner Gita Mirdha, and her male friend Tikinu Kisan. The dispute reportedly escalated due to ongoing family tensions and frequent conflicts.During the altercation, Tikinu allegedly pushed Shaktidhar to the ground and restrained him. Police claim that Gita then attacked Shaktidhar multiple times on the head using a wooden cot leg. He sustained severe injuries and died on the spot. To cover up the crime, the accused allegedly transported the body and dumped it in a waterlogged pit in nearby agricultural land, hoping to mislead investigators.The next day, local residents discovered the body and alerted police. A forensic team and dog squad were deployed to the scene. Investigators collected blood-stained evidence and other crucial clues. Acting on technical evidence, local intelligence, and interrogation findings, police detained Gita and Tikinu. During questioning, their alleged involvement in the crime came to light. Blood-stained clothes and the suspected murder weapon were also recovered.Both the accused were produced before the Lakhanpur JMFC Court on Thursday. A case has been registered against them under Sections 103(1), 238(a), and 3(5) of the Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita (BNS). Police officials from the Rengali Police Station stated that further investigation into the case is currently underway.Remarkably, police solved the case within six hours of registering it. Both accused have been produced before court, and further investigation is underway to determine the exact motive behind the murder.

title: शनि प्रदोष व्रत 2026: पूजा के दौरान इन भूलों से रहें दूर, तभी मिलेगा भगवान शिव और शनिदेव का आशीर्वाद
description: Shani Pradosh Vrat Puja Rules:शनि प्रदोष व्रत 2026 के दिन भगवान शिव और शनिदेव की पूजा का विशेष महत्व माना जाता है। जानिए किन बातों का ध्यान रखने से व्रत और पूजा का पूर्ण फल प्राप्त हो सकता है।
content:
Shani Pradosh Vrat 2026: 27 जून को ज्येष्ठ मास का अंतिम प्रदोष व्रत रखा जाएगा। प्रदोष व्रत भगवान शिव को समर्पित होता है और यह हर महीने कृष्ण पक्ष एवं शुक्ल पक्ष की त्रयोदशी तिथि पर किया जाता है। जब प्रदोष व्रत शनिवार के दिन पड़ता है, तो उसे शनि प्रदोष व्रत कहा जाता है। धार्मिक मान्यताओं के अनुसार, इस दिन श्रद्धा और विधि-विधान से व्रत एवं पूजा करने पर भगवान शिव के साथ-साथ शनिदेव की भी विशेष कृपा प्राप्त होती है।
विशेष रूप से जिन लोगों पर शनि की साढ़ेसाती या ढैय्या चल रही हो, उनके लिए यह व्रत अत्यंत फलदायी माना जाता है।धार्मिक मान्यताओं के अनुसार, यदि पूजा या व्रत के दौरान कुछ बातों की अनदेखी कर दी जाए, तो व्रत का शुभ प्रभाव कम हो सकता है। इसलिए इस दिन कुछ जरूरी नियमों का विशेष ध्यान रखना चाहिए।
शनि प्रदोष व्रत में इन बातों का रखें विशेष ध्यान:


शिवलिंग पर भूलकर भी न चढ़ाएं ये सामग्री


धार्मिक मान्यताओं के अनुसार, भगवान शिव की पूजा में शिवलिंग पर हल्दी, सिंदूर, कुमकुम और केतकी का फूल अर्पित नहीं करना चाहिए। शास्त्रों में इन वस्तुओं को शिव पूजा के लिए वर्जित माना गया है। पूजा में केवल वही सामग्री अर्पित करें, जो भगवान शिव को प्रिय मानी गई है।


सात्विक भोजन का ही करें सेवन


शनि प्रदोष व्रत के दिन घर में यथासंभव सात्विक वातावरण बनाए रखें। इस दिन प्याज, लहसुन, मांसाहार और शराब जैसी तामसिक चीजों से दूरी बनाकर रखें। यदि परिवार का कोई सदस्य व्रत रख रहा हो, तो अन्य सदस्य भी संभव हो तो सात्विक भोजन करें।
यह भी पढ़ें-  Jyeshtha Purnima: ज्येष्ठ पूर्णिमा की रात करें ये दीपक उपाय, घर में बढ़ सकती है सुख-समृद्धि और धन की आवक


 गुस्से और कटु वचन से बचें


भगवान शिव को करुणा और शांति का प्रतीक माना जाता है, जबकि शनिदेव कर्मों के अनुसार फल देने वाले देवता हैं। ऐसे में इस दिन किसी का अपमान न करें, क्रोध से बचें और किसी भी प्रकार के झगड़े, बहस या कटु शब्दों का प्रयोग करने से परहेज करें। मधुर व्यवहार और संयम का पालन करना शुभ माना जाता है।


व्रत के नियमों का ईमानदारी से पालन करें


यदि आपने शनि प्रदोष व्रत का संकल्प लिया है, तो पूरे दिन व्रत के नियमों का पालन करें। परंपरा के अनुसार इस दिन अनाज का सेवन नहीं किया जाता। फलाहार या सेंधा नमक से बने व्रत के खाद्य पदार्थों का सेवन करना उचित माना जाता है।


बेलपत्र चढ़ाते समय रखें यह सावधानी


भगवान शिव की पूजा में बेलपत्र का विशेष महत्व है। पूजा के लिए हमेशा ताजा, साफ और अखंडित बेलपत्र का ही उपयोग करें। फटा हुआ, सूखा या खंडित बेलपत्र शिवलिंग पर अर्पित नहीं करना चाहिए। ऐसी मान्यता है कि श्रद्धा और शुद्ध भाव से अर्पित किया गया बेलपत्र भगवान शिव को अत्यंत प्रिय होता है।

title: Indiramma sarees | ఇందిరమ్మ చీరల పంపిణీతో మహిళలను మోసం చేస్తున్న కాంగ్రెస్
description: Indiramma sarees | కాంగ్రెస్  ప్రభుత్వం ఎన్నికల సమయంలో మహిళలకు ఇచ్చిన ఆరు గ్యారెంటీలు, ఇతర హామీలను వెంటనే అమలు చేయాలని శేరిలింగంపల్లి నియోజకవర్గం బీఆర్ఎస్ సీనియర్ నాయకురాలు, మాజీ కార్పొరేటర్ బొబ్బా నవత రెడ్డి డిమాండ్‌ చేశారు.
content:
కొండాపూర్ : కాంగ్రెస్ ( Congress ) ప్రభుత్వం ఎన్నికల సమయంలో మహిళలకు ఇచ్చిన ఆరు గ్యారెంటీలు, ఇతర హామీలను వెంటనే అమలు చేయాలని శేరిలింగంపల్లి నియోజకవర్గం బీఆర్ఎస్ సీనియర్ నాయకురాలు, మాజీ కార్పొరేటర్ బొబ్బా నవత రెడ్డి ( Navata Reddy ) డిమాండ్‌ చేశారు. ఇందిరా మహిళా శక్తి పథకం కింద పంపిణీ చేస్తున్న రూ.300 చీరలతో మహిళల ( Indiramma sarees ) ఆత్మగౌరవాన్ని దెబ్బతీస్తున్నారని తీవ్ర ఆగ్రహం వ్యక్తం చేశారు.
శుక్రవారం ఆమె విలేకరుల సమావేశంలో మాట్లాడుతూ మహాలక్ష్మి పథకంలో భాగంగా అత్తకు రూ.4,000, కోడలికి రూ.2,500 ఆర్థిక సాయం, ఇందిరమ్మ ఇళ్లు, పెళ్లి కానుకగా తులం బంగారం, విద్యార్థినులకు ఉచిత స్కూటీలు, పెరిగిన పెన్షన్ల ఎన్నికల హామీలు ఇప్పటికీ అమలు కాలేదని విమర్శించారు. మహిళలను కోటీశ్వరులను చేస్తామని చెప్పిన ప్రభుత్వం హామీలను విస్మరించి కేవలం ఇందిరమ్మ చీరల పంపిణీతో మభ్యపెట్టేందుకు చూస్తుందన్నారు.
మియాపూర్ సర్కిల్ పరిధి చందానగర్ డివిజన్ కైలాష్ నగర్ కాలనీలో మహిళా భవన నిర్మాణం కోసం కేటాయించిన సుమారు 4 వేల గజాల ప్రభుత్వ భూమిని విద్యుత్ శాఖ ఆక్రమించిందని నవతరెడ్డి ఆరోపించారు. విద్యుత్ శాఖ భూమి ఆక్రమణపై స్థానిక ఎమ్మెల్యే సమాధానం చెప్పాలని డిమాండ్ చేశారు.

title: चीन के नवाचार में छिपे वैश्विक अवसर
description:
2026 का ग्रीष्मकालीन दावोस फोरम चीन के ल्याओनिंग प्रांत के ताल्येन शहर में संपन्न हुआ। इसमें दुनिया के 90 से अधिक देशों और क्षेत्रों के 1,700 से ज्यादा प्रतिनिधियों ने हिस्सा लिया। फोरम का मुख्य विषय “अभूतपूर्व नवाचार” रहा। इसी थीम के तहत चीन ने दुनिया को यह संदेश दिया कि वह “चीन के अभूतपूर्व.
The post चीन के नवाचार में छिपे वैश्विक अवसर appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.
content:
2026 का ग्रीष्मकालीन दावोस फोरम चीन के ल्याओनिंग प्रांत के ताल्येन शहर में संपन्न हुआ। इसमें दुनिया के 90 से अधिक देशों और क्षेत्रों के 1,700 से ज्यादा प्रतिनिधियों ने हिस्सा लिया। फोरम का मुख्य विषय “अभूतपूर्व नवाचार” रहा। इसी थीम के तहत चीन ने दुनिया को यह संदेश दिया कि वह “चीन के अभूतपूर्व अवसर 2.0″ को साझा कर रहा है। यह ऐसा मंच है, जो पहले से कहीं अधिक तेज़ गति वाले नवाचार को बढ़ावा देता है।
इस समय वैश्विक आर्थिक विकास धीमा है और भू-राजनीतिक हालात भी जटिल बने हुए हैं। ऐसे में विकास के नए इंजन तलाशना सभी देशों के सामने समान चुनौती है। फोरम में कृत्रिम बुद्धिमत्ता, नई ऊर्जा और जैव-चिकित्सा जैसे अत्याधुनिक क्षेत्रों पर विशेष ध्यान दिया गया। साथ ही, नई प्रौद्योगिकियों के व्यापक इस्तेमाल के ज़रिए वैश्विक विकास को नई गति देने के रास्तों पर चर्चा हुई। अभूतपूर्व नवाचार के क्षेत्र में चीन के प्रयासों को अंतरराष्ट्रीय स्तर पर व्यापक मान्यता मिली है। चीन के पास मजबूत औद्योगिक प्रणाली, विशाल बाज़ार और जीवंत नवाचार पारिस्थितिकी तंत्र जैसे स्वाभाविक लाभ हैं। 2025 में चीन पहली बार वैश्विक नवाचार सूचकांक के शीर्ष 10 देशों में शामिल हुआ। 
वहीं, दुनिया के शीर्ष 100 नवाचार समूहों की संख्या के मामले में चीन लगातार तीसरे वर्ष पहले स्थान पर रहा। विश्व आर्थिक मंच की “एआई एप्लीकेशन स्टार्स” सूची में आधे से अधिक उदाहरण चीन से हैं। नई ऊर्जा से चलने वाले वाहन और स्मार्ट उत्पादन लाइनों वाले कारखाने इस व्यापक नवाचार के जीवंत उदाहरण हैं। विदेशी व्यापार जगत के अधिकारियों का भी कहना है कि चीन की “जितना अधिक उपयोग, उतनी तेज़ प्रगति” वाली क्षमता नवाचार को प्रयोगशाला से बाज़ार तक पहुंचाने के लिए उपजाऊ ज़मीन उपलब्ध कराती है।
चीन की नवाचार संबंधी प्रगति को लेकर पश्चिम के कुछ लोगों ने “चीन शॉक” की धारणा को बढ़ा-चढ़ाकर पेश किया है, लेकिन तथ्य इससे अलग तस्वीर दिखाते हैं। दुनिया भर की कंपनियों के लिए चीन आज ठोस नवाचार अवसरों का केंद्र बन चुका है। अधिक से अधिक बहुराष्ट्रीय कंपनियां “चीन में उत्पादन” से आगे बढ़कर “चीन में सृजन” की दिशा में काम कर रही हैं। कई कंपनियों ने चीन में अपने नवाचार निवेश को बढ़ाने की भी स्पष्ट इच्छा जताई है। इस वर्ष के पहले पांच महीनों में लगभग 4,000 विदेशी निवेश वाली कंपनियों ने चीन में अपना निवेश बढ़ाया। 
वहीं, हाल ही में जारी “विदेशी निवेश के उपयोग को स्थिर और बेहतर बनाने की कार्य योजना” ने विदेशी निवेशकों का भरोसा और मजबूत किया है। वैश्विक विकास के लिए चीन की समावेशी और साझा नवाचार उपलब्धियां नए अवसर लेकर आई हैं। चीन से पवन ऊर्जा, सौर ऊर्जा और नई ऊर्जा वाहनों का निर्यात कई देशों को हरित बदलाव की दिशा में आगे बढ़ने में मदद कर रहा है। ओपन-सोर्स एआई मॉडलों के वैश्विक संचयी डाउनलोड 10 अरब से अधिक हो चुके हैं। साथ ही, थियानकोंग अंतरिक्ष स्टेशन और बड़े वैज्ञानिक अनुसंधान केंद्र दुनिया के लिए खुले हैं, जिससे विकासशील देशों को अत्याधुनिक तकनीकों तक पहुंच और उनका उपयोग करने का अवसर मिल रहा है।
वैश्विक अर्थव्यवस्था जितनी अधिक अस्थिर होती जा रही है, सहयोग को बढ़ावा देना और नवाचार संसाधनों को साझा करना उतना ही ज़रूरी होता जा रहा है। इस बार के दावोस फोरम ने यह स्पष्ट किया कि चीन का व्यापक नवाचार दुनिया के लिए किसी झटके का कारण नहीं, बल्कि साझा वैश्विक विकास के नए अवसरों का आधार है।
(साभार- चाइना मीडिया ग्रुप, पेइचिंग) 
The post चीन के नवाचार में छिपे वैश्विक अवसर appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.

title: സുദർശന് പിന്നാലെ സെഞ്ചുറിയുമായി ക്യാപ്റ്റൻ ജുറെലും; ശ്രീലങ്കക്കെതിരായ ഒന്നാം ടെസ്റ്റിൽ ഇന്ത്യ 'എ'യ്ക്ക് കൂറ്റൻ സ്കോർ
description: ഓപ്പണറും വിക്കറ്റ് കീപ്പറുമായ നിരോഷൻ ഡിക്‌വെല്ലയെ (10) അൻഷുൽ കംബോജും, പവന്ത വീരസിംഗെയെ (11) യാഷ് താക്കൂറും പുറത്താക്കിയതോടെ ലങ്ക 38 റൺസിന് 2 വിക്കറ്റ് എന്ന നിലയിൽ തകർന്നു.
content: <p><strong>ഗോള്‍:</strong> ക്യാപ്റ്റൻ ധ്രുവ് ജുറെലിന്‍റെയും ഓപ്പണർ സായ് സുദർശന്‍റെയും സെഞ്ചുറികളുടെ കരുത്തിൽ ശ്രീലങ്ക 'എ' ടീമിനെതിരായ ഒന്നാം അനൗദ്യോഗിക ടെസ്റ്റ് മത്സരത്തിൽ ഇന്ത്യ 'എ'യ്ക്ക് കൂറ്റൻ സ്കോർ. ഗോള്‍ അന്താരാഷ്ട്ര സ്റ്റേഡിയത്തിൽ നടക്കുന്ന മത്സരത്തിന്‍റെ രണ്ടാം ദിനം ഒന്നാം ഇന്നിംഗ്സിൽ 6 വിക്കറ്റ് നഷ്ടത്തിൽ 452 റൺസെന്ന നിലയിൽ ഇന്ത്യ ഡിക്ലയർ ചെയ്തു. മറുപടി ബാറ്റിംഗിനിറങ്ങിയ ശ്രീലങ്ക 'എ' രണ്ടാം ദിനം കളി നിർത്തുമ്പോൾ രണ്ട് വിക്കറ്റ് നഷ്ടത്തിൽ 113 റൺസ് എന്ന നിലയിലാണ്. ഇന്ത്യയുടെ സ്കോറിനേക്കാൾ 339 റൺസ് പിന്നിലാണ് നിലവിൽ ആതിഥേയർ.</p><p>തുടക്കത്തിൽ തന്നെ ലങ്കയ്ക്ക് കനത്ത പ്രഹരമേൽപ്പിക്കാൻ ഇന്ത്യൻ പേസർമാർക്ക് സാധിച്ചു. ഓപ്പണറും വിക്കറ്റ് കീപ്പറുമായ നിരോഷൻ ഡിക്‌വെല്ലയെ (10) അൻഷുൽ കംബോജും, പവന്ത വീരസിംഗെയെ (11) യാഷ് താക്കൂറും പുറത്താക്കിയതോടെ ലങ്ക 38 റൺസിന് 2 വിക്കറ്റ് എന്ന നിലയിൽ തകർന്നു. എന്നാൽ മൂന്നാം വിക്കറ്റിൽ ഒന്നിച്ച നുവാസിന്ദു ഫെർണാണ്ടോയുടെയും (65*), അഷെൻ ബണ്ഡാരയുടെയും (18*) പോരാട്ടമാണ് ലങ്കയെ കൂടുതൽ തകർച്ചയിൽ നിന്ന് രക്ഷിച്ചത്. ഇരുവരും ചേർന്ന് പിരിയാത്ത 75 റൺസ് കൂട്ടിച്ചേർത്തിട്ടുണ്ട്.</p><h2>മുന്നിൽ നിന്ന് നയിച്ച് ക്യാപ്റ്റൻ</h2><p>നേരത്തെ 68 റൺസുമായി രണ്ടാം ദിനം ക്രീസിലിറങ്ങിയ ജുറെൽ ലങ്കൻ ബോളർമാരെ അതിർത്തി കടത്തി കരിയറിലെ ആറാം ഫസ്റ്റ് ക്ലാസ് സെഞ്ചുറി പൂർത്തിയാക്കി. 215 പന്തിൽ 13 ഫോറും ഒരു സിക്സറുമടക്കം 141 റൺസോടെ ജുറെൽ പുറത്താകാതെ നിന്നു. ഒന്നാം ദിനം ജുറെലിനൊപ്പം ക്രീസിലുണ്ടായിരുന്ന ഷെയ്ക് റഷീദ് 63 റൺസെടുത്ത് പുറത്തായി. അഞ്ചാം വിക്കറ്റിൽ ജുറെൽ-റഷീദ് സഖ്യം 136 റൺസിന്‍റെ മികച്ച കൂട്ടുകെട്ടാണ് പടുത്തുയർത്തിയത്. ലങ്കൻ പേസർ ചാമിക ഗുണശേഖരയാണ് റഷീദിനെ പുറത്താക്കിയത്. പിന്നീട് ക്രീസിലെത്തിയ ഓൾറൗണ്ടർ ഹർഷ് ദുബെയും (30) ക്യാപ്റ്റന് മികച്ച പിന്തുണ നൽകി. ആറാം വിക്കറ്റിൽ ഇരുവരും 86 റൺസ് കൂട്ടിച്ചേർത്തു. ലങ്കയ്ക്കായി ചാമിക ഗുണശേഖര മൂന്ന് വിക്കറ്റുകൾ വീഴ്ത്തി.</p><p>മത്സരത്തിന്‍റെ ആദ്യ ദിനം ഓപ്പണർ സായ് സുദർശൻ നേടിയ തകർപ്പൻ സെഞ്ചുറിയാണ് (132 റൺസ്, 19 ഫോറുകൾ) ഇന്ത്യയ്ക്ക് കൂറ്റൻ സ്കോറിലേക്കുള്ള അടിത്തറയിട്ടത്. ടെസ്റ്റ് ടീമിലെ മൂന്നാം നമ്പറിലേക്ക് തന്‍റെ അവകാശവാദം ശക്തമാക്കുന്ന പ്രകടനമാണ് സുദർശൻ പുറത്തെടുത്തത്. എന്നാൽ മറ്റ് മുൻനിര താരങ്ങളായ ആയുഷ് പാണ്ഡെ (25), ദേവ്ദത്ത് പടിക്കൽ (12), റുതുരാജ് ഗെയ്ക്‌വാദ് (22) എന്നിവർക്ക് ലഭിച്ച തുടക്കം വലിയ സ്കോറുകളാക്കി മാറ്റാൻ കഴിഞ്ഞില്ല.</p><p><span><strong>ഏഷ്യാനെറ്റ് ന്യൂസ് ലൈവ് കാണാന്‍ ഇവിടെ ക്ലിക് ചെയ്യുക</strong></span></p>

title: डिंडौरी में जमीन घोटाला, हाईकोर्ट की रोक के बावजूद बेच डाली करोड़ों की पैतृक जमीन; पूर्व तहसीलदार पर FIR दर्ज
description: Land Scam In Dindori: डिंडौरी में जमीन घोटाला, हाईकोर्ट के स्टे के बावजूद बेची करोड़ों की पैतृक भूमि, कोर्ट के आदेश पर तत्कालीन तहसीलदार और पटवारी समेत 4 पर FIR दर्ज।
content:
Dindori Land Scam: मध्य प्रदेश के डिंडौरी जिले में करोड़ों रुपये की पैतृक जमीन से जुड़े कथित फर्जीवाड़े का मामला अब कानूनी कार्रवाई के दौर में पहुंच गया है। जिला न्यायालय के आदेश के बाद कोतवाली पुलिस ने तत्कालीन तहसीलदार, तत्कालीन पटवारी और पिता-पुत्र समेत चार लोगों के खिलाफ धोखाधड़ी सहित विभिन्न धाराओं में एफआईआर दर्ज कर जांच शुरू कर दी है। मामला उस जमीन से जुड़ा है, जिस पर वर्ष 2006 से हाईकोर्ट द्वारा विक्रय पर रोक लगी हुई थी।
हाईकोर्ट की रोक के बावजूद जमीन बेचने का आरोप
डिंडौरी नगर निवासी बबलू सोनपाली के अनुसार, स्वर्गीय बालमुकुंद सोनपाली की करोड़ों रुपये मूल्य की पैतृक जमीन को लेकर लंबे समय से विवाद चल रहा है। आरोप है कि एमपी हाईकोर्ट की रोक के बावजूद स्वर्गीय बालमुकुंद के पुत्र नंदलाल सोनपाली ने कथित रूप से फर्जी वसीयतनामा तैयार कराया और उसके आधार पर जमीन का नामांतरण करवा लिया। इसके बाद विवादित जमीन का करोड़ों रुपये में विक्रय भी कर दिया गया।
शिकायत के बाद कोर्ट पहुंचा मामला
इस पूरे मामले की शिकायत स्वर्गीय बालमुकुंद सोनपाली के नाती इंद्रपाल सोनपाली ने संबंधित अधिकारियों से की थी। आरोप है कि शिकायत के बावजूद प्रशासनिक स्तर पर कोई प्रभावी कार्रवाई नहीं हुई। इसके बाद उन्होंने जिला न्यायालय का दरवाजा खटखटाया। न्यायालय ने मामले की गंभीरता को देखते हुए पुलिस को एफआईआर दर्ज कर जांच करने के निर्देश दिए।
पूर्व तहसीलदार और पटवारी सहित चार आरोपी
जिला न्यायालय के आदेश के बाद डिंडौरी कोतवाली पुलिस ने तत्कालीन तहसीलदार गोविंदराम सलामे, तत्कालीन पटवारी हीरेंद्र सुर्याम, नंदलाल सोनपाली और उनके पुत्र रोहित सोनपाली के खिलाफ मामला दर्ज किया गया है। पुलिस अब दस्तावेजों और राजस्व अभिलेखों की गहन जांच कर रही है।
यह भी पढ़ें: इंदौर में 200 रुपये के नकली नोट बनाने वाले रैकेट का पर्दाफाश, तीन आरोपी गिरफ्तार; ऐसे हुआ मामले का खुलासा
दस्तावेजों की जांच में जुटी पुलिस
यह मामला डिंडौरी जिले में चर्चा का विषय बना हुआ है, क्योंकि इसमें करोड़ों रुपये की पैतृक संपत्ति और राजस्व रिकॉर्ड में कथित अनियमितताओं का आरोप है। पुलिस अधिकारियों का कहना है कि सभी संबंधित दस्तावेजों की जांच की जा रही है और जांच के आधार पर आगे की कानूनी कार्रवाई की जाएगी। यदि आरोप सही पाए जाते हैं, तो मामले में शामिल अन्य लोगों की भूमिका की भी जांच की जा सकती है।

title: NSE Chief asks startups, MSMEs to consider Stock Market listing for long-term growth - DETAILS
description: NSE CEO Ashish Chauhan urged businesses to prioritise profitability, innovation and long-term growth over short-term share price movements, saying strong business fundamentals ultimately drive market valuation and investor confidence.
content: National Stock Exchange (NSE) Managing Director and CEO Ashish Chauhan has urged companies to focus on strengthening their businesses, improving profitability and creating sustainable long-term value instead of becoming overly concerned about day-to-day movements in their share prices.Speaking at the 9th JITO Incubation & Innovation Foundation (JIIF) Day event on Friday, Chauhan said a company's market valuation should naturally reflect the strength of its business and financial performance.He advised entrepreneurs to concentrate on expanding their businesses and delivering greater value to shareholders through strong fundamentals rather than trying to influence stock prices."If the company's profits grow, its share price will eventually follow. It is not possible to keep increasing market value without genuine business growth," Chauhan said.He also encouraged founders to remain committed to their business goals instead of getting distracted by market sentiment or comparisons with competitors. According to him, companies that consistently deliver growth and strong financial performance ultimately earn recognition from investors.Highlighting the advantages of public markets, Chauhan said listed companies often enjoy valuations that private businesses cannot easily achieve. He explained that a company earning an annual profit of around Rs 2 crore could potentially command a market capitalisation of Rs 40 crore to Rs 50 crore after listing, giving promoters greater flexibility to raise funds, attract strategic partners and expand operations.Chauhan further said that being listed provides companies with an additional strategic advantage, as their shares can be used as a currency for acquisitions, partnerships and employee compensation through stock options. He cited Infosys founders N.R. Narayana Murthy and Nandan Nilekani, who introduced employee stock ownership plans (ESOPs) in the company's early years to attract talented professionals despite limited financial resources.Speaking about entrepreneurship, Chauhan stressed that innovation is not limited to breakthrough technologies. Even small improvements in products, services or business processes can drive meaningful innovation."Whatever you do, if you do it differently and better, that is also innovation," he said.He acknowledged that building a successful business requires patience and perseverance, with many entrepreneurs spending years overcoming challenges before achieving meaningful success.On the topic of stock market listings, Chauhan said the listing process is often perceived as more difficult than it actually is. However, he emphasised that companies must remain committed to good governance, regulatory compliance and transparency after entering the public markets.Concluding his address, Chauhan said capital markets provide businesses with significant opportunities to raise funds and accelerate growth, but long-term success depends on maintaining financial discipline and consistently creating value for shareholders.

title: Dubai Sounds Missile Alert, Then Tells Public To 'Disregard' Warning
description: Dubai briefly sounded an incoming missile alert on Friday, before issuing an all-clear within minutes.
content: Authorities in the United Arab Emirates on Friday sounded an incoming missile alert for Dubai, reported Associated Press. It wasn't immediately clear what sparked the warning just after 5:15 p.m. local time. A few minutes later, authorities sounded an all clear, without elaborating.The authorities on Friday sounded an incoming missile alert for Dubai, the report said. The brief text message from the UAE’s Interior Ministry was the first of its kind during the Iran war and startled many in Dubai. Shortly, the public was told to "disregard the previous warning." Whether the alert was triggered by mistake is yet to be known.A short time after the alert, the Emiratis said there was a telephone call between Foreign Minister Sheikh Abdullah bin Zayed Al Nahyan and Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi. It quoted Sheikh Abdullah as telling Araghchi that the UAE "emphasized the importance of full commitment" to the interim deal between Iran and the United States."Serious diplomacy and responsible dialogue are the optimal path for addressing all regional and international crises," it said.This comes at a time when Iran is suspected of launching a drone attack against a tanker off the coast of Oman even with the current interim deal between the US and Iran in place. A vessel had been hit by a projectile in the strait on Thursday, with US media outlets reporting that Iran had fired at a container ship. However, Taiwanese shipping operator Evergreen Marine said Friday one of its container ships was hit by an "unidentified object" in the Strait of Hormuz. The crew, vessel and cargo were "unharmed", it said.Earlier today, Iran once again reasserted its right to control shipping in the strategic Strait of Hormuz. Tehran also warned Gulf states against siding with the US. Kazem Gharibabadi, Iran's deputy foreign minister, said in a post on X that safe passage through the Strait of Hormuz cannot be guaranteed for vessels transiting "with ambiguous arrangements, parallel routes, or decision-making outside of Iran’s considerations as the coastal state.""Any credible framework must be based on coordination with Iran and the provisions of paragraph five of the Islamabad Memorandum of Understanding," he said, adding, "Otherwise, the outcome will be the suspension of the designated parallel route."His remarks came in response to the joint statement released by the US and six Gulf states, the Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC). They rejected Iran's insistence that it could charge tolls on vessels transiting the strait and called for "free, unconditional, and unrestricted navigation". US Secretary of State Marco Rubio said that if Iran threatened or blocked ships in the strait, "we're going to have a problem," as he wrapped up his Gulf tour.

title: Nashik News : नाशिकमध्ये २८ जूनला ‘मिशन ग्रीन मान्सून’ अभियानाचा शुभारंभ
description: नाशिक । जिमाका वृत्तसेवा Nashik प्रशासन, स्थानिक स्वराज्य संस्था, स्वयंसेवी संस्था, उद्योग, शैक्षणिक संस्था आणि नागरिक यांच्या सक्रिय लोकसहभागातून हरित नाशिक साकारण्याचा संकल्प करण्यात आला असून, या अभियानाचा शुभारंभ २८ जून रोजी कुंभमेळा मंत्री गिरीश महाजन यांच्या उपस्थितीत होणार आहे. या अभियानात प्रत्येक नाशिककराने सक्रिय सहभाग नोंदवावा, असे आवाहन जिल्हाधिकारी आयुष प्रसाद यांनी केले आहे. […]
content:
नाशिक । जिमाका वृत्तसेवा Nashik



प्रशासन, स्थानिक स्वराज्य संस्था, स्वयंसेवी संस्था, उद्योग, शैक्षणिक संस्था आणि नागरिक यांच्या सक्रिय लोकसहभागातून हरित नाशिक साकारण्याचा संकल्प करण्यात आला असून, या अभियानाचा शुभारंभ २८ जून रोजी कुंभमेळा मंत्री गिरीश महाजन यांच्या उपस्थितीत होणार आहे. या अभियानात प्रत्येक नाशिककराने सक्रिय सहभाग नोंदवावा, असे आवाहन जिल्हाधिकारी आयुष प्रसाद यांनी केले आहे.



जिल्हाधिकारी कार्यालयातील नियेाजन सभागृहात ‘मिशन ग्रीन मान्सून’ अभियानाच्या नियोजनासाठी आयोजित जिल्हास्तरीय समन्वय बैठकीत ते बोलत होते. यावेळी उपजिल्हाधिकारी सीमा आहिरे, उपवनसंरक्षक सिद्धेश सावर्डेकर, मंत्री गिरीश महाजन यांचे विशेष कार्य अधिकारी संदीप जाधव, वनाधिकारी रणदिवे, मनपा उद्यान निरीक्षक विवेक भदाने, वृक्षमित्र शेखर गायकवाड, चंदू पाटील,जगबिर सिंग,मनोज साठे,वैभव देशमुख,मनीष बाविस्कर,भारती जाधव,राम खुर्दळ,भारत पिंगळे,शिवाजी धोंडगे,सागर बैरागी,गौरव देशमुख, सोनल दगडे यांच्यासह शहरातील पर्यावरण प्रेमी उपस्थित होते.



जिल्हाधिकारी प्रसाद म्हणाले की, सातपूर एमआयडीसी परिसरात असलेल्या देवराई ( फाशीचा डोंगर) या ठिकाणी वृक्षमित्र शेखर गायकवाड यांच्या माध्यमातून झाडांची लागवड करण्यात आली आहे, आजही या परिसरात वृक्ष लागवडीचे काम सुरू आहे. 28 जून 2026 रोजी कुंभमेळा मंत्री गिरीश महाजन यांच्या उपस्थितीत मिशन ग्रीन मान्सून अंतर्गत देखील दोन हजार झाडांचे रोपण या ठिकाणी करण्यात येणार आहे. त्यासोबतच शिंदे ग्रामपंचायतचे सरपंच बाजीराव जाधव यांनी देखील दोन हजार वृक्ष लागवडीचा संकल्प केला असून 28 जून रोजी ग्रामपंचायत परिसरात दोन हजार वृक्ष लागवड करण्यात येणार आहे. तसेच शहरातील विविध ठिकाणावरून वृक्ष लागवडीसाठी अनेक नागरिकांनी मागणी केलेली आहे, या जागेवर देखील महानगरपिालका प्रशासनामार्फत रोपे पुरवण्यात येणार आहे. अशाप्रकारे सुमारे पाच ते सहा हजार वृक्ष लागवडीचे उद्दिष्ट येत्या रविवारी सुरू होणाऱ्या मिशन ग्रीन मान्सून च्या माध्यमातून ठेवण्यात आले असल्याचे त्यांनी सांगितले.



“महानगरपालिका व परिसरात सार्वजनिक ठिकाणी वृक्ष लागवडीसाठी योग्य जागा उपलब्ध असेल अशा परिसरातून नागरिकांनी देखील मागणी केली तर त्यांना झाडे उपलब्ध करून दिले जाणारआहेत. याकरिता सोबतचा QR कोड स्कॅन करून आपली मागणी नोंदवायची आहे. जागा सुयोग्य असल्यास प्रशासनामार्फत या ठिकाणी मोफत झाडे पुरवली जाणार आहेत, तरी या उपक्रमात नागरिकांनी मोठ्या प्रमाणावर सहभाग घेऊन हरित नाशिक चळवळीत सहभाग घ्यावा–कुंभमेळा मंत्री गिरीश महाजन

title: ୨-୧ ଗୋଲରେ ଜର୍ମାନୀକୁ ପରାସ୍ତ କଲା ଇକ୍ୱେଡର
description:
ଇଷ୍ଟ ରୋଦରଫୋଡ,୨୬ା୬: ଗୋଞ୍ଜାଲୋ ପ୍ଲାଟାଙ୍କ ଗୋଲ ବଳରେ ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ଖେଳାଯାଇଥିବା ଏକ ରୋମାଞ୍ଚକ ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ରେ ଇକ୍ୱେଡର ୨-୧ ଗୋଲରେ ଜର୍ମାନୀକୁ ପରାସ୍ତ କରିଛି। ଫିଫା ର଼୍ୟାଙ୍କିଙ୍ଗ୍‌ରେ ୨୩ତମ ସ୍ଥାନରେ ଥିବା ଇକ୍ୱେଡର ଲାଗି ଏହା ସର୍ବବୃହତ୍‌ ବିଜୟ। ଏହି ବିଜୟ ସହ ଇକ୍ୱେଡର ବିଶ୍ୱକପ୍‌ ଇତିହାସରେ ଦ୍ୱିତୀୟ ଥର ପାଇଁ ନକ୍‌ଆଉଟ୍‌ ରାଉଣ୍ଡରେ ସ୍ଥାନ ପକ୍କା କରିଛି। ପୂର୍ବରୁ ୨୦୦୬ ସଂସ୍କରଣରେ ଦଳ ରାଉଣ୍ଡ ଅଫ୍‌-୧୬ରୁ ବିଦାୟ ନେଇଥିଲା। ଷ୍ଟାଡିୟମରେ ୮୦,୬୬୩ ଦର୍ଶକଙ୍କ ଉପସ୍ଥିତିରେ ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ ଆରମ୍ଭ […]
The post ୨-୧ ଗୋଲରେ ଜର୍ମାନୀକୁ ପରାସ୍ତ କଲା ଇକ୍ୱେଡର appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ଇଷ୍ଟ ରୋଦରଫୋଡ,୨୬ା୬: ଗୋଞ୍ଜାଲୋ ପ୍ଲାଟାଙ୍କ ଗୋଲ ବଳରେ ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ଖେଳାଯାଇଥିବା ଏକ ରୋମାଞ୍ଚକ ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ରେ ଇକ୍ୱେଡର ୨-୧ ଗୋଲରେ ଜର୍ମାନୀକୁ ପରାସ୍ତ କରିଛି। ଫିଫା ର଼୍ୟାଙ୍କିଙ୍ଗ୍‌ରେ ୨୩ତମ ସ୍ଥାନରେ ଥିବା ଇକ୍ୱେଡର ଲାଗି ଏହା ସର୍ବବୃହତ୍‌ ବିଜୟ। ଏହି ବିଜୟ ସହ ଇକ୍ୱେଡର ବିଶ୍ୱକପ୍‌ ଇତିହାସରେ ଦ୍ୱିତୀୟ ଥର ପାଇଁ ନକ୍‌ଆଉଟ୍‌ ରାଉଣ୍ଡରେ ସ୍ଥାନ ପକ୍କା କରିଛି। ପୂର୍ବରୁ ୨୦୦୬ ସଂସ୍କରଣରେ ଦଳ ରାଉଣ୍ଡ ଅଫ୍‌-୧୬ରୁ ବିଦାୟ ନେଇଥିଲା।
ଷ୍ଟାଡିୟମରେ ୮୦,୬୬୩ ଦର୍ଶକଙ୍କ ଉପସ୍ଥିତିରେ ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ ଆରମ୍ଭ ହେବାର ଦୁଇ ମିନିଟ୍‌ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଗୋଲପୋଷ୍ଟ ସାମ୍ନାରେ ଫ୍ଲୋରିଆନ ଓ୍ବିର୍ଜଙ୍କଠାରୁ ପାଇଥିବା ପାସକୁ ଲେରୟ ସେନ ଗୋଲରେ ପରିଣତ କରିଥିଲେ। ଫଳରେ ଜର୍ମାନୀ ୧-୦ ଗୋଲର ଅଗ୍ରଣୀ ହାସଲ କରିଥିଲା। ଏହାର ୭ ମିନିଟ୍‌ ପରେ ଇକ୍ୱେଡର ପାଇଁ ନିଲସନ ଅଙ୍ଗୁଲୋ ବକ୍ସ ବାହାରୁ ଏକ ଚମତ୍କାର ଗୋଲ କରିଥିଲେ। ଫଳରେ ପ୍ରଥମାର୍ଦ୍ଧ ୧-୧ ଗୋଲରେ ବରାବର ଭାବେ ଶେଷ ହୋଇଥିଲା।
ଦ୍ୱିତୀୟାର୍ଦ୍ଧର ୭୭ତମ ମିନିଟ୍‌ରେ ଇକ୍ୱେଡରକୁ ମିଳିଥିବା ଏକ କର୍ନର କିକ୍‌ରୁ ପ୍ଲାଟା ଜର୍ମାନୀର ୪୦ ବର୍ଷୀୟ କିମ୍ବଦନ୍ତୀ ଗୋଲକିପର ମାନୁଏଲ ନେଉରଙ୍କ ସାମ୍ନାରୁ ଗୋଲ କରିଥିଲେ। ଏହି ପରାଜୟ ସହ ୪ ଥରର ଚାମ୍ପିୟନ ଜର୍ମାନୀର ଗତ ୧୧ ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ ଧରି ଚାଲି ଆସୁଥିବା ବିଜୟ ଧାରାରେ ବ୍ରେକ ଲାଗିଛି।
ଅନ୍ୟପକ୍ଷରେ ଗତ ୨୨ ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ରେ ମାତ୍ର ଥରେ ପରାଜିତ ହୋଇଥିବା ଇକ୍ୱେଡର ଗ୍ରୁପ୍‌-ଇ’ରେ ୪ ପଏଣ୍ଟ ସହ ତୃତୀୟ ସ୍ଥାନରେ ରହିଛି। ଏହି ଦଳ ମଙ୍ଗଳବାର ମେକ୍ସିକୋ ସିଟିରେ ରାଉଣ୍ଡ ଅଫ୍‌-୩୨ ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ରେ ମେକ୍ସିକୋକୁ ଭେଟିପାରେ।
The post ୨-୧ ଗୋଲରେ ଜର୍ମାନୀକୁ ପରାସ୍ତ କଲା ଇକ୍ୱେଡର appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: CBSE | సీబీఎస్‌ఈ విద్యార్థులకు ఊరట.. త్రిభాషా విధానంపై కీలక ప్రకటన చేసిన బోర్డు
description: CBSE : సీబీఎస్‌ఈ విద్యార్థులకు త్రిభాషా విధానాన్ని తప్పనిసరి చేస్తూ ఇటీవల కేంద్ర ప్రభుత్వం నిర్ణయం తీసుకున్న సంగతి తెలిసిందే. అయితే, ఈ విషయంలో తాజాగా మరో కీలక ప్రకటన చేసింది. 7-9 తరగతి విద్యార్థులు పదో తరగతి వరకు తమకు నచ్చిన విదేశీ భాషను చదువుకోవచ్చని తెలిపింది.
content:
CBSE : సీబీఎస్‌ఈ విద్యార్థులకు త్రిభాషా విధానాన్ని తప్పనిసరి చేస్తూ ఇటీవల కేంద్ర ప్రభుత్వం నిర్ణయం తీసుకున్న సంగతి తెలిసిందే. దీని ప్రకారం సీబీఎస్‌ఈ స్కూళ్లలో త్రిభాషా విధానాన్ని అమలు చేయాలి. అయితే, ఈ విషయంలో తాజాగా మరో కీలక ప్రకటన చేసింది. 7-9 తరగతి విద్యార్థులు పదో తరగతి వరకు తమకు నచ్చిన విదేశీ భాషను చదువుకోవచ్చని తెలిపింది. ఇప్పటికే అభ్యసిస్తున్న విదేశీ భాషలను రెండు సబ్జెక్టులుగా కొనసాగించవచ్చు. గతంలో అమలైన విధానం ప్రకారం విద్యార్థులు రెండు విదేశీ భాషలను ఎంచుకునే సౌకర్యం ఉండేది.
భారతీయ భాష తప్పనిసరి కాదు. దీంతో కొందరు విద్యార్థులు రెండూ విదేశీ భాషల్నే ఎంచుకున్నారు. ఇంకొందరు ఒక విదేశీ భాష, ఒక భారతీయ భాష చదువుకునే వారు. కానీ, సీబీఎస్‌ఈ బోర్డు కొత్తగా తెచ్చిన త్రిభాషా విధానం ప్రకారం ఏదైనా ఒక్క విదేశీ భాషను మాత్రమే ఎంచుకోవచ్చు. ఈ ఏడాది నుంచి త్రిభాషా విధానం అమలవుతోంది. దీన్ని ప్రస్తుతం తొమ్మిదో తరగతి విద్యార్థుల నుంచి అమలు చేయాలని గతంలో ఆదేశాలు జారీ చేసింది. అంటే, గత ఏడాది ఎనిమిదో తరగతి వరకు రెండు విదేశీ భాషలు చదువుకున్న వారు ఇప్పుడు తొమ్మిదో తరగతికి రాగానే ఒక విదేశీ భాషను మాత్రమే ఎంచుకోవాల్సి ఉంటుంది. మిగిలిన రెండు భారతీయ భాషలు చదవాలి. ఈ నిర్ణయం ప్రకారం గతంలో వారు చదివిన రెండు విదేశీ భాషల్లో ఒకటి వృథా అవుతుంది. ఈ నిర్ణయంపై విమర్శలు వ్యక్తమయ్యాయి. ఇంతకాలం తాము చదివిన రెండు భాషలకు అర్థం లేదని విద్యార్థులు, వారి తల్లిదండ్రులు విమర్శించారు.
మళ్లీ కొత్త భాష నేర్చుకోవడం ఇబ్బంది అని చెప్పారు. ఈ నేపథ్యంలో సీబీఎస్‌ఈ బోర్డు తాజా ఆదేశాలు జారీ చేసింది. ప్రస్తుతం 7-9 వరకు చదువుతున్న విద్యార్థుల్లో రెండు విదేశీ భాషలు చదువుకున్న వారు ఉంటే.. వారు పదో తరగతి వచ్చే వరకు కూడా ఇదే పద్ధతిలో రెండు విదేశీ భాషల్ని చదువుకోవచ్చు. ఒక భారతీయ భాషను ఎంచుకోవచ్చు. ఈ నిర్ణయం తీసుకోవడం వెనుక త్రిభాషా విధానంలో కేంద్రం వెనుకడుగు వేసిందా అనే సందేహాలు వ్యక్తమవుతున్నాయి. దీనిపై సీబీఎస్‌ఈ అధికారులు మాత్రం స్పష్టత ఇవ్వలేదు. సీబీఎస్‌ఈ బోర్డు తాజా నిర్ణయంతో లక్షలాది మంది విద్యార్థులకు మేలు జరగనుంది.

title: Newsom urges national 'billionaires' tax' while fighting one in California
NASA’s PACE Mission Studies Smoke, Fires
description: With the North American fire season underway, and a record number of acres already burned nationwide, NASA’s Plankton, Aerosol, Cloud, and ocean Ecosystem (PACE) satellite’s three instruments are observing vegetation precursors to fires, along with plumes of smoke and their movement. This data will help scientists piece together clues that deepen their understanding of wildfires. […]
content:
3 min read
NASA’s PACE Mission Studies Smoke, Fires



With the North American fire season underway, and a record number of acres already burned nationwide, NASA’s Plankton, Aerosol, Cloud, and ocean Ecosystem (PACE) satellite’s three instruments are observing vegetation precursors to fires, along with plumes of smoke and their movement. This data will help scientists piece together clues that deepen their understanding of wildfires.
“The challenge that we have is to take those clues and use them in a meaningful way, so our models of Earth properly represent what’s happening,” said Kirk Knobelspiesse, a remote sensing scientist working on the PACE mission at NASA’s Goddard Space Flight Center in Greenbelt, Maryland.




Wisps of smoke coming from fires in multiple provinces and territories in Canada travel over the Great Lakes. This image was taken by the Ocean Color Instrument aboard NASA’s PACE satellite on May 31, 2025.
NASA



While the satellite, which launched in February 2024, was designed to study Earth’s ocean and atmosphere, it has an unexpected capability: monitoring changes to vegetation. It can also tell us about burn scars, the charred area of land left behind after a wildfire. 
“The PACE satellite observes land too, and does it really well,” said Skye Caplan, terrestrial lead for the PACE mission at NASA Goddard. “There is so much to explore with a new hyperspectral data set.”
The Ocean Color Instrument on board PACE is a hyperspectral instrument, observing the planet in several hundred different wavelengths of visible, near infrared, and ultraviolet light. This breadth of the spectrum allows it to gather data on the health of plants, such as their state of stress, dryness, and their relative pigment balance, all of which assist in identifying high fire-risk areas. Land managers can use this data to distribute resources to help mitigate fire risk.
This instrument views the entire Earth daily, with more frequent coverage at high latitudes. With this frequency, on clear days, PACE scientists can quickly assess the aftermath of fires, determining the location and span of a burn scar. Areas that have been burned by wildfire often see increased flood and landslide risk. It’s important to identify these high-risk areas and monitor how they evolve through time, Caplan said.
Using wavelengths in the ultraviolet range, the Ocean Color Instrument can also monitor the smoke after a fire, along with information on how high in the atmosphere these particles drift — height plays a role in how far the particles travel and the systems they impact. The instrument, with its ultraviolet data, expands on fire observations from other satellite instruments, such as the Visible Infrared Imaging Radiometer Suite and the Moderate Resolution Imaging Spectroradiometer.




Thick smoke plumes coming from fires raging in multiple provinces and territories in Canada is visible in this image and affecting a large part of the north of the country. This image was taken by the Ocean Color Instrument aboard NASA’s PACE satellite on Aug. 11, 2024.
NASA



The other two instruments on PACE, the Hyper-Angle Rainbow Polarimeter 2 and the Spectro-polarimeter for Planetary Exploration one, are rich with information about the composition of aerosols from vastly different regions, said Andrew Sayer, PACE project science lead for atmospheres from the Ocean Color Instrument at NASA Goddard.
By measuring characteristics of light as it reflects off particles in the atmosphere, these two instruments can determine the quantity of these particles, along with their chemical properties, color, size, and shape. Scientists use this information to differentiate smoke from other particulates. Smoke particulates are typically light absorbing — appearing gray, black, or brown in color — and are small in size compared to other aerosols PACE views, such as pollutants and dust.
Data from PACE will help scientists create more accurate wildfire models and simulate future events, said Knobelspiesse, the satellite’s polarimeter lead. “We’ll be able to then look at different scenarios of emissions in the future and see how smoke that’s created in one location can impact other parts of the Earth system.”
By Erica McNamee
NASA’s Goddard Space Flight Center, Greenbelt, Md.

title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Best Football Games To Play On Mobile
description: The FIFA World Cup is currently thrilling fans, with stars like Ronaldo and Messi captivating audiences. For mobile gamers eager to join in on the excitement, several top football games are recommended.
content: The FIFA World Cup is running at its best pace this time with players like Ronaldo, Messi, Mbappe, and Haaland ruling the 22 yards. And if you are a football fan, then this rush can definitely make you feel like you want to play a match too at the comfort of your couch on your phone. If that's what you are looking for then here are the best football games that you can play on your mobile in order to elevate the fun. EA Sports FC MobileThis could be easily dubbed one of the best games that you can play on your phone. Whether you are looking for the most amazing players or the actual teams, this one has got it all, with access to official clubs, players, leagues, and the best part about it is the ultimate team mode, where you get to play online against other players and see how dominating you can be on the field. One of the best part is that EA FC Mobile is also hosting a World Cup event where you can get icons of the game from different countries like Brazil, France, Germany, and more.eFootball 2026If you are more into the core experience and want an almost player-card free experience, then you can go for eFootball 2026. This one focuses on tactical football and brings real world performance of the players to the matches. The ball physics in this one is commendable, and you can also have a cross-platform ecosystem. UFL MobileUFL Mobile could be dubbed the dark horse of football games and one of the strongest competitors against EA FC Mobile. This one brings a fair play environment without a lot of focus on packs and the majority of it on mechanics. The game offers high-quality graphics on that small screen as well. It also brings regular rosters and gameplay upgrades to maintain the excitement.

title: वेनेजुएला के बाद फिलीपींस में 6.5 तीव्रता का भूकंप, कुछ दिन पहले आए भूकंप में गई थी 80 लोगों की
description: Philippines Earthquake: फिलीपींस के मिंडानाओ क्षेत्र में 6.5 तीव्रता का भूकंप आया। USGS ने सुनामी की चेतावनी जारी नहीं की है। फिलहाल किसी जान-माल के नुकसान की सूचना नहीं मिली है।
content:
Philippines Earthquake: वेनेजुएला के बाद अब फिलीपींस में भी तेज भूकंप के झटके महसूस किए गए हैं। अमेरिकी भूवैज्ञानिक सर्वेक्षण (USGS) के अनुसार, देश के दक्षिणी हिस्से में आए इस भूकंप की तीव्रता 6.5 दर्ज की गई। राहत की बात यह है कि फिलहाल किसी बड़े नुकसान या जनहानि की सूचना नहीं मिली है।
USGS के मुताबिक, भूकंप स्थानीय समयानुसार शाम 7:42 बजे (11:42 GMT) आया। इसका केंद्र मिंडानाओ द्वीप पर स्थित जोस अबाड सैंटोस शहर से करीब 35 किलोमीटर दक्षिण-पश्चिम में समुद्र के भीतर था। भूकंप की गहराई 52.4 किलोमीटर दर्ज की गई। एजेंसी ने शुरुआती आकलन में इसकी तीव्रता 6.7 बताई थी, जिसे बाद में संशोधित कर 6.5 कर दिया गया।
सुनामी की चेतावनी नहीं
भूकंप के बाद USGS ने किसी भी प्रकार की सुनामी चेतावनी जारी नहीं की है। स्थानीय प्रशासन भी हालात पर लगातार नजर बनाए हुए है।
स्थानीय प्रशासन ने क्या कहा?
सांता मारिया शहर के बचाव अधिकारी जेरसन तलाहिग ने समाचार एजेंसी AFP से कहा कि अभी तक किसी व्यक्ति के हताहत होने या संपत्ति के नुकसान की कोई सूचना नहीं मिली है। उनके अनुसार, झटके काफी तेज महसूस हुए, लेकिन उनकी अवधि बहुत कम थी। उन्होंने बताया कि भूकंप के दौरान मेज और लाइटें हिलती हुई दिखाई दीं।
8 जून को आया था विनाशकारी भूकंप
फिलीपींस में इससे पहले 8 जून को भी मिंडानाओ के तट के पास 7.8 तीव्रता का शक्तिशाली भूकंप आया था। उस आपदा में 61 लोगों की मौत हुई थी, जबकि 1,403 लोग घायल हुए थे।
वेनेजुएला में मरने वालों की संख्या बढ़कर 235 हुई
उधर, वेनेजुएला में बुधवार शाम आए दो शक्तिशाली भूकंपों के बाद मृतकों का आंकड़ा लगातार बढ़ता जा रहा है। ताजा जानकारी के अनुसार, इस प्राकृतिक आपदा में अब तक 235 लोगों की मौत हो चुकी है। स्वास्थ्य मंत्रालय द्वारा जारी नए आंकड़ों में बताया गया कि पहले मृतकों की संख्या 32 थी, जो अब बढ़कर 235 हो गई है।
यह भी पढ़ें-  Hormuz Strait Iran Attack: ईरान के ड्रोन हमले के बाद होर्मुज में UN ने रोका रेस्क्यू अभियान
समाचार एजेंसी सिन्हुआ के मुताबिक, वेनेजुएला की कार्यवाहक राष्ट्रपति डेल्सी रोड्रिगेज ने देश के उत्तरी हिस्सों में आए इन भीषण भूकंपों के बाद राहत, बचाव और पुनर्निर्माण कार्यों में तेजी लाने के लिए तीन प्रमुख कदमों की घोषणा की है। सरकार प्रभावित इलाकों में राहत अभियान तेज करने और लोगों को हर संभव सहायता उपलब्ध कराने में जुटी हुई है।

title: ఖరీఫ్‌కు ఎరువుల కొరత లేదు..కేంద్ర మంత్రి కిషన్ రెడ్డి కీలక ప్రకటన
description: Kishan Reddy: ప్రపంచవ్యాప్తంగా నెలకొన్న భౌగోళిక రాజకీయ ఉద్రిక్తతలు, ఇంధన మార్కెట్లలో అస్థిరతలతో పాటు ప్రధాన దేశాల నుండి ఎగుమతులు తగ్గినప్పటికీ.. దేశీయంగా రైతులకు ఎరువుల కొరత...
content:
Kishan Reddy: ప్రపంచవ్యాప్తంగా నెలకొన్న భౌగోళిక రాజకీయ ఉద్రిక్తతలు, ఇంధన మార్కెట్లలో అస్థిరతలతో పాటు ప్రధాన దేశాల నుండి ఎగుమతులు తగ్గినప్పటికీ.. దేశీయంగా రైతులకు ఎరువుల కొరత రాకుండా కేంద్ర ప్రభుత్వం కట్టుబడి ఉందని కేంద్ర బొగ్గు, గనుల శాఖ మంత్రి జి. కిషన్ రెడ్డి తెలిపారు. ప్రధానమంత్రి నరేంద్ర మోదీ నాయకత్వంలో ప్రస్తుత ఖరీఫ్ సీజన్‌లో తెలంగాణ రాష్ట్రానికి అవసరమైన అన్ని రకాల ఎరువులను సమకూర్చేందుకు కేంద్రం పటిష్టమైన చర్యలు తీసుకుంటోందని ఆయన స్పష్టం చేశారు.







read also: Telangana Rains: నేటి నుండి తెలంగాణలో భారీ వర్షాలు..పలు జిల్లాలకు ఎల్లో, ఆరెంజ్ అలర్ట్ జారీ







దేశీయ ఉత్పత్తి పెంపు – నిరంతర పర్యవేక్షణ



ఎరువుల కొరతను అధిగమించేందుకు స్పాట్ మార్కెట్ల నుండి సహజ వాయువును సేకరించి, దేశీయంగా యూరియా లభ్యతను గణనీయంగా పెంచినట్లు మంత్రి వివరించారు. సకాలంలో దిగుమతులు చేసుకోవడం ద్వారా తెలంగాణతో సహా దేశవ్యాప్తంగా యూరియా, డీఏపీ (DAP), ఎన్‌పికే (NPK) ఎరువుల నిల్వలు పుష్కలంగా ఉన్నాయన్నారు. ప్రస్తుత ఖరీఫ్ 2026 సీజన్‌లో కూడా నిరంతర పర్యవేక్షణ ద్వారా నిల్వలను సమృద్ధిగా నిర్వహిస్తున్నామని, రైతులకు ఎలాంటి ఇబ్బందులు రానివ్వబోమని ప్రకటించారు.



Kishan Reddy: గత రబీ సీజన్ అంచనాలు – వాస్తవ సరఫరా



గత రబీ 2025-26 సీజన్‌లో అంచనా వేసిన అవసరాల కంటే ఎక్కువ ఎరువులను కేంద్రం సరఫరా చేసిందని మంత్రి గుర్తుచేశారు. 10.40 లక్షల మెట్రిక్ టన్నుల యూరియా ప్రాథమిక అవసరానికి గాను, భారత ప్రభుత్వం 12.01 LMT అందుబాటులోకి తీసుకువచ్చింది. 1.45 LMT DAP అవసరానికి గాను కేంద్రం 2.55 LMT సరఫరా చేయగా, 7.00 LMT NPK అవసరానికి గాను 9.47 LMT ఎరువులను అందుబాటులో ఉంచింది. రైతులు ఎటువంటి అంతరాయం లేకుండా, అంచనా వేసిన అవసరం కంటే ఎక్కువ సరఫరా చేసేందుకు కేంద్రం సిద్ధంగా ఉందని మంత్రి కిషన్ రెడ్డి ప్రకటించారు.



పూర్తి సామర్థ్యంతో రామగుండం ఆర్‌ఎఫ్‌సీఎల్ (RFCL)



గత రబీ సీజన్‌లో రామగుండం ఫెర్టిలైజర్స్, కెమికల్స్ లిమిటెడ్ (RFCL) ప్లాంట్‌లో తలెత్తిన సాంకేతిక సమస్యలను కేంద్ర ప్రభుత్వం పరిష్కరించిందని కిషన్ రెడ్డి వెల్లడించారు. ప్రస్తుతం ఈ ప్లాంట్ తన పూర్తి ఉత్పత్తి సామర్థ్యంతో నడుస్తోందని, దీనివల్ల తెలంగాణ రైతులకు ఎరువుల సరఫరా మరింత వేగంగా, సకాలంలో అందుతుందని ఆయన పేర్కొన్నారు.



పంపిణీ బాధ్యత రాష్ట్ర ప్రభుత్వానిదే!



కేంద్ర ప్రభుత్వం నుంచి ఎరువుల కేటాయింపులు సజావుగా జరుగుతున్నప్పటికీ, వాటిని క్షేత్రస్థాయిలో రైతులకు చేర్చాల్సిన అసలు బాధ్యత రాష్ట్ర ప్రభుత్వంపైనే ఉందని మంత్రి స్పష్టం చేశారు.





జిల్లాలవారీగా ఎరువులను సమానంగా, పారదర్శకంగా పంపిణీ చేయాలి.



సబ్సిడీపై ఇచ్చే ఎరువులను వ్యవసాయేతర అవసరాలకు మళ్లించకుండా గట్టి నిఘా పెట్టాలి.



అక్రమ నిల్వలు, బ్లాక్ మార్కెటింగ్‌కు పాల్పడే వారిపై ఉక్కుపాదం మోపి, ప్రతి నిజాయితీ గల రైతుకు సకాలంలో ఎరువులు అందేలా చూడాలి.

title: प्रयागराज में माफिया और गुर्गों पर फिर कसेगा शिकंजा, गैंगस्टर एक्ट की पुरानी फाइलें खोलेगा प्रशासन
description: Prayagraj Gangster Act: जिले में माफिया, उनके गुर्गों व सहयोगियों के खिलाफ कार्रवाई फिर तेज हो रही है। प्रशासन पुराने मामलों की समीक्षा कर अपराध से अर्जित चल-अचल संपत्तियों पर जब्ती की कार्रवाई करेंगे
content:
Prayagraj Gangster Act Cases: प्रयागराज जिले में माफिया, उसके गुर्गों और करीबी सहयोगियों के खिलाफ कार्रवाई एक बार फिर तेज होने जा रही है। पुलिस और प्रशासन ने गैंगस्टर एक्ट के तहत दर्ज पुराने मामलों की फाइलें दोबारा खोलने की तैयारी शुरू कर दी है। इसके तहत अपराध से अर्जित चल और अचल संपत्तियों का ब्योरा जुटाकर उन्हें जब्त करने की कार्रवाई की जाएगी। साथ ही सक्रिय गुर्गों पर भी कानूनी शिकंजा कसने की रणनीति बनाई गई है।
अवैध गतिविधियों से अर्जित संपत्ति होगी जब्त
जानकारी के अनुसार पुलिस और प्रशासन की संयुक्त टीम गैंगस्टर एक्ट के मामलों की समीक्षा करेगी। जिन अपराधियों ने अवैध गतिविधियों से संपत्ति अर्जित की है, उनकी विस्तृत रिपोर्ट तैयार की जाएगी। रिपोर्ट के आधार पर गैंगस्टर एक्ट के प्रावधानों के तहत संपत्तियों को जब्त करने की कार्रवाई आगे बढ़ाई जाएगी।
पुलिस का कहना है कि माफिया से जुड़े सक्रिय गुर्गों की गतिविधियों पर लगातार नजर रखी जा रही है। यदि कोई माफिया या उससे जुड़ा व्यक्ति सरकारी जमीन पर कब्जा करता पाया गया तो राजस्व विभाग की ओर से तत्काल मुकदमा दर्ज कराकर कब्जा हटाने की कार्रवाई भी की जाएगी।
यह भी पढ़ें- वायरल वीडियो के बाद इंस्पेक्टर पर गिरी गाज; बसई जगनेर थाना प्रभारी हटाए गए, विभागीय जांच शुरू
गैंगस्टर एक्ट के मामलों पर होगी कठोर कार्यवाही
पुलिस के अनुसार खनन, नकल, परिवहन, भू-माफिया और अन्य संगठित अपराधों में शामिल गिरोहों के खिलाफ दर्ज गैंगस्टर एक्ट के मामलों को प्राथमिकता पर लिया जा रहा है। इन मामलों में अपराधियों के साथ-साथ उनके सहयोगियों और करीबी लोगों की भूमिका भी खंगाली जाएगी, ताकि अपराध से अर्जित संपत्तियों का पूरा नेटवर्क सामने आ सके।
मामलों की विवेचना में राजस्व अधिकारियों का भी सहयोग लिया जाएगा, जिससे संपत्तियों का सत्यापन समयबद्ध तरीके से पूरा हो सके। पुलिस का मानना है कि इससे अवैध कमाई पर प्रभावी प्रहार होगा और संगठित अपराध पर अंकुश लगाने में मदद मिलेगी।
जानकारी के लिए बताते चलें कि बीते वर्ष भी कई माफिया और उनके गुर्गों के खिलाफ गैंगस्टर एक्ट के तहत कार्रवाई करते हुए संपत्तियां जब्त की गई थीं। अब प्रशासन ने एक बार फिर ऐसे मामलों में तेजी लाने का फैसला किया है, जिससे जिले में संगठित अपराध और भू-माफियाओं के नेटवर्क पर प्रभावी कार्रवाई सुनिश्चित की जा सके।

title: పలువురికి మాజీ ఎమ్మెల్యే బొల్లం మ‌ల్ల‌య్య యాద‌వ్ ప‌రామ‌ర్శ‌
description: అనంతగిరి మండల పరిధిలోని వెంకట్రాంపురం గ్రామానికి చెందిన హస్తం రాము ఇటీవల అనారోగ్యంతో మరణించాడు. విషయం తెలిసిన మాజీ ఎమ్మెల్యే బొల్లం మల్లయ్య యాదవ్ శుక్రవారం రాము చిత్రపటానికి పూలమాలలు వేసి కుటుంబ సభ్యుల్ని..
content: అనంతగిరి, జూన్ 26 : అనంతగిరి మండల పరిధిలోని వెంకట్రాంపురం గ్రామానికి చెందిన హస్తం రాము ఇటీవల అనారోగ్యంతో మరణించాడు. విషయం తెలిసిన మాజీ ఎమ్మెల్యే బొల్లం మల్లయ్య యాదవ్ శుక్రవారం రాము చిత్రపటానికి పూలమాలలు వేసి కుటుంబ సభ్యుల్ని పరామర్శించారు. అనంతరం ఇటీవల గాయపడిన గ్రామానికి చెందిన ఎమ్మార్పీఎస్ నాయకుడు కొండపల్లి ఉపేంద్రను పరామర్శించారు. ఆయన వెంట బీఆర్ఎస్ నాయకులు వెంకటేశ్వర్లు, కృష్ణ తదితరులు ఉన్నారు.

title: Awas Yojana Scam | আবাস যোজনার টাকায় কাটমানি! কুমারগঞ্জে তৃণমূল কর্মীর বিরুদ্ধে থানায় আদিবাসী ব্যক্তি
description:
কুমারগঞ্জ: প্রধানমন্ত্রী আবাস যোজনার ঘরের টাকা থেকে কাটমানি নেওয়ার অভিযোগ (Awas Yojana Scam) উঠল এক তৃণমূল কর্মীর বিরুদ্ধে। ঘটনাটি ঘটেছে দক্ষিণ দিনাজপুরের কুমারগঞ্জ ব্লকের সাফানগর এলাকায়। এই ঘটনায় শুক্রবার কুমারগঞ্জ থানায় লিখিত অভিযোগ দায়ের করেছেন সাফানগর উত্তরপাড়ার বাসিন্দা তথা এক আদিবাসী ব্যক্তি বিশ্বনাথ মার্ডি। অভিযোগ সূত্রে জানা গিয়েছে, বিগত সরকারের সময়ে প্রধানমন্ত্রী আবাস যোজনার ঘর […]
The post Awas Yojana Scam | আবাস যোজনার টাকায় কাটমানি! কুমারগঞ্জে তৃণমূল কর্মীর বিরুদ্ধে থানায় আদিবাসী ব্যক্তি appeared first on Uttarbanga Sambad.
content:
কুমারগঞ্জ: প্রধানমন্ত্রী আবাস যোজনার ঘরের টাকা থেকে কাটমানি নেওয়ার অভিযোগ (Awas Yojana Scam) উঠল এক তৃণমূল কর্মীর বিরুদ্ধে। ঘটনাটি ঘটেছে দক্ষিণ দিনাজপুরের কুমারগঞ্জ ব্লকের সাফানগর এলাকায়। এই ঘটনায় শুক্রবার কুমারগঞ্জ থানায় লিখিত অভিযোগ দায়ের করেছেন সাফানগর উত্তরপাড়ার বাসিন্দা তথা এক আদিবাসী ব্যক্তি বিশ্বনাথ মার্ডি।
অভিযোগ সূত্রে জানা গিয়েছে, বিগত সরকারের সময়ে প্রধানমন্ত্রী আবাস যোজনার ঘর নির্মাণের জন্য প্রথম কিস্তির ৬০ হাজার টাকা বিশ্বনাথ মার্ডির ব্যাঙ্ক অ্যাকাউন্টে জমা পড়ে। অভিযোগ, দ্বিতীয় কিস্তির টাকা পাওয়ার আগেই স্থানীয় তৃণমূল কর্মী আলমগীর মিঞা তাঁর কাছে ১০ হাজার টাকা কাটমানি দাবি করেন। বিশ্বনাথ মার্ডির দাবি, ওই টাকা না দিলে সরকারি প্রকল্পের দ্বিতীয় কিস্তির টাকা অ্যাকাউন্টে ঢুকতে দেওয়া হবে না বলে তাঁকে হুমকি দেওয়া হয়।
পরিস্থিতির চাপে পড়ে তিনি অভিযুক্তকে সাড়ে আট হাজার টাকা দিতে বাধ্য হন। অভিযোগকারী আরও জানিয়েছেন, বাকি দেড় হাজার টাকার জন্যও তাঁকে দীর্ঘদিন ধরে চাপ ও হুমকি দেওয়া হচ্ছিল। শেষপর্যন্ত উপায়ান্তর না দেখে তিনি শুক্রবার কুমারগঞ্জ থানায় লিখিত অভিযোগ দায়ের করেন।
ঘটনার তদন্ত শুরু করেছে কুমারগঞ্জ থানার পুলিশ। পুলিশ সূত্রে জানা গিয়েছে, অভিযোগের সত্যতা যাচাই করতে অভিযোগকারী এবং সংশ্লিষ্ট অন্যান্য ব্যক্তিদের সঙ্গে কথা বলার প্রক্রিয়া শুরু হয়েছে। যদিও এই বিষয়ে অভিযুক্ত তৃণমূল কর্মী আলমগীর মিঞার প্রতিক্রিয়া পাওয়ার জন্য বারবার যোগাযোগের চেষ্টা করা হলেও তাঁর সঙ্গে কথা বলা সম্ভব হয়নি। তদন্তের পরেই পরবর্তী আইনানুগ ব্যবস্থা নেওয়া হবে বলে জানিয়েছে পুলিশ।

The post Awas Yojana Scam | আবাস যোজনার টাকায় কাটমানি! কুমারগঞ্জে তৃণমূল কর্মীর বিরুদ্ধে থানায় আদিবাসী ব্যক্তি appeared first on Uttarbanga Sambad.

title: Missile alert goes off in Dubai but authorities quickly tell public to disregard warning
description:
Dubai, Jun 26: Authorities in the United Arab Emirates on Friday sounded an incoming missile alert for Dubai but shortly afterward told the public to “disregard the previous warning,” an indication that it was likely triggered by mistake.
The brief text message from the UAE's Interior Ministry, the first of its kind during the Iran war, seemed to signal an accidental alert that went out to the public. It wasn't immediately clear what sparked the warning just after 5:15 pm local time.
The authorities did not elaborate. The mobile phone alerted startled many in Dubai, the first in weeks since the ceasefire in the war.
Iran is suspected of launching a drone attack against a tanker off the coast of Oman on Thursday as Tehran increasingly challenges the region and the US over its control of the Strait of Hormuz, even with the current interim deal in the Iran war.
A short time after the alert, the Emiratis said there was a telephone call between Foreign Minister Sheikh Abdullah bin Zayed Al Nahyan and Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi. It quoted Sheikh Abdullah as telling Araghchi that the UAE “emphasised the importance of full commitment” to the interim deal between Iran and the United States.
“Serious diplomacy and responsible dialogue are the optimal path for addressing all regional and international crises,” it said.

title: ഓപ്പറേഷൻ തൂഫാന് ഐക്യദാർഢ്യവുമായി സിനിമ; 'ഡെയ്ഞ്ചറസ് വൈബ്' നിയമസഭാ സാമാജികര്‍ക്കായി പ്രദര്‍ശിപ്പിക്കും
description: ഫൈസൽ ഹുസൈൻ സംവിധാനം ചെയ്ത 'ഡെയ്ഞ്ചറസ് വൈബ്' എന്ന ലഹരി വിരുദ്ധ സിനിമ നിയമസഭാ സാമാജികർക്കായി പ്രദർശിപ്പിക്കും
content: <p>ലഹരി വിപത്തിനെതിരെ പൊതുജനതാല്‍പര്യാര്‍ഥം ഫൈസൽ ഹുസൈൻ കഥ എഴുതി സംവിധാനം ചെയ്ത ഡെയ്ഞ്ചറസ് വൈബ് എന്ന സിനിമ നിയമസഭാ സാമാജികരുടെ മുന്നിൽ പ്രദർശിപ്പിക്കും. ജൂൺ 29 തിങ്കളാഴ്ച വൈകിട്ട് 6 മണിക്കാണ് നിയമസഭാ ഹാളിൽ ചിത്രത്തിന്‍റെ പ്രദർശനം നടക്കുന്നത്. കേരളത്തിൻ്റെ മുഖ്യമന്ത്രിയും സ്പീക്കറുമടങ്ങുന്ന 140 എംഎൽഎമാരും പ്രദർശനം കാണാൻ എത്തും. ചിത്രത്തിന്‍റെ പ്രിവ്യൂ ഷോ നേരത്തെ കോഴിക്കോട് നടന്നിരുന്നു.</p><p>കട്ടപ്പാടത്തെ മാന്ത്രികൻ എന്ന സിനിമയും നിരവധി അവാർഡുകൾ കരസ്ഥമാക്കിയ ഡോക്യുമെൻ്ററികളും ഷോർട്ട് ഫിലിമുകളും തയ്യാറാക്കിയ ഫൈസൽ ഹുസൈനാണ് ഡെയ്ഞ്ചറസ് വൈബിന്‍റെ സംവിധാനം. അപ്പുണ്ണി ശശിയും ജയരാജ് കോഴിക്കോടും പ്രധാന കഥാപാത്രങ്ങളെ അവതരിപ്പിച്ച ചിത്രം ഹിറ്റ് മീഡിയ ക്രിയേറ്റീവ് ഫാക്ടറിയുടെ ബാനറിലാണ് നിർമ്മിച്ചിരിക്കുന്നത്. കേരള സർക്കാരിൻ്റെ ഓപ്പറേഷൻ തൂഫാന് ഐക്യദാർഢ്യം പ്രഖ്യാപിച്ച് തയ്യാറാക്കിയ ചിത്രത്തിന്‍‌റെ പ്രമേയം ലഹരി മാഫിയയ്ക്കെതിരെ പൊലീസ് ഓഫീസർ സഹദേവൻ നടത്തുന്ന പോരാട്ടവും അതിനെ ചുറ്റിപ്പറ്റിയുള്ള സംഭവ വികാസങ്ങളുമാണ്. സസ്പെൻസ് ത്രില്ലർ ഗണത്തിൽ പെടുത്താവുന്ന ചിത്രത്തിൽ സോഷ്യൽ മീഡിയയിലൂടെ ശ്രദ്ധേയരായ അൻഷി, പാണാലി ജുനൈസ്, അർഷദ്, ഹരിത്ത്, ഇന്ദിര, ഫൈജു, അശോകൻ വളയം, ഷംസു വെള്ളിപറമ്പ്,സലാം ലെൻസ് വ്യൂ, പ്രൊഫ. രാജശേഖരൻ എന്നിവരാണ് ശ്രദ്ധേയ കഥാപാത്രങ്ങളെ അവതരിപ്പിച്ചിരിക്കുന്നത്.</p><p>വയനാടും കോഴിക്കോടുമായി ചിത്രീകരണം പൂർത്തിയാക്കിയ ഡെയ്ഞ്ചറസ് വൈബിൽ നൂറിലധികം കലാകാരന്മാർ ഭാഗമാകുന്നുണ്ട്. 40 മിനിറ്റ് ദൈർഘ്യമുള്ള ചിത്രത്തിൻ്റെ പ്രിവ്യൂ ഷോ കോഴിക്കോട് എആർസി കോറണേഷൻ തിയറ്ററിൽ നിറഞ്ഞ സദസ്സിൽ നേരത്തെ നടന്നിരുന്നു. കേരള പൊതു വിദ്യാഭ്യാസ വകുപ്പിൻ്റെ സഹകരണത്തോടെ വിദ്യാഭ്യാസ സ്ഥാപനങ്ങളിലും കോളേജുകളിലും ആഭ്യന്തരവകുപ്പിൻ്റെയും സാംസ്കാരിക വകുപ്പിൻ്റെയും സഹകരണത്തോടെ സംസ്ഥാന വ്യാപക പ്രദർശനങ്ങളും സംഘടിപ്പിക്കാനാണ് അണിയറ പ്രവർത്തകർ ഉദ്ദേശിക്കുന്നത്.</p><p>ചിത്രത്തിന് ക്യാമറ ചലിപ്പിച്ചിരിക്കുന്നത് പ്രബീഷ് ലിൻസിയാണ്. ചിത്രസംയോജനവും സംവിധായകൻ ഫൈസൽ ഹുസൈനാണ് നിർവഹിച്ചിരിക്കുന്നത്. തിരക്കഥ ഒരുക്കിയത് റിയാസ് പെരുംമ്പടവ്. നെവിൽ ജോർജിൻ്റെ വരികൾക്ക് സംഗീതവും പശ്ചാത്തല സംഗീതവും ഒരുക്കിയിരിക്കുന്നത് സിമ്പു സുകുമാരൻ ആണ്. സലാം ലെൻസ് വ്യൂ ആണ് ചിത്രത്തിൻ്റെ പ്രോജക്റ്റ് കോഡിനേറ്റർ.</p><p></p>

title: టీజీఎస్‌డబ్ల్యూఆర్‌డీసీలో అంతర్జాతీయ మాదకద్రవ్యాల వ్యతిరేక దినోత్సవం
description: అంతర్జాతీయ మాదకద్రవ్యాల దుర్వినియోగం, అక్రమ రవాణా వ్యతిరేక దినోత్సవాన్ని పురస్కరించుకుని "నషా ముక్త్ భారత్ అభియాన్ – వికసిత్ భారత్ కి పెహచాన్" కార్యక్రమంలో భాగంగా టీజీఎస్‌డబ్ల్యూఆర్‌డీసీ(డబ్ల్యూ), నల్ల‌గొండ‌ కళాశాలలో శుక్రవారం పలు అవగాహన కార్యక్రమాలు నిర్వహించారు.
content:
నల్ల‌గొండ‌, జూన్ 26 : అంతర్జాతీయ మాదకద్రవ్యాల దుర్వినియోగం, అక్రమ రవాణా వ్యతిరేక దినోత్సవాన్ని పురస్కరించుకుని “నషా ముక్త్ భారత్ అభియాన్ – వికసిత్ భారత్ కి పెహచాన్” కార్యక్రమంలో భాగంగా టీజీఎస్‌డబ్ల్యూఆర్‌డీసీ(డబ్ల్యూ), నల్ల‌గొండ‌ కళాశాలలో శుక్రవారం పలు అవగాహన కార్యక్రమాలు నిర్వహించారు. కళాశాల ప్రిన్సిపాల్ డా.పి.పవిత్ర వాణి కర్ష, వైస్ ప్రిన్సిపాల్ ఎ.నీలిమ రెడ్డి పర్యవేక్షణలో ఎన్‌ఎస్‌ఎస్ యూనిట్–1 ప్రోగ్రామ్ ఆఫీసర్ డా.సి.హెచ్.రజిత, యూనిట్–2 ప్రోగ్రామ్ ఆఫీసర్ సుల్తానా షేక్ సమన్వయంతో కార్యక్రమాలు నిర్వహించారు. ఈ సందర్భంగా ఎన్‌ఎస్‌ఎస్ వాలంటీర్లు మాదకద్రవ్యాల వినియోగం వల్ల కలిగే దుష్పరిణామాలపై అవగాహన ర్యాలీ నిర్వహించారు.
అనంతరం డ్రగ్స్‌కు దూరంగా ఉంటామని ప్రతిజ్ఞ చేశారు. “డ్రగ్స్ వద్దు – జీవితం ముద్దు” అనే అంశంపై పోస్టర్ ప్రదర్శన, వ్యాసరచన పోటీలు నిర్వహించడంతో పాటు మాదకద్రవ్యాల దుష్ప్రభావాలపై అవగాహన సదస్సును కూడా నిర్వహించారు. ఈ సందర్భంగా ప్రిన్సిపాల్ డా. పి. పవిత్ర వాణి కర్ష మాట్లాడుతూ.. మాదక ద్రవ్యాల వినియోగం యువత భవిష్యత్‌ను, కుటుంబ వ్యవస్థను, సమాజాన్ని తీవ్రంగా దెబ్బతీస్తుందని పేర్కొన్నారు. ప్రతి విద్యార్థి చెడు వ్యసనాలకు దూరంగా ఉండి ఆరోగ్యకరమైన జీవన విధానాన్ని అలవర్చుకోవాలని, దేశాభివృద్ధిలో భాగస్వాములు కావాలని సూచించారు.

title: चंपत राय के इस्तीफे पर पूर्णिमा कोठारी का बड़ा बयान: ‘यह राम मंदिर को बदनाम करने की साजिश’
description: Champat Rai resignation News: राम मंदिर चढ़ावा विवाद के बीच चंपत राय के इस्तीफे पर पूर्णिमा कोठारी ने दी प्रतिक्रिया। इसे राम मंदिर को बदनाम करने की साजिश बताते हुए ट्रस्ट पर जताया पूरा भरोसा।
content:
Purnima kothari Reaction On Champat Rai Resignation: राम मंदिर चढ़ावा विवाद के बीच ट्रस्ट के महासचिव चंपत राय के इस्तीफे को लेकर कारसेवक राम कुमार कोठारी और शरद कोठारी की बहन पूर्णिमा कोठारी ने प्रतिक्रिया दी है। उन्होंने कहा कि चंपत राय ने नैतिक जिम्मेदारी लेते हुए अपने पद से इस्तीफा दिया है। पूर्णिमा कोठारी ने चंपत राय के राम मंदिर आंदोलन में योगदान की सराहना करते हुए कहा कि उन्होंने अपना पूरा जीवन राम मंदिर के निर्माण और उससे जुड़े आंदोलन को समर्पित कर दिया।
उन्होंने कहा कि चंपत राय ने अदालत में चल रहे मामले से लेकर मंदिर निर्माण तक हर स्तर पर महत्वपूर्ण भूमिका निभाई है। पूर्णिमा ने चढ़ावा हेराफेरी मामले को साजिश करार देते हुए दावा किया कि कुछ लोग राम मंदिर और उससे जुड़ी आस्था को बदनाम करने की कोशिश कर रहे हैं। उन्होंने ट्रस्ट के पदाधिकारियों पर भरोसा जताते हुए कहा कि दोषी पाए जाने वालों के खिलाफ निश्चित रूप से कार्रवाई होगी।
&#8216;नैतिक जिम्मेदारी&#8217; लेते हुए चंपत राय ने छोड़ा पद
पूर्णिमा कोठारी ने मीडिया से ​​बातचीत के दौरान कहा, &#8220;शायद उन्होंने (चंपत राय ने) अपनी अंतरात्मा की आवाज सुनकर और नैतिक जिम्मेदारी समझते हुए यह फैसला किया है, क्योंकि वह ट्रस्ट में बहुत अहम पद पर थे।&#8221; कोठारी ने कहा कि वह चंपत राय को पिछले 15 साल से जानती हैं और जब भी अयोध्या जाती हैं, उनसे मिलती रहती हैं।
राम मंदिर के निर्माण में निभाई अहम भूमिका
कोठारी ने आगे कहा, &#8220;उन्होंने अपना जीवन राम मंदिर के लिए समर्पित कर दिया है। उन्होंने अदालती मामले को भी संभाला था। उन्होंने राम मंदिर के निर्माण में अहम भूमिका निभाई और उन लोगों का मुकाबला किया जिन्होंने भगवान राम के अस्तित्व पर सवाल उठाए थे।&#8221;
पूर्णिमा कोठारी ने चंपत के योगदान को सराहा
कोठारी ने कहा, &#8220;इसलिए, जब उस व्यक्ति पर आरोप लगाए जाते हैं जिसने एक संत की तरह जीवन जिया हो, तो मुझे दुख होता है। मैंने काम (राम मंदिर के लिए) के प्रति उनका जुनून देखा है। उन्होंने बहुत संघर्षों के बीच अपना जीवन जिया है, उनके लिए यह पैसा कोई मायने नहीं रखता।&#8221; उन्होंने फिर कहा कि चंपत राय पर आरोप नहीं लगाए जाने चाहिए।
राम मंदिर को बदनाम करने की साजिश का दावा
पूर्णिमा कोठारी ने राम मंदिर के लिए मिले चढ़ावे में हेराफेरी पर टिप्पणी करते हुए दावा किया, &#8220;मुझे लगता है कि यह किसी ऐसे व्यक्ति की साजिश है जो राम मंदिर को बनते हुए नहीं देखना चाहता था। जो लोग कभी राम मंदिर नहीं जाना चाहते और एक रुपया भी दान नहीं करना चाहते, ऐसे लोग जरूर किसी साजिश में शामिल होंगे ताकि राम मंदिर को बदनाम किया जा सके और लोगों की आस्था और श्रद्धा को कम किया जा सके। हो सकता है कि उन्होंने अपने ही किसी आदमी को अंदर घुसा दिया हो।&#8221;
ट्रस्ट के पदाधिकारियों पर जताया भरोसा
उन्होंने कहा, &#8220;हजारों लोग मंदिर आते हैं और वहां हजारों कर्मचारी भी हैं। आप हर व्यक्ति की जांच करके यह नहीं देख सकते कि कौन राम भक्त है और कौन नहीं। अगर किसी दूसरे धर्म का व्यक्ति भी &#8216;टीका&#8217; और &#8216;कलावा&#8217; पहनकर अंदर जाता है, तो कोई उस पर नजर नहीं रखता। उसे अंदर जाने दिया जाएगा।&#8221;पूर्णिमा कोठारी ने ट्रस्ट के सभी पदाधिकारियों पर पूरा भरोसा जताते हुए कहा, मैंने कोर्ट केस जीतने और राम मंदिर बनाने में उनकी कड़ी मेहनत देखी है।
 ये भी पढ़ें-  42 दिन, 70 चोरी और 8 गिरफ्तार…राम मंदिर चढ़ावा केस में SIT रिपोर्ट में कई बड़े खुलासे!
दोषियों को बख्शा नहीं जाएगा
कोठारी ने कहा कि प्रधानमंत्री नरेंद्र मोदी और मुख्यमंत्री योगी आदित्यनाथ खुद मंदिर पर नजर रखे हुए हैं। मंदिर की सुरक्षा बहुत कड़ी है। उन्होंने आगे कहा कि जो भी दोषी पाया जाएगा, उसके खिलाफ कार्रवाई की जाएगी, किसी को भी बख्शा नहीं जाएगा।

title: Kneecap open exclusive pop-up merch shop in London ahead of huge Crystal Palace Park show
description:
Fans can get their hands on a limited edition gig print, a new logo cap, hoodies, T-shirts, a signed setlist from their Glastonbury 2025 performance and more
The post Kneecap open exclusive pop-up merch shop in London ahead of huge Crystal Palace Park show appeared first on NME.
content:
Kneecap have launched a pop-up merch shop ahead of their huge show at Crystal Palace Park tomorrow (Saturday June 27).
The band are set to play their biggest headline gig to date in the capital with special guests The Mary Wallopers, Fat Dog, Biig Piig, Gurriers and Madra Salach.
Ahead of the show, the trio have opened a merch store in the South London area until 8pm BST tonight (Friday June 26), and from 10am to 6pm BST tomorrow.
Kneecap fans will be able to get their hands on a limited edition gig print signed by designer Raissa Pardini, a new logo cap, hoodies, T-shirts and a signed setlist from their Glastonbury 2025 performance.
Also on offer are signed seven-inch singles of ‘Better Way To Live’ featuring Fontaine D.C. frontman Grian Chatten and their collaboration with DJ and producer Sub Focus, ‘No Comment’.

All London heads.
Tomorrow (Friday) and Saturday we will have our first ever physical pop up store. It's 5 mins from Crystal Palace Park. 
We've got a whole pile of stuff going on:
– limited edition gig print signed (by Raissa Pardini) – ⁠wee fenian tee (kids) – ⁠new logo… pic.twitter.com/aSt1L03Vb7
— KNEECAP (@KNEECAPCEOL) June 25, 2026


  










View this post on Instagram

























Kneecap’s huge concert in London will open at 1pm BST, ahead of Salach’s opening slot at 2pm.
Next up will be Gurriers at 3pm, before Biig Piig start their support set an hour later. Fat Dog are in the slot immediately afterwards at 5:15pm, with The Mary Wallopers serving as the main openers from 6:35pm.
You can find any remaining tickets for Kneecap at London’s Crystal Palace Park here.
Speaking previously about the landmark gig, the band said they were “back to the belly of the beast for our biggest ever headline show”, adding: “Our last wee venture into London was to beat the government in court… again. This time it’ll be even better: 25,000 sound heads in a park together.
“We’re delighted to have some of our best mates and best bands around to join us. This is one we can’t wait for.”
Following their big gig in the capital, the trio will perform at various European and UK summer festivals, including Roskilde, Rock Werchter and Boomtown. They’ll also make appearances at Reading & Leeds 2026 on the August Bank Holiday Weekend. Kneecap will play at Cork’s Live At The Marquee in July, too.
Last week, the trio reacted to Keir Starmer resigning as UK Prime Minister and leader of the Labour Party. The PM had pushed to have the group kicked off the Glastonbury 2025 line-up, with Kneecap hitting out at him for “arming a fucking genocide” in Gaza.
They also condemned Starmer on the ‘Fenian’ single ‘Liar’s Tale’, calling him a “scumbag” for his involvement in helping to arm Israel.
During a recent interview with NME, Kneecap were asked why they thought politicians were so obsessed with artists saying things, rather than the origins of what they speak out about.
“It’s that need for sensationalism,” Móglaí Bap replied. “Keir Starmer giving an interview about us playing Glastonbury to The Sun? Why would he do that? That’s weird.
“He gets to pretend to be outraged about something that doesn’t really have an impact or any repercussions for him, but it makes him look good. We have this dysfunctional symbiotic relationship with politicians.”

In a four-and-a-half-star review of ‘Fenian’, NME described the album as “a spraypainted brick wall of consistency, amplifying the adventure of The Prodigy and Burial, seamlessly but tastefully hopping genres while keeping the vibe up to retain Kneecap’s knack for having a good time to illuminate the hard times“.
It added: “Put all the rage-bait headlines aside and what you’re left with is a solid, progressive and fearless album from a group that could just as easily be dicking around instead of making music that matters. In that sense at least, their day has come.”
The post Kneecap open exclusive pop-up merch shop in London ahead of huge Crystal Palace Park show appeared first on NME.
