title: Champat Rai resigns as Ram Mandir Trust Chief on 'moral grounds'; trustee also Anil Mishra quits
description: Champat Rai Resignation: The resignations come on the back of mounting scrutiny and demand for the sacking of officials after the preliminary findings submitted by SIT, which flagged lapses in the handling of donations offered by devotees at the Ram Temple.​
content: Champat Rai Resignation: Amid the ongoing controversy over allegations of embezzlement of donations received by the Ram Temple in Ayodhya, Champat Rai, the general secretary of the Shri Ram Janmabhoomi Teerth Kshetra Trust, on Friday resigned from his post on moral grounds, news agency ANI reported.Meanwhile, trustee Anil Mishra has also stepped down from his position.The Uttar Pradesh government had set up a Special Investigation Team (sit) to probe allegations of embezzlement of donations after a request from the Shri Ram Janmabhoomi Mandir Trust. The resignations come on the back of mounting scrutiny and demand for the sacking of officials after the preliminary findings submitted by SIT, which flagged lapses in the handling of donations offered by devotees at the Ram Temple.Last night, an First Information Report (FIR) in the donation case was also lodged against eight individuals, including the temple attendants, counting staff and former bank officials who allegedly acted in collusion to siphon off the temple funds. All the accused named in the FIR were arrested and put behind bars.The arrested accused include Avinash Shukla, Anukalp Mishra, Lavkush Mishra, Manish Kumar Yadav, Karunesh Pandey, Ramashankar Mishra, Subhash Srivastava, and Ram Shankar Yadav alias Tinnu.    Related News | Ayodhya Ram Temple Donation Row: All eight named in FIR arrested in alleged donation embezzlement caseThe development comes as a major fallout of the donation controversy at the Ram Temple, which came as a shock to crores of devotees. According to reports, offerings and valuables worth hundreds of crores were misappropriated by the temple staff in connivance with bank officials.Meanwhile, Uttar Pradesh Deputy Chief Minister Brajesh Pathak said an impartial investigation will be conducted into the allegations that prompted Champat Rai's resignation as General Secretary of the Shri Ram Janmabhoomi Teerth Kshetra Trust.Speaking to reporters, Pathak said that an FIR has been registered in the case and the government will take action as per law. "An impartial investigation will be conducted. FIR has been registered. The government has said that action will be taken as per the law," Pathak told reporters.According to the police, an FIR was registered on June 25. The complaint was lodged by Krishanmohan, a member of the Shri Ram Janmabhoomi Teerth Kshetra Trust.The FIR alleges a criminal conspiracy involving several employees engaged in the counting and management of offerings at the temple site. The complaint accuses the individuals of systemic theft, embezzlement, and planned misappropriation of funds donated by devotees.Under the supervision of Officer in Charge the police said they have completed initial documentation and provided a computerised copy of the FIR to the complainant. Senior district officials were informed of the case registration via wireless communication. The investigation has been transferred to the Circle Officer (CO), Ayodhya, for further inquiry into the alleged financial irregularities.This action followed allegations by former SP MLA from Ayodhya, Pawan Pandey, who claimed that between Rs 7 crore and Rs 7.5 crore in donations were misappropriated from the Ram Mandir. In response to these claims, the state government constituted a three-member SIT on June 14 to probe the alleged scam, acting on a request from the Shri Ram Janmabhoomi Teerth Kshetra Trust.Meanwhile, Uttar Pradesh Chief Minister Yogi Adityanath lashed out at the opposition for its stand on the alleged embezzlement case at the Ram Mandir. Calling out the opposition, the CM said that those who had opposed the temple construction were now raising the issue for political gain.The CM said that the state government would adopt a "zero-tolerance" policy against anyone attempting to hurt public faith, as he addressed a public meeting in Deoria after the first FIR was registered on the basis of the Special Investigation Team's (SIT) preliminary report. The Chief Minister was addressing a programme for the inauguration and foundation stone laying of 106 development projects worth over Rs 456 crore.Speaking on those questioning matters related to Lord Ram and Ayodhya, Adityanath alleged that those raising objections had earlier denied the existence of Lord Ram and the significance of Ayodhya."One side used to say that lord Ram doesn't even exist, meaning these people wanted to deny Ayodhya itself. They kept fighting the case in court continuously, kept fielding armies of lawyers against the construction of the Ram Janmabhoomi temple, and the other side is the one that would wield sticks and fire bullets at those chanting 'Jai Shri Ram.' Those who would fire bullets at the mere mention of Lord Ram's name are now saying that there has been tampering with faith... They would incite riots on Ram Navami, ban Shri Krishna Janmashtami celebrations, prevent the Kanwar Yatra from taking place, incite riots during Durga Puja... Remember, the Congress didn't just loot the country; they tore it apart. The records of dishonesty and corruption they established, and those very people are now casting aspersions on Ayodhya? This is unacceptable," Yogi Adityanath said.(With agency inputs)

title: Volkswagen Layoffs 2026: CEO Oliver Blume eyes to cut 1 lakh jobs, end production in 4 plants – What’s wrong inside world’s No.2 carmaker
description: Volkswagen plans to cut up to 100,000 jobs and shut four plants as the automaker struggles with weak demand, rising costs and EV competition.
content: In what could become the most dramatic restructuring in Volkswagen Group’s 89-year history, CEO Oliver Blume is reportedly preparing a sweeping plan to eliminate up to 100,000 jobs worldwide over the coming years while closing or significantly scaling back production at four major German plants. The revelations, published by German business magazine Manager Magazin on June 26, 2026, have sent shockwaves through Germany’s powerful auto unions and the broader European manufacturing sector.The ambitious  and painful restructuring goes far beyond previous cost-saving targets. It includes slashing planned capital investments by about 15 per cent to roughly EUR 130 billion (USD148 billion) over the next five years, spinning off parts of the core Volkswagen brand, and fundamentally reshaping the sprawling empire that employs more than 650,000 people globally.reuters.comGiant under siegeVolkswagen Group, Europe’s largest automaker and the world’s second-biggest by sales, finds itself at a critical inflection point. Once a symbol of German industrial might known for the iconic Beetle, Golf, and its vast portfolio including Audi, Porsche, Skoda, and Seat the company is struggling with the painful realities of the electric vehicle transition, intensifying Chinese competition, and shifting global trade dynamics. Key pressures include:Slowing EV adoption and disappointing profitability in the shift away from internal combustion engines.Aggressive Chinese EV makers flooding markets with lower-cost alternatives.Tariffs and trade tensions, particularly potential U.S. measures affecting exports.High fixed costs from an oversized workforce and complex manufacturing footprint in high-wage Germany.Blume, who also oversees Porsche, is under mounting pressure to deliver a turnaround. The company’s operating profit margins have been squeezed, and previous efficiency programs have not delivered results fast enough. The new “Group Target Picture 2030” plan, which Blume reportedly presented internally, aims to restore competitiveness by focusing on core strengths and reducing complexity.Human and industrial costThe proposed cuts would represent roughly 15 per cent of Volkswagen’s global workforce. In Germany alone where nearly 43 per cent of employees are based the impact would be profound. The plan reportedly calls for ending production at plants in Hanover, Zwickau, Emden, and Audi’s Neckarsulm site once current models run their course. This directly challenges a 2024 agreement with unions that had ruled out plant closures this decade.IG Metall, Germany’s powerful metalworkers’ union, and Volkswagen’s works council have already vowed fierce resistance. In a joint statement, they declared they would “do everything in our power to prevent” such measures. Job security and strong worker protections have long been pillars of the German economic model, making this battle particularly charged.Industry in transformationVolkswagen is not alone, the entire global auto sector is undergoing its most disruptive change since the invention of the automobile. Legacy manufacturers face enormous capital demands for electrification, software development, and battery technology while contending with new entrants unburdened by legacy factories and workforces.Previous rounds of restructuring at VW had already targeted around 50,000 jobs by 2030, with some 19,000 reductions planned by the end of 2026. The latest proposal significantly escalates the scale and speed. Blume and CFO Arno Antlitz are also exploring structural changes, such as separating the core VW brand and parts operations, to create more focused and agile entities.What lies aheadA Volkswagen spokesperson declined to comment on the specific “confidential documents” but acknowledged that “far-reaching change” is needed across the entire group. The proposals are expected to be discussed at the supervisory board level in early July.For investors, the news was met with relative calm VW shares held steady, even slightly outperforming the broader market. Many analysts view aggressive cost-cutting as necessary medicine, even if the social and political costs are high.For the workers, communities, and the proud tradition of German engineering, the coming months will test the resilience of one of the country’s most iconic companies. Volkswagen’s ability to navigate this overhaul balancing profitability, innovation, and its social contract may well determine whether it emerges stronger in the electric and software-defined future of mobility, or becomes another cautionary tale of a giant that moved too slowly.The road ahead is uncertain, but one thing is clear: the era of business as usual for Volkswagen is over. The company that once redefined mass mobility must now reinvent itself or risk being left behind in the fast lane of the 21st-century auto industry.

title: Ketan Agrawal murder case : केतन अग्रवाल प्रकरणात आता उज्ज्वल निकम यांची एन्ट्री, फडणवीसांचा मोठा निर्णय
description: मुंबई । Mumbai राज्यभरात प्रचंड खळबळ उडवून देणाऱ्या लोहगड (पुणे) येथील केतन अग्रवाल हत्या प्रकरणाला आता एक नवे वळण मिळाले आहे. ‘प्रेम, लग्न आणि धोका’ अशा चक्रव्यूहात अडकलेल्या या गुन्ह्यामुळे पुरुषांवरील अत्याचाराची आणि हल्ल्यांची एक भयानक दुसरी बाजू समाजासमोर आली आहे. आपल्या प्रियकरासोबत कट रचून, होणाऱ्या नवऱ्याला अत्यंत निर्दयीपणे संपवल्याच्या आरोपाखाली मुख्य आरोपी सिया गोयल […]
content:
मुंबई । Mumbai



राज्यभरात प्रचंड खळबळ उडवून देणाऱ्या लोहगड (पुणे) येथील केतन अग्रवाल हत्या प्रकरणाला आता एक नवे वळण मिळाले आहे. ‘प्रेम, लग्न आणि धोका’ अशा चक्रव्यूहात अडकलेल्या या गुन्ह्यामुळे पुरुषांवरील अत्याचाराची आणि हल्ल्यांची एक भयानक दुसरी बाजू समाजासमोर आली आहे.



आपल्या प्रियकरासोबत कट रचून, होणाऱ्या नवऱ्याला अत्यंत निर्दयीपणे संपवल्याच्या आरोपाखाली मुख्य आरोपी सिया गोयल आणि तिचा प्रियकर चेतन सध्या पोलिसांच्या कोठडीत आहेत. पुणे पोलिसांकडून या प्रकरणाची कसून चौकशी सुरू असून दररोज थक्क करणारे खुलासे समोर येत आहेत.



मिळालेल्या माहितीनुसार, पुणे पोलिसांनी आता आपला मोर्चा आरोपी सिया गोयलच्या कुटुंबाकडे वळवला आहे. या संपूर्ण कटात कुटुंबातील कोणाचा सहभाग होता का, याचा शोध घेण्यासाठी पोलिसांनी थेट सियाच्या भावाला चौकशीसाठी ताब्यात घेतले आहे. त्यामुळे या प्रकरणात आगामी काळात आणखी काही मोठे खुलासे होण्याची शक्यता वर्तवली जात आहे.



दुसरीकडे, आपल्या तरुण मुलाला गमावलेल्या अग्रवाल कुटुंबावर दुःखाचा डोंगर कोसळला आहे. केतन अग्रवाल यांचे वडील विशाल अग्रवाल यांनी आज पुण्यात राज्याचे मुख्यमंत्री देवेंद्र फडणवीस यांची भेट घेतली. आपल्या मुलाला लवकरात लवकर न्याय मिळावा आणि आरोपींना कठोर शिक्षा व्हावी, अशी आर्त हाक त्यांनी मुख्यमंत्र्यांकडे दिली. यावर मुख्यमंत्र्यांनी कुटुंबाचे सांत्वन करत, “दोषींना कोणत्याही परिस्थितीत सोडले जाणार नाही, सरकार पीडित कुटुंबाला न्याय देण्यासाठी कटिबद्ध आहे,” असे आश्वासन दिले.



पीडित कुटुंबाची संवेदनशीलता आणि प्रकरणाचे गांभीर्य लक्षात घेऊन हा खटला ‘फास्ट ट्रॅक कोर्टात’ (जलदगती न्यायालय) चालवण्याची आणि राज्याचे ज्येष्ठ विधिज्ञ उज्ज्वल निकम यांची ‘विशेष सरकारी वकील’ म्हणून नियुक्ती करण्याची मागणी विशाल अग्रवाल यांनी केली होती. मुख्यमंत्री देवेंद्र फडणवीस यांनी ही मागणी तातडीने मान्य करत विधी व न्याय विभागाच्या सचिवांना तसे निर्देश दिले आहेत. विशेष म्हणजे, ज्येष्ठ विधिज्ञ उज्ज्वल निकम यांनीही या प्रकरणात विशेष सरकारी वकील म्हणून काम पाहण्यास आपली संमती दर्शवली आहे.



या धक्कादायक घटनेमुळे सियाच्या वडिलांना मोठा मानसिक धक्का बसला असून ते रुग्णालयात उपचार घेत आहेत. कालच त्यांची प्रकृती स्थिर झाल्याने त्यांना अतिदक्षता विभागातून (ICU) जनरल वॉर्डमध्ये हलवण्यात आले. माध्यमांशी बोलताना त्यांनी एक मोठा खुलासा केला. सियावर या लग्नासाठी घरून कोणताही दबाव नव्हता. केतनचे स्थळ आले तेव्हा ती खूप आनंदी होती आणि तिने स्वतःच्या मर्जीनेच केतनला पसंत केले होते, असे तिच्या वडिलांनी सांगितले. जर तिचे कोणावर प्रेम होते, तर तिने लग्नाला नकार का दिला नाही? आणि थेट हत्येचा कट का रचला? या प्रश्नांनी आता संपूर्ण तपास यंत्रणेला चक्रावून सोडले आहे.

title: Rocket Report: China may soon attempt booster landing; Rocket Lab does rapid response
description: Is SpaceX planning to end its Transporter program?
content:
Welcome to Edition 8.47 of the Rocket Report! We have now very nearly reached the midpoint of 2026, a year in which several new US rockets were advertised as potentially making their debuts. But now, we have to wonder whether any of them—Rocket Lab's Neutron, Stoke Space's Nova, Relativity Space's Terran R, and Astra's Rocket 4—will make it. I'd probably put the over/under at something like 0.5 of these launching. Please share your thoughts in the comments below!
As always, we welcome reader submissions, and if you don't want to miss an issue, please subscribe using the box below (the form will not appear on AMP-enabled versions of the site). Each report will include information on small-, medium-, and heavy-lift rockets as well as a quick look ahead at the next three launches on the calendar.

    
                        
                  
      

Rocket Lab executes rapid response mission. Last Friday Rocket Lab launched the Victus Haze mission just 16 hours and 42 minutes after receiving the US Space Force’s Notice to Launch, beating the previous record by more than 10 hours, the company said. The launch was scarcely announced in advance, Ars reports. The only public indication of an impending launch was the release of a warning for pilots and sailors to steer clear of the rocket’s flight path. Rocket Lab did not provide a livestream of the launch, as it does for most of its missions.Read full article

title: Khatron Ke Khiladi 15 premiere date announced: Rohit Shetty returns with Gaurav Khanna, Orry, Rubina Dilaik and more | Check details
description: Khatron Ke Khiladi 15 will premiere on July 25 with Rohit Shetty returning as host. The stunt-based reality show features contestants including Gaurav Khanna, Rubina Dilaik, Orry, Jasmin Bhasin and Rithvik Dhanjani.
content: Colors TV's most adrenaline-fuelled reality franchise is returning for its 15th edition and the makers have officially locked in the premiere date. Khatron Ke Khiladi 15 will air from July 25, 2026, every Saturday and Sunday at 9 pm on Colors TV, with streaming available on JioHotstar for viewers who prefer to watch on their devices.The announcement came with a promo that gave audiences their first proper look at the new season, the contestants, the location and the kind of stunts that have kept this show running for fifteen years without losing its appetite for genuinely uncomfortable television.Cape Town Returns as the BackdropThe production team recently wrapped filming in Cape Town, South Africa, a location that has become closely associated with the show's aesthetic of vast open landscapes, dramatic infrastructure and the particular kind of isolation that makes fear-based challenges feel more visceral on screen.The promo sequences offer glimpses of what contestants faced during the shoot, including stunts on top of skyscrapers, tasks inside cages and encounters with animals ranging from snakes to insects. The theme for this season has been announced as Darr Ka Naya Daur, a New Era of Fear, suggesting the makers intend to push the format further rather than simply repeat what previous seasons established.        View this post on Instagram            A post shared by Gaurav Khanna (@gauravkhannaofficial)Rohit Shetty Continues as HostRohit Shetty returns to host the season, a role he has held across multiple editions of the show and one that has become as much a part of the franchise's identity as the stunts themselves. His film background in action-heavy productions gives the hosting dynamic a credibility that the format benefits from, and his ability to balance encouragement with straight-faced judgment of who performed and who did not has kept the studio segments watchable alongside the stunt footage.The Confirmed Contestant ListThe lineup for Season 15 mixes television veterans, reality show regulars and at least one face who arrived to fame through an entirely different route.Gaurav Khanna, whose popularity soared through Anupamaa, is among the most anticipated names. He was also the first contestant to share the promo, writing that the new era of fear was about to begin and urging fans to tune in from July 25.Rubina Dilaik returns to the stunt format having already demonstrated her competitive instincts across reality television over the years. Jasmin Bhasin, Avinash Mishra, Rithvik Dhanjani and Karan Wahi bring substantial television experience to the contestant pool. Avika Gor and Vishal Aditya Singh add further familiar faces from the fiction space.Farrhana Bhatt and Shagun Sharma represent newer arrivals to the reality format, while stand-up comedian Harsh Gujral brings a different kind of performer into what is typically an actor-heavy lineup.The most talked-about addition, however, is Orhan Awatramani, known universally as Orry, the internet personality whose presence at celebrity events and on social media has made him one of the more polarising figures in popular culture. His inclusion signals that the makers are deliberately reaching for a younger, digitally native audience who follow his every move online and will tune in to watch what happens when his carefully curated persona meets a cage full of insects or a stunt on top of a building.What Happened in Season 14For context on where the franchise stands, the previous season ended with Karan Veer Mehra taking the title, defeating Krishna Shroff and Gashmeer Mahajani in the grand finale. Mehra went on to carry that competitive momentum directly into Bigg Boss 18, where he won the season and took home a cash prize of Rs 50 lakh along with the trophy, making him one of the rare contestants to win two major reality formats in close succession.When to WatchKhatron Ke Khiladi 15 premieres July 25, 2026 on Colors TV at 9 pm, with new episodes every Saturday and Sunday. Streaming is available on JioHotstar for those watching outside the linear broadcast window.

title: New Pharma Packaging Rules in India: Registration certificate mandatory for manufacturers - What you must know
description: New Pharma Packaging Rules in India: India will introduce mandatory registration for manufacturers of printed pharmaceutical packaging as part of a crackdown on counterfeit medicines. The decision follows the seizure of fake weight-loss drugs and vaccines, which exposed the diversion and misuse of authentic packaging materials in overseas markets.
content: New Pharma Packaging Rules in India: The government has come up with a proposal to bring manufacturers and suppliers of printed pharmaceutical packaging materials under a formal registration framework, as it is looking to tighten the traceability mechanism for medicines following the seizure of counterfeit batches of weight-loss drug Semaglutide and rabies vaccines, says a report by Economic Times.Read more: 8th Pay Commission fitment factor to remain 2.57? Panel to stay cautious; how much central govt employees could get – Check Calculation Packaging Registration Certificate mandatoryUnder the proposed framework, all manufacturers of printed pharmaceutical packaging will be required to obtain a Packaging Registration Certificate and a unique registration number through a government portal, according to people familiar with the matter. The registration number will be printed on every pharmaceutical package, enabling authorities to trace each box, strip, or label back to the manufacturer or printer responsible for its production. The move initiated by the Central Drugs Standard Control Organisation (CDSCO) gains significance, as, other than the Semaglutide incident, a complaint was earlier received from international authorities regarding counterfeit products falsely represented as medicines of Indian origin, the people told ET.Repackaging and distribution of spurious and counterfeit drugs It has come to attention that in some cases, only the printed packaging materials of pharmaceutical products were exported from India. Those materials were subsequently misused by foreign entities for repackaging counterfeit drugs abroad, according to a report by ET. "During investigations relating to products including Semaglutide and anti-rabies vaccine, too, it was observed that genuine printed packaging materials were allegedly diverted and misused for the manufacture, repackaging and distribution of spurious and counterfeit drugs," said one of the people to ET.No dedicated registration for pharma packaging manufacturers Currently, manufacturers and suppliers of printed pharmaceutical packaging materials are not required to obtain any specific registration or licence under the Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940, or its associated Rules. Instead, oversight is largely exercised through vendor qualification and supplier management systems implemented by licensed drug manufacturers in accordance with the requirements of Schedule M of the Drugs Rules, 1945. There is a regulatory gap in the manufacture and supply of printed pharmaceutical packaging materials, which is concerning, the person said. The Drugs Consultative Committee under the CDSCO will soon take up the matter for deliberation, said a report by ET.Investigations reveal misuse of authentic drug packaging Investigations have uncovered the involvement of some printing firms contracted by licensed drug manufacturers in diverting and supplying genuine pharmaceutical packaging materials to unauthorised individuals and traders, according to people familiar with the matter. Because these materials are identical to those used for legitimate medicines, their misuse makes it significantly more difficult for regulators and manufacturers to distinguish authentic products from counterfeit or spurious drugs.Also read: NFO Alert: 5 mutual funds open for subscription; check key dates, minimum investment amount, NAV, allotment details

title: Saracens’ Totoa Auvaa escapes sanction over club brawl with cricketers Stokes and Atkinson
Ukraine unleashes one of its heaviest drone bombardments of Russia
description:
Kyiv, Jun 26: Russian air defences intercepted 660 Ukrainian drones in a major nighttime attack on 12 Russian regions as well as the Russia-held Crimean peninsula, the Black Sea and the Azov Sea, Russia's Defence Ministry said Friday.
It appeared to be one of the biggest drone attacks on Russia and the illegally annexed Crimea since Russia's full-scale invasion of Ukraine more than four years ago. The previous biggest Ukrainian attack over the past year was 556 drones on May 17.
In an effort to turn the tables on Russia's grinding war of attrition, Ukrainian long-range drones have for months been battering targets, including oil production and energy facilities, behind the front line and deep inside Russia. The campaign has choked Russian fuel supplies and military deliveries, stalling Moscow's efforts on the battlefield, Western officials and analysts say, and heaped pressure on Russian President Vladimir Putin.
Initial damage reports from Russia after the overnight attack provided scant information. Russia's Defence Ministry usually doesn't say what was targeted in Ukraine's drone attacks, nor does it detail any damage.
Ukraine's Security Service said it used drones to strike Russian navy ships and air defence radars in Kerch, an important port city in Crimea.
The targets were two reconnaissance and mine-laying ships, the Volga and the Vyatka, and the cargo-passenger ferry Petropavlovsk, the agency said, claiming that the strikes started a large fire. The claim could not be independently verified.
Successful drone attacks hearten Ukraine
The major attack came hours after Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy said on X that he had ordered “a 40-day influence operation,” believed to mean an escalation of attacks, aimed at “compelling (Russia) to end the war” after US peace efforts over the past year yielded no breakthrough.
The successful strikes, including hitting targets in Moscow and St Petersburg, have buoyed Ukraine.
Zelenskyy said he got further promises of foreign support when he attended a recent summit of G7 leaders, including from US President Donald Trump, and that the promised aid will help Ukraine step up its effort to force Putin to the negotiating table.
A NATO summit next month could be another key moment in beefing up Ukraine's military.
A Russian chemical plant is reportedly hit
In the Tula region just south of Moscow, a private house was damaged by the attack and a woman was wounded, Tula Gov Dmitry Milyaev said in an online statement, as reports of damage caused by the attack began to emerge.
He also said a power line was damaged and an unspecified industrial facility in the city of Novomoskovsk.
Russian independent online outlet Astra reported that a chemical plant and a hydroelectric plant in Novomoskovsk were attacked and caught fire. The Associated Press couldn't independently verify the report, and there was no official confirmation.
Moscow Mayor Sergei Sobyanin also reported that 47 Ukrainian drones were downed as they flew toward the Russian capital. He did not report any casualties or damage.
Ukraine says 2 civilians were killed in Russian attacks
Two people were killed and seven others injured in Russian attacks on the northeastern Kharkiv region over the previous 24 hours, regional head Oleh Syniehubov said Friday.
Russian forces struck the city of Kharkiv and 16 other settlements across the region using guided aerial bombs and drones of various types, Syniehubov said.
Ukraine's defences overnight stopped 174 of 189 Russian drones, the Ukrainian air force said. However, four of seven Iskander-M ballistic missiles that were fired got through air defences and struck various locations, it said.
Ukrainian officials reported damage to energy facilities, homes and other civilian infrastructure in the capital, Kyiv, the southern Odesa and Zaporizhzhia regions, and Sumy in the northeast. At least six people were wounded, according to authorities.
No Russian military buildup seen on border with Belarus, Ukraine says
Russia is expanding several of its military sites deep inside Belarus, but there is no buildup of forces near the Ukrainian border, a State Border Guard Service spokesman said Friday.
Russia launched its 2022 invasion of Ukraine from Belarus, which borders both countries, and Kyiv has kept a close watch on developments there during the war.
Ukrainian intelligence units have detected no grouping or reinforcement of Russian units, equipment or personnel close to the border, spokesman Andrii Demchenko said in remarks to Ukrainian television.
However, Russia has a growing number of training grounds, bases and other sites deeper inside the country, according to intelligence units.

title: ସ୍କୁଲ ବହି ତ୍ରୁଟିକୁ ନେଇ ଆକ୍ସନରେ ମୁଖ୍ୟମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ: ୪ ଅଧିକାରୀ ନିଲମ୍ବିତ
description:
ଭୁବନେଶ୍ୱର,୨୬।୬: ସ୍କୁଲ ବହି ତ୍ରୁଟିକୁ ନେଇ ମୁଖ୍ୟମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ମୋହନ ଚରଣ ମାଝୀ ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ଏକ ବଡ଼ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟାନୁଷ୍ଠାନ ଗ୍ରହଣ କରିଛନ୍ତି। କମିଟି ସୁପାରିସ ଅନୁଯାୟୀ ମୁଖ୍ୟମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ୪ଜଣ ଅଧିକାରୀଙ୍କୁ ନିଲମ୍ବନ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ମୁଖ୍ୟମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ଶିକ୍ଷକ ଶିକ୍ଷା ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶାଳୟର ତତ୍କାଳୀନ ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶକ ମନୋଜ ପାଢ଼ୀଙ୍କୁ ନିଲମ୍ବନ କରିଥିବା ବେଳେ ୩ଜଣ ସହକାରୀ ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶକ ପ୍ରଲିପ୍ତା ମିଶ୍ର, ଦିଲୀପ ସାହୁ ଓ ଭାରତୀ ଟୁଡୁଙ୍କୁ ମଧ୍ୟ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟରୁ ନିଲମ୍ବନ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ଏପରିକି ୬ ସହକାରୀ ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶକଙ୍କ ଉପରେ ଶୃଙ୍ଖଳାଗତ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟାନୁଷ୍ଠାନ […]
The post ସ୍କୁଲ ବହି ତ୍ରୁଟିକୁ ନେଇ ଆକ୍ସନରେ ମୁଖ୍ୟମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ: ୪ ଅଧିକାରୀ ନିଲମ୍ବିତ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ଭୁବନେଶ୍ୱର,୨୬।୬: ସ୍କୁଲ ବହି ତ୍ରୁଟିକୁ ନେଇ ମୁଖ୍ୟମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ମୋହନ ଚରଣ ମାଝୀ ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ଏକ ବଡ଼ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟାନୁଷ୍ଠାନ ଗ୍ରହଣ କରିଛନ୍ତି। କମିଟି ସୁପାରିସ ଅନୁଯାୟୀ ମୁଖ୍ୟମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ୪ଜଣ ଅଧିକାରୀଙ୍କୁ ନିଲମ୍ବନ କରିଛନ୍ତି।
ମୁଖ୍ୟମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ଶିକ୍ଷକ ଶିକ୍ଷା ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶାଳୟର ତତ୍କାଳୀନ ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶକ ମନୋଜ ପାଢ଼ୀଙ୍କୁ ନିଲମ୍ବନ କରିଥିବା ବେଳେ ୩ଜଣ ସହକାରୀ ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶକ ପ୍ରଲିପ୍ତା ମିଶ୍ର, ଦିଲୀପ ସାହୁ ଓ ଭାରତୀ ଟୁଡୁଙ୍କୁ ମଧ୍ୟ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟରୁ ନିଲମ୍ବନ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ଏପରିକି ୬ ସହକାରୀ ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶକଙ୍କ ଉପରେ ଶୃଙ୍ଖଳାଗତ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟାନୁଷ୍ଠାନ ଗ୍ରହଣ କରାଯାଇଛି। ବନ୍ଦିତା ପଟ୍ଟନାୟକ, ମାନସ ରାଉତ, ମନୋରଞ୍ଜନ ମହାପାତ୍ର, ପ୍ରଶାନ୍ତ ସାହୁ, ମାନସ ନାୟକ, ସୁଦର୍ଶନ ସନ୍ତରାଙ୍କ ଉପରେ ଶୃଙ୍ଖଳାଗତ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟାନୁଷ୍ଠାନ ଗ୍ରହଣ କରାଯାଇଛି।
ଏଥିସହ ତ୍ରୁଟି ସୁଧାରିବାକୁ କମିଟି ୧୪ଟି ସୁପାରିସ କରିଛି। ମାଷ୍ଟର ତ୍ରୁଟି ରେଜିଷ୍ଟର ପ୍ରସ୍ତୁତ ହେବ। SCERTରେ କ୍ବାଲିଟି ଆସ୍ୟୁରାନସ ସେଲ ଖୋଲାଯିବ। ଭାଷା, ଚିତ୍ର, ତଥ୍ୟ ଏଣିକି ଅନୁମୋଦନ ବିନା ପ୍ରିଣ୍ଟିଂ ପ୍ରେସକୁ ଯିବ ନାହିଁ ବୋଲି କମି ପକ୍ଷରୁ ସୁପାରିସ କରାଯାଇଛି।
The post ସ୍କୁଲ ବହି ତ୍ରୁଟିକୁ ନେଇ ଆକ୍ସନରେ ମୁଖ୍ୟମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ: ୪ ଅଧିକାରୀ ନିଲମ୍ବିତ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: Next-generation Hyundai Elantra brings striking new look
description:
New Elantra adopts 'Art of Steel' design principles and comes with a choice of petrol or hybrid

Hyundai has revealed the next iteration of its Elantra saloon, which brings a dramatic new look.
Named the Avante in its home market of South Korea, it is the most extreme example of the brand’s new 'Art of Steel' design language yet, with a number of sharp lines and aggressive angles across its bodywork.
It is slightly larger than the rival Skoda Octavia, owing to a 30mm increase in its wheelbase compared with the previous-generation Elantra. The saloon has also grown 30mm wider and Hyundai said it has prioritised improving interior space. 
Inside, it has been designed to be “cozy and comfortable”, according to Hyundai. The dashboard and door cards’ designs cocoon around the seats, with customisable LED backlighting. 
As in the recently revealed Ioniq 3 hatchback, the driver’s display is set high on the dashboard. This is intended to keep important information in the driver’s line of sight, so they do not have to divert their attention away from the road to check their speed or remaining range. 
A large infotainment touchscreen, measuring either 12.9in or 14.6in, takes centre stage. It runs on Hyundai’s new Pleos operating system, which will allow new functionality such as installing navigation and music apps in the screen, rather than having to use smartphone mirroring. An array of switches and dials for the climate control system sits just below the main screen.

In South Korea, it will be available with two powertrains: a 2.0-litre petrol four-cylinder with 147bhp and a 1.6-litre hybrid with 155bhp. 
The hybrid also brings a new predictive regenerative braking system that reads the road ahead and automatically adjusts the strength of the regenerative effect, helping to keep the battery topped up.
In addition, it gets a ‘stay mode’ that allows the small traction battery’s reserves to power the climate controls and infotainment system while parked, in similar fashion to an EV with a larger battery.
South Korean deliveries of the new Elantra will begin in the coming weeks, although Hyundai has yet to confirm whether it will be sold in mainland Europe or the UK. The previous-generation car was not made available in those regions, despite having been tested there. However, Autocar understands that it has not been ruled out for the latest iteration, suggesting Hyundai may have had a change of heart.
It also remains to be seen whether the high-performance Elantra N will return – and whether it too could make it to Europe.

title: Is trouble brewing for Kerala's first BJP-led Corporation? UDF plans no-confidence motion
ସାବଧାନ! ୧ ଜୁଲାଇରୁ ବଦଳିଯିବ ଏହି ସବୁ ନିୟମ; ମହଙ୍ଗା ପଡ଼ିବ ନା ଆଶ୍ୱସ୍ତି ମିଳିବ? ଜାଣନ୍ତୁ…
description:
ନୂଆଦିଲ୍ଲୀ,୨୬।୬: ପ୍ରତି ମାସର ପହିଲା ତାରିଖ ନିଜ ସହିତ କିଛି ନୂଆ ନିୟମ ନେଇ ଆସିଥାଏ। ଜୁନ ମାସ ଏବେ ଶେଷ ହେବାକୁ ଯାଉଛି ଏବଂ ଜୁଲାଇ ମାସ ଆରମ୍ଭ ହେବା ସୀମାରେ ପହଞ୍ଚିଛି। ଭାରତରେ ୧ ଜୁଲାଇ ୨୦୨୬ରୁ ଅନେକ ଗୁରୁତ୍ୱପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଆର୍ଥିକ ନିୟମ ବଦଳିବାକୁ ଯାଉଛି, ଯାହାର ସିଧାସଳଖ ପ୍ରଭାବ ଗ୍ରାହକ ଏବଂ କରଦାତାଙ୍କ ଉପରେ ପଡ଼ିବ। ଏହି ନୂଆ ନିୟମଗୁଡ଼ିକ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ୟୁପିଆଇ (UPI) ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ପିଏଫ (PF) ପ୍ରତ୍ୟାହାର ଠାରୁ ଆରମ୍ଭ […]
The post ସାବଧାନ! ୧ ଜୁଲାଇରୁ ବଦଳିଯିବ ଏହି ସବୁ ନିୟମ; ମହଙ୍ଗା ପଡ଼ିବ ନା ଆଶ୍ୱସ୍ତି ମିଳିବ? ଜାଣନ୍ତୁ… appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ନୂଆଦିଲ୍ଲୀ,୨୬।୬: ପ୍ରତି ମାସର ପହିଲା ତାରିଖ ନିଜ ସହିତ କିଛି ନୂଆ ନିୟମ ନେଇ ଆସିଥାଏ। ଜୁନ ମାସ ଏବେ ଶେଷ ହେବାକୁ ଯାଉଛି ଏବଂ ଜୁଲାଇ ମାସ ଆରମ୍ଭ ହେବା ସୀମାରେ ପହଞ୍ଚିଛି। ଭାରତରେ ୧ ଜୁଲାଇ ୨୦୨୬ରୁ ଅନେକ ଗୁରୁତ୍ୱପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଆର୍ଥିକ ନିୟମ ବଦଳିବାକୁ ଯାଉଛି, ଯାହାର ସିଧାସଳଖ ପ୍ରଭାବ ଗ୍ରାହକ ଏବଂ କରଦାତାଙ୍କ ଉପରେ ପଡ଼ିବ। ଏହି ନୂଆ ନିୟମଗୁଡ଼ିକ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ୟୁପିଆଇ (UPI) ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ପିଏଫ (PF) ପ୍ରତ୍ୟାହାର ଠାରୁ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରି ମହଙ୍ଗା ଭତ୍ତା (DA) ବୃଦ୍ଧି ଏବଂ ଏଲ୍ପିଜି (LPG) ସିଲିଣ୍ଡରର ମୂଲ୍ୟରେ ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତନ ଭଳି ଅନେକ ଜିନିଷ ସାମିଲ ହେବାର ଆଶା ରହିଛି। ଆସନ୍ତୁ ଜାଣିବା ୧ ଜୁଲାଇ ୨୦୨୬ରୁ କେଉଁ କେଉଁ ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତନ ହେବାକୁ ଯାଉଛି।
ଚାକିରିଆ ଏବଂ ବିନା ଅଡିଟ୍ବାଲା ଟ୍ୟାକ୍ସପେୟାର୍ସ (କରଦାତା)ଙ୍କ ପାଇଁ ସାଲାରୀଡ ଇନକମ ଟ୍ୟାକ୍ସ ରିଟର୍ଣ୍ଣ (ITR-1 ଏବଂ ITR-2) ଦାଖଲ କରିବାର ଶେଷ ତାରିଖ ହେଉଛି ୩୧ ଜୁଲାଇ। ଅର୍ଥାତ୍‌ ଦରମା ପାଉଥିବା କର୍ମଚାରୀ ଏବଂ ସେହି ଲୋକମାନେ ଯେଉଁମାନଙ୍କର ଆୟ କ୍ୟାପିଟାଲ ଗେନ୍ସ (Capital Gains), ହାଉସ ପ୍ରପର୍ଟି କିମ୍ବା ଅନ୍ୟ କୌଣସି ଅଣ-ବ୍ୟବସାୟିକ ଆୟରୁ ହୋଇଥାଏ ଯେଉଁଥିପାଇଁ ଅଡିଟର ଆବଶ୍ୟକତା ନାହିଁ, ସେମାନଙ୍କୁ ITR-1 ଏବଂ ITR-2 ଫର୍ମ ପୂରଣ କରିବାକୁ ହେବ।
୧ ଜୁଲାଇରୁ ନୂଆ ଆର୍ଥିକ ବର୍ଷର ଦ୍ୱିତୀୟ ତ୍ରୈମାସିକ ଆରମ୍ଭ ହେବାକୁ ଯାଉଛି। ଏହି ଅବସରରେ HDFC ବ୍ୟାଙ୍କ ନିଜର Regalia Gold ଏବଂ Diners Club Privilege କ୍ରେଡିଟ କାର୍ଡର ନିୟମରେ କିଛି ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତନ କରିବାକୁ ଯାଉଛି। ପୂର୍ବରୁ ଲାଗୁ ହୋଇସାରିଥିବା କିଛି ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତନ ବ୍ୟତୀତ, ୧ ଜୁଲାଇ ୨୦୨ରୁ ଏୟାରପୋର୍ଟ ଲାଉଞ୍ଜ ଆକ୍ସେସ (Airport Lounge Access) ସହିତ ଜଡ଼ିତ ନୂଆ ନିୟମ ଲାଗୁ ହେବ।
ପ୍ରତି ମାସର ପହିଲା ତାରିଖ ଭଳି ୧ ଜୁଲାଇରେ ମଧ୍ୟ ତୈଳ ବିପଣନ କମ୍ପାନୀଗୁଡ଼ିକ (OMCs) ଏଲ୍ପିଜି ସିଲିଣ୍ଡର, ସିଏନଜି ଏବେ ପିଏନଜି ମୂଲ୍ୟର ସମୀକ୍ଷା କରିବେ। ଏହି ସମୟରେ ଘରୋଇ ଏବଂ ବ୍ୟାବସାୟିକ (କମର୍ସିଆଲ) ସିଲିଣ୍ଡର ଦରରେ ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତନ ଦେଖିବାକୁ ମିଳିପାରେ। ଏହା ସହିତ ଏୟାର୍‌ ଟରବାଇନ ଫ୍ୟୁଏଲ (ATF) ପାଇଁ ମଧ୍ୟ ନୂଆ ଦର ଜାରି କରାଯିବ, ଯାହାର ବିମାନ ଟିକେଟ ମୂଲ୍ୟ ଉପରେ ବଡ଼ ପ୍ରଭାବ ପଡ଼ିବ।
ୟୁପିଆଇ (UPI) ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ପ୍ରତ୍ୟାହାର କରାଯାଇପାରିବ ପିଏଫ (PF)
୧ ଜୁଲାଇରୁ ୟୁପିଆଇ ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ପିଏଫ ଟଙ୍କା ଉଠାଇବା ଏଟିଏମରୁ କ୍ୟାଶ ଉଠାଇବା ଭଳି ସହଜ ହୋଇଯିବ। କର୍ମଚାରୀ ଭବିଷ୍ୟନିଧି ସଂଗଠନ (EPFO) ଜୁଲାଇ ମାସରେ ନିଜର ନୂଆ ଡିଜିଟାଲ ପ୍ଲାଟଫର୍ମ ‘EPFO 3.0’ ଲଞ୍ଚ କରିବାକୁ ଯାଉଛି ବୋଲି ଆଶା କରାଯାଉଛି।
ବିଦେଶ ମନ୍ତ୍ରଣାଳୟ ଏକ ଦଶନ୍ଧିରୁ ଅଧିକ ସମୟ ପରେ ପାସପୋର୍ଟ ଫି’ରେ ବଡ଼ ଧରଣର ବୃଦ୍ଧି କରିଛି। ୧ ଜୁଲାଇରୁ ଲାଗୁ ହେବାକୁ ଥିବା ନୂଆ ନିୟମ ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ୩୬-ପୃଷ୍ଠା ବିଶିଷ୍ଟ ନୂଆ କିମ୍ବା ପୁନଃ-ଜାରି (ରି-ଇସ୍ୟୁ) ପାସପୋର୍ଟର ଫି’ ୧୫୦୦ ଟଙ୍କାରୁ ବୃଦ୍ଧି ପାଇ ୨୫୦୦ ଟଙ୍କା ହେବ। ଅର୍ଥାତ୍‌ ଏଥିରେ ସିଧାସଳଖ ୧୦୦୦ ଟଙ୍କା ବୃଦ୍ଧି କରାଯାଇଛି। ସେହିପରି, ତତ୍କାଳ ସେବା (Tatkal Service) ପାଇଁ ଏବେ ପୂର୍ବର ୩୫୦୦ ଟଙ୍କା ବଦଳରେ ୫୦୦୦ ଟଙ୍କା ଦେବାକୁ ପଡ଼ିବ। ୬୦-ପୃଷ୍ଠା ବିଶିଷ୍ଟ ଜମ୍ବୋ ପାସପୋର୍ଟର ଫି’ ମଧ୍ୟ ବୃଦ୍ଧି କରାଯାଇ ୬୦୦୦ଟଙ୍କା ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ କରାଯିବ।
୧ ଜୁଲାଇରୁ ବିନା ଟିକେଟରେ ଯାତ୍ରା କଲେ ଦୁଇଗୁଣା ଜରିମାନା ଦେବାକୁ ପଡ଼ିବ। ନୂଆ ନିୟମ ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ଜରିମାନା ରାଶିକୁ ୨୫୦ ଟଙ୍କାରୁ ବୃଦ୍ଧି କରି ୫୦୦ ଟଙ୍କା କରାଯାଉଛି। ଏହା ସହିତ ଏବେଠାରୁ ଯଦି କୌଣସି ପୁରୁଷ ଯାତ୍ରୀ ମହିଳା କୋଚରେ ଯାତ୍ରା କରୁଥିବା ଜଣାପଡ଼ନ୍ତି, ତେବେ ତାଙ୍କ ଉପରେ ୨୫୦୦ ଟଙ୍କା ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ଜରିମାନା ଲଗାଯାଇପାରେ।
UIDAI ନାଗରିକମାନଙ୍କୁ ଏକ ବଡ଼ ଆଶ୍ୱସ୍ତି ଦେଇ ୧ ଜୁଲାଇରୁ ଆସନ୍ତା ଛଅ ମାସ ପାଇଁ ଆଧାର ଅପଡେଟ୍‌କୁ ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ମାଗଣା କରିଦେଇଛି। ପୂର୍ବରୁ ଆଧାରରେ ନାମ, ଠିକଣା, ଜନ୍ମ ତାରିଖ, ମୋବାଇଲ ନମ୍ବର ଏବଂ ଇମେଲ ବଦଳାଇବା ପାଇଁ ୭୫ ଟଙ୍କା ଦେବାକୁ ପଡ଼ୁଥିଲା।

Odisha’s No.1 Odia Daily

The post ସାବଧାନ! ୧ ଜୁଲାଇରୁ ବଦଳିଯିବ ଏହି ସବୁ ନିୟମ; ମହଙ୍ଗା ପଡ଼ିବ ନା ଆଶ୍ୱସ୍ତି ମିଳିବ? ଜାଣନ୍ତୁ… appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: Operation Sindoor: ऑपरेशन सिंदूरमधील शहीदांची नावे पहिल्यांदाच जाहीर; राष्ट्रीय युद्ध स्मारकाच्या ‘रोल ऑफ ऑनर’ यादीत समावेश
description: नवी दिल्ली वृत्तसंस्था | New Delhi‘ऑपरेशन सिंदूर’मध्येभारतीय जवानांनी भीमपराक्रम गाजवत पाकिस्तानला त्याची जागा दाखवून दिली. भारतीय जवानांच्या आक्रमणासमोर पाकिस्तानने अक्षरशः गुडघे टेकले आणि युद्धविरामाची अक्षरश: भीक मागितली. या ऑपरेशनदरम्यान आपल्या प्राणाची पर्वा न करता लढलेल्या ६ जवानांना हौतात्म्य आले. या शहीदांची नावे पहिल्यांदाच अधिकृतपणे जाहीर करण्यात आली असून त्यांना वीरता पुरस्काराने सन्मानित करण्यात आले आहे. […]
content:
नवी दिल्ली वृत्तसंस्था | New Delhi‘ऑपरेशन सिंदूर’मध्येभारतीय जवानांनी भीमपराक्रम गाजवत पाकिस्तानला त्याची जागा दाखवून दिली. भारतीय जवानांच्या आक्रमणासमोर पाकिस्तानने अक्षरशः गुडघे टेकले आणि युद्धविरामाची अक्षरश: भीक मागितली. या ऑपरेशनदरम्यान आपल्या प्राणाची पर्वा न करता लढलेल्या ६ जवानांना हौतात्म्य आले. या शहीदांची नावे पहिल्यांदाच अधिकृतपणे जाहीर करण्यात आली असून त्यांना वीरता पुरस्काराने सन्मानित करण्यात आले आहे.



रायफलमॅन सुनील कुमार यांना मरणोत्तर ‘वीर चक्र’ प्रदान करून सन्मानित करण्यात आले तर सार्जंट सुरेंद्र कुमार यांना ‘वायु पदक’ प्रदान करून सन्मानित करण्यात आले आहे. देशासाठी सर्वोच्च बलिदान देणाऱ्या या वीरांमध्ये, सुभेदार मेजर पवन कुमार, रायफलमॅन सुनील कुमार, लांस नायक दिनेश कुमार, अग्निवीर मूळ मुरली नायक, हवालदार सुनील कुमार सिंह आणि सार्जेंट सुरेंद्र कुमार यांचा समावेश आहे. संरक्षण सूत्रांनुसार, यातील बहुतेक जवान जम्मू आणि काश्मीरमधील मोहिमेदरम्यान शहीद झाले.




Indian military has updated India's National War Memorial with all military casualties of Op Sindoor.Meanwhile Pakistani military in an effort to hide its huge casulaties in war with Taliban, Baloch rebels as well as LoC skirmishes from 2016-2020, has turned down Pak PMO… https://t.co/SA1SjdnlFW pic.twitter.com/jcsCupy0kj— WLVN (@TheLegateIN) June 25, 2026




मिळालेल्या माहितीनुसार, भारत सरकारने ऑपरेशन सिंदूरमध्ये राष्ट्रासाठी सर्वोच्च बलिदान देणाऱ्या सहा शूर जवानांची नावे प्रथमच जाहीर केली आहेत. या सर्व शहीदांसाठी दिल्लीतील राष्ट्रीय युद्ध स्मारकात एक जागा निश्चित करण्यात आली आहे, जिथे त्यांची नावे विशेष ग्रॅनाइट विटांवर कायमस्वरूपी कोरली जातील. या सहा शहीदांमध्ये भारतीय लष्कराचे पाच जवान आणि भारतीय हवाई दलाचे एक सार्जंट यांचा समावेश आहे.



Ram Mandir Donation Case: राम मंदिराच्या दान चोरी प्रकरणी मोठी घडामोड; चंपत राय, अनिल मिश्रांचा तडकाफडकी राजीनामा



यांपैकी, सुभेदार मेजर पवन कुमार हे १० इन्फंट्री ब्रिगेड मुख्यालयात, रायफलमॅन सुनील कुमार हे ४ जम्मू-काश्मीर लाइट इन्फंट्रीत, लांस नायक दिनेश कुमार हे ५ फील्ड रेजिमेंटमध्ये, अग्निवीर मूल मुरली नायक हे ८५१ लाइट रेजिमेंटमध्ये, हवालदार सुनील कुमार सिंह हे २३७ फील्ड वर्कशॉपमध्ये आणि सार्जेंट सुरेंद्र कुमार हे भारतीय हवाई दलाच्या ३९ विंगमध्ये तैनात होते. या सर्व हुतात्म्यांची नावे नॅशनल वॉर मेमोरियलच्या वेबसाईटवरही जोडण्यात आली आहेत. ‘त्याग चक्र’मधील एका विशेष विटेवरही त्यांची नावे लिहिली जातील. राष्ट्रपती द्रौपदी मुर्मू यांनी रायफलमॅन सुनील कुमार यांच्या कुटुंबीयांना मरणोत्तर वीर चक्र प्रदान केले.

title: ‘ସୂର୍ଯ୍ୟବଂଶୀଙ୍କ ଉପରେ ଖୁବ ଶୀଘ୍ର ବଢ଼ିବ ଚାପ, ତେଣୁ ଏବେ…’: ଭାଇରାଲ ହେଉଛି ଅଶ୍ୱିନଙ୍କ ବିଶେଷ ଉପଦେଶ
description:
ନୂଆଦିଲ୍ଲୀ,୨୬।୬: ପୂର୍ବତନ ଭାରତୀୟ ସ୍ପିନର ରବିଚନ୍ଦ୍ରନ ଅଶ୍ୱିନ ଯୁବ ବ୍ୟାଟସମ୍ୟାନ ବୈଭବ ସୂର୍ଯ୍ୟବଂଶୀଙ୍କୁ ମୂଲ୍ୟବାନ ପରାମର୍ଶ ଦେଇ କହିଛନ୍ତି ଯେ ଏହି ପର୍ଯ୍ୟାୟରେ ସେ କୌଣସି ଚାପ ବିନା ତାଙ୍କ ଖେଳକୁ ଉପଭୋଗ କରିବା ଉଚିତ। ସେ ବିଶ୍ୱାସ କରନ୍ତି ଯେ ୧୫ ବର୍ଷ ବୟସରେ, କେବଳ କ୍ରିକେଟ ଉପଭୋଗ କରିବା ସର୍ବୋପରି, କାରଣ ଏହି ଖେଳ ଶେଷରେ ଏକ ଦାୟିତ୍ୱ ଏବଂ ଏକ ବୃତ୍ତିରେ ପରିଣତ ହେବ। ବିବିସିର ‘ଷ୍ଟମ୍ପଡ’ ପଡକାଷ୍ଟରେ କଥା ହୋଇ ଅଶ୍ୱିନ […]
The post ‘ସୂର୍ଯ୍ୟବଂଶୀଙ୍କ ଉପରେ ଖୁବ ଶୀଘ୍ର ବଢ଼ିବ ଚାପ, ତେଣୁ ଏବେ…’: ଭାଇରାଲ ହେଉଛି ଅଶ୍ୱିନଙ୍କ ବିଶେଷ ଉପଦେଶ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ନୂଆଦିଲ୍ଲୀ,୨୬।୬: ପୂର୍ବତନ ଭାରତୀୟ ସ୍ପିନର ରବିଚନ୍ଦ୍ରନ ଅଶ୍ୱିନ ଯୁବ ବ୍ୟାଟସମ୍ୟାନ ବୈଭବ ସୂର୍ଯ୍ୟବଂଶୀଙ୍କୁ ମୂଲ୍ୟବାନ ପରାମର୍ଶ ଦେଇ କହିଛନ୍ତି ଯେ ଏହି ପର୍ଯ୍ୟାୟରେ ସେ କୌଣସି ଚାପ ବିନା ତାଙ୍କ ଖେଳକୁ ଉପଭୋଗ କରିବା ଉଚିତ। ସେ ବିଶ୍ୱାସ କରନ୍ତି ଯେ ୧୫ ବର୍ଷ ବୟସରେ, କେବଳ କ୍ରିକେଟ ଉପଭୋଗ କରିବା ସର୍ବୋପରି, କାରଣ ଏହି ଖେଳ ଶେଷରେ ଏକ ଦାୟିତ୍ୱ ଏବଂ ଏକ ବୃତ୍ତିରେ ପରିଣତ ହେବ। ବିବିସିର ‘ଷ୍ଟମ୍ପଡ’ ପଡକାଷ୍ଟରେ କଥା ହୋଇ ଅଶ୍ୱିନ କହିଛନ୍ତି, ‘ସେ କେବଳ ୧୫ ବର୍ଷ ବୟସର। ମୋ ମତରେ, ତାଙ୍କ ଜନ୍ମଭୂମିରେ ବନ୍ଧୁମାନଙ୍କ ସହିତ ଖେଳିବା ସମୟରେ ତାଙ୍କୁ ସମାନ ସ୍ବାଧୀନତା ସହିତ ଖେଳିବା ଉଚିତ। ଚାପ ବିନା ଖେଳିବା ପାଇଁ ତାଙ୍କ ପାଖରେ ଅଧିକ ସମୟ ନାହିଁ। ଏକ ସମୟ ଆସିବ ଯେତେବେଳେ କ୍ରିକେଟ ତାଙ୍କ ପାଇଁ ଏକ ବୃତ୍ତି ହୋଇଯିବ ଏବଂ ଦାୟିତ୍ୱ ବୃଦ୍ଧି ପାଇବ। କିନ୍ତୁ ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନ ପାଇଁ, ମୁଁ ଚାହେଁ ଯେ ସେ ଖେଳ ଉପଭୋଗ କରନ୍ତୁ ଏବଂ ତାଙ୍କ ବ୍ୟାଟିଂ ଦ୍ୱାରା ସମସ୍ତଙ୍କୁ ମନୋରଞ୍ଜନ କରନ୍ତୁ।’
ଅଶ୍ୱିନ ବୈଭବ ସୂର୍ଯ୍ୟବଂଶୀଙ୍କ ବ୍ୟାଟିଂର ମଧ୍ୟ ପ୍ରଶଂସା କରିଛନ୍ତି। ସେ ଉଲ୍ଲେଖ କରିଛନ୍ତି ଯେ ବୈଭବ କେବଳ ଜଣେ ବ୍ୟାଟସମ୍ୟାନ ନୁହଁନ୍ତି ଯିଏ ବଡ଼ ବଡ଼ ଛକା ମାରିଥାନ୍ତି; ସେ ମ୍ୟାଚ ପରିସ୍ଥିତି ଅନୁସାରେ ତାଙ୍କ ଖେଳକୁ କିପରି ଅନୁକୂଳ କରିବେ ତାହା ମଧ୍ୟ ଜାଣନ୍ତି। ଏହା ହିଁ ତାଙ୍କୁ ଅନ୍ୟ ଯୁବ ଖେଳାଳିମାନଙ୍କଠାରୁ ଭିନ୍ନ କରିଥାଏ। ଅଶ୍ୱିନ ଆହୁରି ମଧ୍ୟ କହିଛନ୍ତି, ‘ମୁଁ ଭାବୁଛି ସେ ଜଣେ ବିଶେଷ ଖେଳାଳି। ଯେତେବେଳେ ଅସାଧାରଣ ପ୍ରତିଭା ଆର୍ବିଭାବ ହୁଏ, ତୁମେ ଏହାକୁ ତୁରନ୍ତ ଚିହ୍ନିପାର। କେବଳ ବଡ଼ ସଟ ହିଁ ମୋତେ ତାଙ୍କ ବ୍ୟାଟିଂ ବିଷୟରେ ପ୍ରଭାବିତ କରିନଥିଲା, ବରଂ ଅଭିଜ୍ଞ ବୋଲରମାନଙ୍କ ବିରୁଦ୍ଧରେ ସେ ତାଙ୍କର ଖେଳକୁ ସଜାଡ଼ିବା ବୁଦ୍ଧିମତ୍ତା ମଧ୍ୟ ମୋତେ ପ୍ରଭାବିତ କରିଥିଲା।’
ବୈଭବ ସୂର୍ଯ୍ୟବଂଶୀ ସମ୍ପ୍ରତି ଭାରତୀୟ ଦଳରେ ପ୍ରଥମ ଥର ପାଇଁ ଡାକରା ପାଇଛନ୍ତି ଏବଂ ବେଲଫାଷ୍ଟରେ ଆୟର୍ଲାଣ୍ଡ ବିପକ୍ଷରେ ତାଙ୍କର ଟି-୨୦ ଅନ୍ତର୍ଜାତୀୟ ଡେବ୍ୟୁ କରିପାରିବେ। ତଥାପି, ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନ ତାଙ୍କର ପ୍ଲେଇଂ ଏକାଦଶରେ ସ୍ଥାନ ପାଇବାର ସମ୍ଭାବନା କ୍ଷୀଣ ଦେଖାଯାଉଛି, କାରଣ ଦଳ ପୂର୍ବରୁ ସଞ୍ଜୁ ସାମସନ ଏବଂ ଅଭିଷେକ ଶର୍ମାଙ୍କ ପରି ପ୍ରତିଷ୍ଠିତ ଓପନର ଅଛନ୍ତି। ତଥାପି, ଯଦି କୌଣସି ଖେଳାଳି ଆଘାତ ପାଆନ୍ତି କିମ୍ବା ଅନୁପଲବ୍ଧ ହୁଅନ୍ତି ତେବେ ତାଙ୍କୁ ସୁଯୋଗ ମିଳିପାରେ।
ଅଶ୍ୱିନ ବିଦେଶୀ ଫ୍ରାଞ୍ଚାଇଜ ଲିଗରେ ଅଂଶଗ୍ରହଣ କରୁଥିବା ଭାରତୀୟ ଖେଳାଳିମାନଙ୍କ ବିଷୟରେ ମଧ୍ୟ ତାଙ୍କର ମତାମତ ଶେୟାର କରିଛନ୍ତି। ସେ ବିଶ୍ୱାସ କରନ୍ତି ଯେ, ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନର ପରିସ୍ଥିତିକୁ ଦୃଷ୍ଟିରେ ରଖି, ସକ୍ରିୟ ଭାରତୀୟ କ୍ରିକେଟରମାନଙ୍କ ପାଇଁ IPL ବ୍ୟତୀତ ଅନ୍ୟ ଲିଗରେ ଖେଳିବା କଷ୍ଟକର। ସେ କହିଛନ୍ତି ଯେ, ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନ ପାଇଁ, ଏପରି ଅନୁମତି କେବଳ ସେହି ଖେଳାଳିମାନଙ୍କୁ ଦିଆଯାଇଛି ଯେଉଁମାନେ ଅବସର ନେଇସାରିଛନ୍ତି କିମ୍ବା ଜାତୀୟ ଦଳ ପାଇଁ ବିବାଦରୁ ବାହାରେ ଅଛନ୍ତି। ଅଶ୍ୱିନ ନିଜେ ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନ ଆମେରିକାରେ ମେଜର ଲିଗ କ୍ରିକେଟରେ ଖେଳୁଛନ୍ତି।
ଏହି ବିଷୟରେ କହିବାକୁ ଗଲେ, ଅଶ୍ୱିନ କହିଛନ୍ତି, ‘ମୋର ସିଧା ଉତ୍ତର ହେଉଛି – ନା। ଖେଳର ଆର୍ଥିକ ବ୍ୟବସ୍ଥା ଏଠାରେ ଏକ ପ୍ରମୁଖ ଭୂମିକା ଗ୍ରହଣ କରେ। IPL ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନ ବିଶ୍ୱର ସବୁଠାରୁ ଶକ୍ତିଶାଳୀ ଲିଗ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଅନ୍ୟତମ। ଭାରତୀୟ ଖେଳାଳିଙ୍କ ଲୋକପ୍ରିୟତା ଏବଂ ଗୁଣବତ୍ତା ଦେଖି, ମୁଁ ଭାବୁନାହିଁ ଯେ ବୋର୍ଡ ସେମାନଙ୍କୁ ଅନ୍ୟ ଫ୍ରାଞ୍ଚାଇଜ ଲିଗରେ ଖେଳିବାକୁ ଅନୁମତି ଦେବ। ହଁ, ଭବିଷ୍ୟତରେ, ଆମେ ନିଶ୍ଚିତ ଭାବରେ କିଛି ମନୋନୀତ ଖେଳାଳିଙ୍କୁ ଅନ୍ୟ ଲିଗରେ ପ୍ରତିଯୋଗିତା କରୁଥିବା ଦେଖିପାରିବୁ।’

Dharitri – Odisha’s No.1 Odia Daily

The post ‘ସୂର୍ଯ୍ୟବଂଶୀଙ୍କ ଉପରେ ଖୁବ ଶୀଘ୍ର ବଢ଼ିବ ଚାପ, ତେଣୁ ଏବେ…’: ଭାଇରାଲ ହେଉଛି ଅଶ୍ୱିନଙ୍କ ବିଶେଷ ଉପଦେଶ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

Srinagar, June 26: Mirwaiz-e-Kashmir Dr. Moulvi Umar Farooq paid tributes to Hazrat Imam Hussain (RA) and the martyrs of Karbala on the occasion of Youm-e-Ashoora, describing their sacrifice as an enduring lesson in truth, principles, patience and steadfastness.
In a post on X, Mirwaiz Umar Farooq wrote, On Youm-e-Ashoora, We remember Hazrat Imam Hussain (RA) and the martyrs of Karbala, whose sacrifice remains an eternal lesson in truth, principles patience and steadfastness. Karbala reminds us that power fades, but faith, sacrifice and moral courage endure."

title: LG Sinha Joins Ashura Procession at Zadibal, Offers Chaddar to Zuljinah
description:
Srinagar, June 26 : Lieutenant Governor Manoj Sinha on Friday joined the Youm-e-Ashura procession at Zadibal in Srinagar, where he paid rich tributes to the supreme sacrifice of Imam Hussain (AS) and his companions.
The Lieutenant Governor, as per the news agency—Kashmir News Observer (KNO), participated in the solemn procession and was presented with a black armband by mourners as a mark of respect during the observance of Youm-e-Ashura.
Later, Sinha offered a chaddar to Zuljinah at Zadibal, joining thousands of mourners participating in the traditional Ashura rituals.
On the occasion, the Lieutenant Governor paid homage to the martyrs of Karbala and highlighted the enduring values of truth, justice, sacrifice and compassion exemplified by Imam Hussain (AS). He also prayed for lasting peace, communal harmony and prosperity in Jammu and Kashmir.—(KNO)

title: Ram Mandir Donation Case: राम मंदिराच्या दान चोरी प्रकरणी मोठी घडामोड; चंपत राय, अनिल मिश्रांचा तडकाफडकी राजीनामा
description: नवी दिल्ली वृत्तसंस्था | New Delhiअयोध्या येथील भव्य राम मंदिराच्या(AyodhyaRamMandir) दान चोरी प्रकरणाला आता अत्यंत नाट्यमय आणि मोठे वळण मिळाले आहे. राम मंदिर ट्रस्टमधील दोन सर्वात प्रभावी आणि मुख्य पदाधिकाऱ्यांनी आपल्या पदाचा राजीनामा दिल्याचा खळबळजनक वृत्त समोर आले आहे. राम जन्मभूमी ट्रस्टचे सदस्य, चंपत राय(ChampatRai) आणि अनिल मिश्रा(AnilMishra) यांनी राजीनामा(Resign) दिला आहे. घोटाळ्याची चौकशी करण्यासाठी […]
content:
नवी दिल्ली वृत्तसंस्था | New Delhiअयोध्या येथील भव्य राम मंदिराच्या(AyodhyaRamMandir) दान चोरी प्रकरणाला आता अत्यंत नाट्यमय आणि मोठे वळण मिळाले आहे. राम मंदिर ट्रस्टमधील दोन सर्वात प्रभावी आणि मुख्य पदाधिकाऱ्यांनी आपल्या पदाचा राजीनामा दिल्याचा खळबळजनक वृत्त समोर आले आहे. राम जन्मभूमी ट्रस्टचे सदस्य, चंपत राय(ChampatRai) आणि अनिल मिश्रा(AnilMishra) यांनी राजीनामा(Resign) दिला आहे. घोटाळ्याची चौकशी करण्यासाठी नेमलेल्या एसआयटीच्या प्राथमिक अहवालातील कडक शिफारशींनंतर हा महत्त्वपूर्ण निर्णय घेण्यात आला आहे.



अयोध्या येथील राम मंदिरातील चोरीच्या पार्श्वभूमीवर, ट्रस्टचे सदस्य चंपत राय आणि अनिल मिश्रा यांनी नैतिक कारणास्तव राजीनामा दिला आहे. चंपत राय हे राम जन्मभूमी तीर्थ क्षेत्र ट्रस्टचे सरचिटणीस होते आणि अनिल मिश्रा हे देखील ट्रस्टचे सदस्य होते. विरोधी पक्षाने या प्रकरणात सातत्याने चंपत राय यांचे नाव उपस्थित करून त्यांच्या राजीनाम्याची मागणी केली होती. मात्र आता चंपत राय आणि अनिल मिश्रा या दोघांनीही महंत नृत्य गोपाल दास यांच्याकडे आपले राजीनामे सादर केले आहेत.



चंपत राय आणि अनिल मिश्रा यांनी तडकाफडकी राजीनामा का दिला, याचे अधिकृत कारण अद्याप ट्रस्टकडून स्पष्ट करण्यात आलेले नाही. मात्र, राष्ट्रीय स्वयंसेवक संघ आणि विश्व हिंदू परिषद यांच्याकडून वाढलेल्या प्रचंड दबावामुळेच चंपत राय यांना राजीनामा द्यावा लागल्याची जोरदार चर्चा राजकीय वर्तुळात आहे.



विशेष म्हणजे, या दान चोरी प्रकरणाची चौकशी व्यापक व्हावी, अशी मागणी स्वतः विश्व हिंदू परिषदेचे अध्यक्ष आलोक कुमार यांनी केली होती. “चंपत राय, अनिल मिश्रा आणि गोपाल राव यांचीही या प्रकरणात सखोल चौकशी व्हावी, कोणालाही चौकशीतून वगळले जाऊ नये,” अशी आक्रमक भूमिका आलोक कुमार यांनी घेतली होती. दुसरीकडे, विरोधकही सातत्याने चंपत राय यांच्यावर कारवाई का होत नाही? आणि त्यांचा राजीनामा का घेतला जात नाही? असा सवाल करत राम मंदिर ट्रस्टला घेरण्याचा प्रयत्न करत होते.



Nashik Police News: चित्रपटात ‘धुरंधर’ चालतो, नाशिकमध्ये फक्त कायदा; टवाळखोरांना पोलिसांचा अनोख्या स्टाइलने दणका



आठ जणांवर गुन्हे दाखलश्री राम जन्मभूमी तीर्थ क्षेत्र ट्रस्टचे विश्वस्त कृष्ण मोहन यांच्या तक्रारीवरून राम जन्मभूमी पोलीस ठाण्यात आठ जणांविरुद्ध गुन्हा दाखल करण्यात आला आहे. एफआयआरमध्ये राम शंकर यादव उर्फ ​​टिनू, अनुकल्प मिश्रा, लवकुश मिश्रा, करुणेश पांडे, अविनाश शुक्ला, मनीष यादव, राम शंकर मिश्रा आणि सुभाष चंद्र श्रीवास्तव यांची नावे आहेत. त्यांच्याविरुद्ध अपहार, फसवणूक आणि गुन्हेगारी कट रचण्याशी संबंधित कलमांखाली गुन्हा दाखल करण्यात आला आहे.



या सर्व आठही आरोपींना पोलिसांनी आधीच अटक केली असून त्यांची कसून चौकशी सुरू आहे. या आरोपींच्या चौकशीत कोणती धक्कादायक माहिती समोर आली आणि त्यामुळेच तर चंपत राय यांना राजीनामा द्यावा लागला नाही ना? या आता चर्चांना उधाण आले आहे. या राजीनाम्यामागचे खरे कारण लवकरच अधिकृतपणे समोर येण्याची शक्यता आहे.



काय आहे प्रकरण?अयोध्येतील राम मंदिरातील दान केलेल्या वस्तूंची चोरी होत असल्याची टीका समाजवादी पक्ष आणि आम आदमी पार्टीने केला होता. यानंतर, उत्तर प्रदेश सरकारने एसआयटी स्थापन केली. त्यांच्या तपासादरम्यान अशी प्राथमिक माहिती मिळाली की, रोकड, सोन्या-चांदीचे दागिने असा तब्बल 3,500 कोटी रुपयांच्या मुद्देमालाची नोंद नसल्याचे धक्कदायक बाब समोर आली. श्री राम मंदिरातून दान केलेल्या वस्तूंची कथित चोरी प्रकरणी एसआयटीच्या प्राथमिक अहवालाने व्यवस्थेवर प्रश्नचिन्ह निर्माण केले. या अहवालात घटनास्थळावरील परिस्थिती, 150 हून अधिक लोकांची चौकशी, सीसीटीव्ही फुटेज आणि सध्याची व्यवस्था यांचा समावेश आहे. प्रत्येकाच्या भूमिकेचा उल्लेख आहे. पण, कोणालाही थेट जबाबदार धरण्यात आलेले नाही. सविस्तर अहवालातून प्रत्येक व्यक्तीची जबाबदारी निश्चित होऊ शकते.

title: Underweight Deliveries, Heavy Questions As Consumers Raise Red Flags
description: Deceiving to sell: Small weight discrepancies, missing product details, and recurring consumer complaints expose growing transparency gaps in quick commerce, raising questions about accountability and fair business practices.
content: Deceiving to sell: Convenience has quietly become an addiction. Why step out for everyday essentials when a quick commerce app can drop them at your door in minutes? But in the rush to make life easier, there is something we are not noticing — in the name of convenience, we may be buying health hazards too.That is exactly why Times Now Digital is running a consumer rights protection campaign, asking quick commerce platforms to be fair and transparent with their customers. One of the most hazardous and unethical practices we are flagging is the failure to clearly display the manufacturing and expiry dates of perishable products, among other lapses. Times Now Digital reached out to Zepto, Blinkit, Instamart, Flipkart Minutes, and Amazon to understand why manufacturing and expiry dates are not displayed on their platforms. None of them responded. On a basic consumer-safety question — what's the manufacturing date? When does it expire? So far, there has been no response to these basic consumer-safety questions. The campaign's core focus is transparency — and a big part of transparency comes down to a simple test: what you ordered versus what you get.We got in touch with some loyal customers of quick commerce platforms to find out whether they had run into transparency issues, recently or in the past, and whether those problems kept recurring. One regular user pointed to what they described as another major concern.In a recent incident under our investigation, the customer from the Delhi NCR area ordered vegetables from Zepto. When the order arrived, they grew curious because the carrots looked lighter than expected. On weighing them, they found the quantity was lower than what was listed on the platform: the carrots were supposed to weigh between 200 and 300 grams, but the package came in at just 196 grams.Although the discrepancy was not large, it was enough to raise concern. The customer then weighed the other vegetable packs in the order, and to their surprise, every one weighed less than the quantity listed on the platform.According to the customer, a pack of onions listed at between 900 grams and 1 kilogram weighed 859 grams. A pack of tomatoes listed at 500 grams weighed 460 grams, while a cucumber pack listed at between 500 and 600 grams weighed 490 grams.                          While the differences may appear small on a single order, the customer questioned whether consumers are consistently receiving the quantities they pay for and whether greater transparency is needed from quick commerce platforms.Issue Raised With The Zepto Support TeamWhen the issue was raised with the platform, and after several exchanges of messages and images, another problem came to light: the customer was unable to upload images directly to the platform due to an error. This too was flagged to the support executive, which ultimately led the customer to email the images to the Zepto support team.                          After a long discussion lasting about 25 minutes, the company offered a refund of Rs 45. The customer repeatedly questioned how a delivery in which the weight of the vegetables did not match the weight listed on the website could be settled with a refund alone. Not everybody is going to weigh their vegetables every day, the customer argued, and so such discrepancies may go unnoticed. The customer further pointed out that the issue was not limited to a single packet of vegetables.Despite these concerns, the support team maintained that it could only provide a refund and said the matter would be escalated to “higher authorities”.This is not the first time a quick commerce customer has faced such an issue. Several people have come forward on social media with similar complaints about the weight of fruits and vegetables on other platforms like Swiggy Instamart and Blinkit, among others.                        Similar Incidents Against Quick Comms Raised In PastPreviously, one customer shared his frustration with Blinkit on Reddit, alleging that he had received significantly less than the quantity he had paid for. He shared an image of a grape order and claimed the package weighed less than the amount listed on the platform, adding that he had encountered similar issues with Blinkit deliveries before. The user claimed that a 500 gm pack of grapes weighed just 395 grams, including the packaging.              In another incident, a Reddit user claimed that Swiggy Instamart had delivered underweight vegetables, sharing photos and screenshots of conversations with customer support. According to the user, several items in the order weighed less than the quantities listed on the platform: a cauliflower listed at 400–600 grams weighed just 145 grams, while a 250-gram capsicum pack weighed 170 grams and a 1-kg potato order weighed 965 grams.                          Pls check your Blinkit deliveries byu/Jusklickin inindiaGovernment Mandates For Quick Commerce PlatformsThe growing number of complaints about underweight fruit and vegetable deliveries raises serious questions about transparency and accountability in the quick commerce sector. While individual discrepancies may seem minor, but consumers argue that even small shortfalls can add up over time. And these concerns are not new.For at least the past two years, regulators such as the Central Consumer Protection Authority (CCPA) and the Food Safety and Standards Authority of India (FSSAI) have urged e-commerce and quick commerce platforms to clearly display key consumer information, including expiry dates, accurate product weights and other essential details. Despite these directives, transparency-related issues continue to surface. The FSSAI recently said it had issued more than two dozen notices to e-commerce Food Business Operators (FBOs) in recent weeks.Yet many consumers still say they do not receive complete information, or the quantity they paid for, raising fresh questions about how effectively the rules are being enforced across the sector.A few grams of carrots. A Rs 45 refund. Easy enough to shrug off, until you multiply it across millions of orders, every single day. Convenience may be arriving at our doorstep in minutes, but the question worth weighing is this: how much are we quietly handing over in return?

title: Callum Design reinvents Jaguar XJ220 for new era
description:
Ian Callum's design consultancy is poised to reveal its take on the legendary supercar

The eponymous consultancy of acclaimed car designer Ian Callum has reinvented the Jaguar XJ220. 
The new take on the XJ220 has yet to be revealed in full, but a side-profile image published by Callum Design showcases a dramatically different styling direction compared with the original. 
It is notably sharper around its haunches and there is a greater slope at its rear end. 
However, several cues remain intact, including the egg-shaped side windows and air ducts along its flanks.
Callum Design described the reimagined XJ220 as a “concept” and a “design study”, emphasising that there are no concrete plans to build a road-going car. But it added that the project “shows what’s possible” when working with the company, suggesting that a client with enough cash to spend could commission their own car.
The reworked XJ220 is expected to be revealed in full in the coming months. October marks the 35th anniversary of the production XJ220’s unveiling at the Tokyo motor show and that could provide Callum Design a fitting opportunity to celebrate the supercar.
Ian Callum, who was director of design at Jaguar from 1999 to 2019, has in recent years put his own spin on several historic cars. These include the Wood and Pickett Mini and the Aston Martin Vanquish – the latter of which he also originally designed. His consultancy has also been responsible for building a road-legal version of the Jaguar C-X75 concept, the ill-fated successor to the XJ220 and a car originally created while he was Jaguar's design chief.

title: Apple Said to Be Readying iRing to Challenge Samsung Galaxy Ring, Oura Ring

The new model is likely to rival the popular Oura Ring series and Samsung Galaxy Ring. Samsung launched its first smart ring, the Galaxy Ring, in 2024. It costs Rs. 38,999 and is available in nine sizes. Apple's smart ring is expected to offer many health and fitness tracking features.

title: Apple Said to Skip M6 Pro, M6 Max Processors to Prioritise Development of AI-Focused M7 Chipsets
description: Apple's M5 Max and M5 Pro chips power the new MacBook Pro models
content: Apple is revamping its Apple Silicon strategy, according to a report citing people with knowledge of the matter. The company reportedly plans to skip the launch of the M6 Pro and M6 Max processors, which were expected to launch early next year. Instead, the iPhone maker is expected to unveil the rumoured M7 Pro and M7 Max chips. Apple’s high-end M7 series processors are said to debut in 2027. The Apple Silicon M7 Pro and M7 Max chips are claimed to offer more advanced computing and graphics power, which will enable on-device AI capabilities in the future, while allowing them to run more graphics-intensive tasks.

New ‘Gen 2 Evo’ motors made their debut with the Twingo but will be soon be rolled out in larger cars

The Renault 4 and 5 will be updated next year, bringing more efficient and more powerful motors.
The R5 arrived in 2024, and it was followed by the R4, its crossover twin, in early 2025. Both models are based on the AmpR Small platform and use Renault’s second-generation externally excited-synchronous (EESM) motors, which are available in two configurations. 
The R5 Urban Range pairs a 121bhp EESM with a 40kWh battery, while the Comfort Range gets a 148bhp motor and a 52kWh battery pack. In the UK, the larger R4 is only available with the Comfort Range set-up.
These powertrains enable the R5 to deliver a range of either 192 or 252 miles. The latter figure is reduced to 250 miles in the chunkier R4.

Renault is now ready to roll out updated ‘Gen 2 Evo’ motors for the two models, drawing on its learnings from developing third-generation drive units for the next Scenic and Megane that are due in 2028.
“We are still working on how to improve the efficiency and power [of the Gen 2 motors],” said Marianne Bataillon, Renault’s director of EV motor and battery development. “We are going to apply these [changes] at the end of 2026 or beginning of 2027.”
Bataillon highlighted the motor’s inverter and reducers as points of improvement that have netting greater efficiency and improved power outputs.
The new motors will help to keep the R4 and R5 on a par with newer rivals on technical terms. The incoming Volkswagen ID Polo outdoes the R5 in the range stakes, offering either 204 or 283 miles between charges, depending on which powertrain it is fitted with. The same is true of the new Skoda Epiq: it yields either 190 or 272 miles of range, with the higher figure beating the R4.
Renault’s new Gen 2 Evo motor made its debut in the Twingo, which arrives in the UK at the end of this year. In that car, however, its output is reduced to 80bhp, owing to its city-focused remit.

title: Global relief surge reaches Venezuela as death toll hits 235 following catastrophic quakes
description:
Venezuela, June 26 : The death toll in Venezuela following the deadly double earthquakes has risen to 235, while 4,300 people have been injured, health minister Carlos Alvarado said on Thursday evening (local time).
The minister, in an interview with the state television, said that while the injuries include mostly minor cases, many of the serious cases require "surgical intervention." He added that while some of the fatalities were declared "upon arrival" at the hospitals, others showed no "vital signs" of life previously, CNN reported.
"As of 7:00 PM today, we have already attended to more than 4,300 injured people, some minor, most minor, but there are also moderate and serious cases. Many of them have required surgical interventions, and unfortunately, we have received around 235 patients who arrived without vital signs or who died upon arrival at our health facilities," the minister said in the interview, according to CNN.
Meanwhile, humanitarian efforts are underway in Venezuela as hundreds of citizens have volunteered to deliver water, food, medicines, and supplies to the affected communities in Caraballeda and Vargas.
In a post on X, Maria Corina Machado's political party Vente Venezuela stated that as a part of a solidarity response, these volunteers are also collecting water, non-perishable food, medical supplies, clothing, and essential items.
"24 hours have passed since the earthquakes and, in Vargas state, the solidarity of the Venezuelan people is once again breaking through amid the tragedy. Hundreds of motorbike riders have organized to deliver water, food, medicines, and supplies to the affected communities. They are citizens who, without expecting anything in return, have decided to become a bridge of hope for those who need it most today," the post read.
Additionally, the US has assigned its military forces to support the relief efforts in Venezuela. Acting at the direction of the US Department of State, the Southern Command has deployed "C-17 Globemaster and C-130 Hercules transport aircraft" for a major humanitarian airlift operation.
The deployment is designed to provide immediate, high-capacity support to areas hardest hit by the magnitude 7.2 and 7.5 tremors, which have caused widespread structural collapse, significant casualties, and critical infrastructure damage across the nation.
"Delivering relief when every second counts: #SOUTHCOM has directed C-17 Globemaster and C-130 Hercules transport aircraft to support Venezuela earthquake relief efforts and help save lives. The C-17 provides massive payload capacity capable of delivering aid, equipment and response teams into disaster zones. The C-130 Hercules is the U.S. military's tactical workhorse with a long history of providing critical airlift support in crises to help communities get immediate help. SOUTHCOM is surging available assigned U.S. military forces in our region to support @StateDept-led U.S. government relief operations in Venezuela, following the devastating earthquakes that struck the nation June 24, 2026," the SOUTHCOM wrote in a post on X.
Earlier, UN Secretary General Antonio Gutteres, extending condolences over the loss of life, stated that the United Nations has mobilised efforts to provide emergency relief.
"I am deeply saddened by the loss of life & widespread destruction caused by the devastating earthquakes that struck Venezuela. The UN system is mobilizing assistance & working closely with the Government & our partners to support the response & the people of Venezuela. I extend my sincere condolences to the families of the victims & wish a speedy recovery to those injured," he wrote on X.
Subsequently, in a significant show of global solidarity, France and Switzerland have also moved quickly to deploy highly specialised Urban Search and Rescue (USAR) units to the disaster zone.
France, acting at the request of President Emmanuel Macron, has dispatched a detachment from the 4th and 7th Regiments of Civil Security Training and Intervention. This elite unit, which includes medical teams, search dogs, and experts in collapsed structure extraction, arrived fully equipped to operate in degraded environments.
Their mission, coordinated through the European Union's Civil Protection Mechanism, leverages years of experience from similar international deployments, such as the 2023 earthquake response in Turkey.
"France has several USAR teams classified by the United Nations, recognized for their high level of expertise. In complete autonomy, they are capable of being deployed within a few hours with all their operational resources in order to intervene in the most degraded environments. This mission bears witness to France's commitment to international solidarity. It is being carried out in coordination with our partners and fits within the framework of the European Union's Civil Protection Mechanism, which allows for the pooling of the operational capacities of several European states," the French Directorate General of Civil Security and Crisis Management wrote on X.
Simultaneously, the "Swiss Rescue Chain" has departed from Zurich for Caracas. This mission brings 80 specialists, eight search dogs, and 18 tons of specialised rescue equipment to the front lines.
"Following the international call for assistance issued by the Venezuelan authorities, the #Swiss Rescue Chain has departed from Zurich for Caracas.The mission mobilizes 80 specialists, 8 search dogs, and 18 tons of equipment. Upon arrival, the teams will coordinate with local authorities to search for, clear, and rescue #earthquake victims buried under the rubble," the Swiss Ministry of Foreign Affairs wrote on X.
This comes after two earthquakes struck Venezuela in quick succession on Wednesday, causing catastrophic damage to cities from La Guaira to the capital Caracas. (ANI)

title: Weather tracker: Heatwave expected to bring Germany and Poland to 40C
description: Austrian Grand Prix declares heat hazard as dramatic rise in temperatures forecast in central and northern EuropeTemperatures are forecast to rise dramatically in parts of central and northern Europe this weekend as the intense heatwave continues. In Germany and Poland, highs up to or exceeding 40C (104F) are expected on both Saturday and Sunday, days after swathes of France experienced similar extreme temperatures. The Austrian Grand Prix, taking place this weekend in Spielberg, has declared a heat hazard, the first race to do so this season. Temperatures are expected to rise into the low 30s celsius during the race, almost 10C warmer than usual for the venue.Across Europe, the intense heat has led to severe thunderstorms. In the Sverdlovsk region of central Russia, a strong tornado was reported on the evening of 22 June. Rated a 3 out of 5 on the international Fujita scale, the twister injured 16 people and destroyed or damaged about 100 homes and businesses in the town of Kushva. Emergency services have been working on restoring power to the town. Tornadoes are not unheard of in Russia but are rare. Forecasters say they may become more common in future as the climate breaks down. Storm warnings remained in effect in the southern part of the country on Friday. Continue reading...

title: Nashik Police News: चित्रपटात ‘धुरंधर’ चालतो, नाशिकमध्ये फक्त कायदा; टवाळखोरांना पोलिसांचा अनोख्या स्टाइलने दणका
description: नाशिक | प्रतिनिधीस्वतःला गल्लीबोळातील ‘धुरंधर’ समजून रस्त्याच्या कडेला अड्डे जमवणारे, टवाळक्या करत दादागिरी मिरवणारे आणि रात्रीच्या अंधारात फूटपाथलाच ‘बार’ बनवणाऱ्या हौशा-नवशांची नाशिक पोलिसांनी चांगलीच जिरवली आहे. सोशल मीडिया पोस्टद्वारे नाशिक शहर पोलिसांनी टवाळखोरांना थेट आणि कडक शब्दांत इशारा दिला असून, हे नाशिक आहे, येथे रस्त्याच्या कडेला बसून मद्यपान चालणार नाही, असे ठणकावून सांगितले आहे. नाशिकचे […]
content:
नाशिक | प्रतिनिधीस्वतःला गल्लीबोळातील ‘धुरंधर’ समजून रस्त्याच्या कडेला अड्डे जमवणारे, टवाळक्या करत दादागिरी मिरवणारे आणि रात्रीच्या अंधारात फूटपाथलाच ‘बार’ बनवणाऱ्या हौशा-नवशांची नाशिक पोलिसांनी चांगलीच जिरवली आहे. सोशल मीडिया पोस्टद्वारे नाशिक शहर पोलिसांनी टवाळखोरांना थेट आणि कडक शब्दांत इशारा दिला असून, हे नाशिक आहे, येथे रस्त्याच्या कडेला बसून मद्यपान चालणार नाही, असे ठणकावून सांगितले आहे.



नाशिकचे पोलिस आयुक्त संदीप कर्णिक यांच्या आदेशाने पोलिस उपायुक्त मोनिका राऊत, किशोर काळे व किरणकुमार चव्हाण यांच्यासह सहायक आयुक्त संदीप मिटके हे पुन्हा बालेकिल्ला मोहिमेला बळ देत आहेत. त्यानुसार, मागील सहा महिन्यांत आतापर्यंत तब्बल ११ हजार ६८५ टवाळखोरांवर कारवाईचा बडगा उगारण्यात आला आहे. तर केवळ चालू महिन्यातील विशेष ‘कोंबिंग ऑपरेशन्स’मध्ये ४३८ टवाळखोरांना पोलिसांनी चांगलाच प्रसाद दिला आहे. पोलिसांच्या या धडक मोहिमेमुळे रात्रीच्या वेळी रस्त्यावर धिंगाणा घालणाऱ्यांचे धाबे दणाणले आहेत. हे नाशिक आहे. येथे फूटपाथ बार नाहीत. येथे अंधारात रस्त्याच्या कडेला बसून मद्यपान करणे हा कायद्याचा भंग आहे,’ असे आयुक्तालयाने स्पष्ट केले आहे.



…. आणि ‘धुरंधर’ पोलीस ठाण्यात एकत्रसोशल मीडियावर पोलीस ठाण्याचा एक व्हिडिओ शेअर करत पोलिसांनी टवाळखोरांची चांगलीच कोंडी केली आहे. जर तुम्हाला वाटत असेल की हे सगळं चालतं, तर या व्हिडिओमध्ये आपल्या जवळच्या पोलीस ठाण्यात एकत्र बसलेले ते लोकही पाहा, ज्यांना कधीकाळी अगदी असंच वाटत होतं, अशा उपरोधिक आणि कडक शब्दांत पोलिसांनी भाईगिरी करणाऱ्यांचे तोंड बंद केले आहे. चित्रपटात ‘धुरंधर’ चालत असला, तरी नाशिक शहरात फक्त आणि फक्त ‘कायदा’ चालतो, हे पोलिसांनी आपल्या कृतीतून दाखवून दिले आहे.



Nashik News: त्र्यंबकेश्वर पेड दर्शन घोटाळा प्रकरण, पुरुषोत्तम कडलगला अखेर अडीच महिन्यांनी जामीन मंजूर



नागरिकांकडून कौतुकThisIsNashik City आणि Kaydyacha Ballekilla या हॅशटॅगसह व्हायरल होत असलेल्या पोलिसांच्या या भूमिकेचे नाशिककरांनी स्वागत केले आहे. रस्त्यावरील टवाळक्या आणि मद्यपींच्या त्रासामुळे महिला व सामान्य नागरिकांना नाहक त्रास सहन करावा लागत होता. मात्र, पोलिसांच्या या ‘सिंघम’ स्टाईल कनेक्शनमुळे आता नाशिकचे रस्ते रात्रीच्या वेळी सुरक्षित होऊ लागले आहेत. टवाळखोरांना ताळ्यावर आणण्यासाठी पोलिसांची ही धडक मोहीम अशीच सुरू राहावी, अशी मागणी नागरिकांमधून होत आहे.

title: Nashik News: त्र्यंबकेश्वर पेड दर्शन घोटाळा प्रकरण, पुरुषोत्तम कडलगला अखेर अडीच महिन्यांनी जामीन मंजूर
description: नाशिक | प्रतिनिधीत्र्यंबकेश्वर येथील बहुचर्चित पेड दर्शन घोटाळ्यातील मुख्य संशयित पुरुषोत्तम कडलग याला अखेर अडीच महिन्यांनी उच्च न्यायालयाने जामीन मंजूर केला आहे. गुरुवारी (दि. २५) झालेल्या सुनावणीत न्यायालयाने काही अटी व शर्ती घालत कडलगला दिलासा दिला. दरम्यान, या घोटाळ्यातील उर्वरित चार संशयित मात्र अद्यापही तुरुंगातच आहेत. त्र्यंबकेश्वर देवस्थानच्या व्हीआयपी आणि पेड दर्शन पावती पुस्तकात फेरफार […]
content:
नाशिक | प्रतिनिधीत्र्यंबकेश्वर येथील बहुचर्चित पेड दर्शन घोटाळ्यातील मुख्य संशयित पुरुषोत्तम कडलग याला अखेर अडीच महिन्यांनी उच्च न्यायालयाने जामीन मंजूर केला आहे. गुरुवारी (दि. २५) झालेल्या सुनावणीत न्यायालयाने काही अटी व शर्ती घालत कडलगला दिलासा दिला. दरम्यान, या घोटाळ्यातील उर्वरित चार संशयित मात्र अद्यापही तुरुंगातच आहेत.



त्र्यंबकेश्वर देवस्थानच्या व्हीआयपी आणि पेड दर्शन पावती पुस्तकात फेरफार करून लाखो रुपयांचा गंडा घातल्याचा आरोप कडलगवर आहे. याप्रकरणी त्र्यंबकेश्वर पोलिसांनी १४ एप्रिल रोजी त्याला बेड्या ठोकल्या होत्या. त्यानंतर तपासाची व्याप्ती पाहता पोलिसांच्या मागणीनुसार जिल्हा न्यायालयाने त्याला तीन वेळा पोलीस कोठडी सुनावली होती. कोठडीची मुदत संपल्यानंतर त्याची रवानगी न्यायालयीन कोठडीत (तुरुंगात) करण्यात आली होती.



Raj Thackeray: दोन गुजराती बसलेत म्हणून वाट्टेल ते कराल? राज ठाकरेंनी जैन समाजाच्या पदाधिकाऱ्यांना सुनावलं, म्हणाले, वाट्टेल ते…



यादरम्यान कडलगने जिल्हा न्यायालयात अनेकदा जामिनासाठी अर्ज केले, मात्र न्यायालयाने त्याचे सर्व अर्ज फेटाळून लावले होते. जिल्हा न्यायालयाकडून दिलासा न मिळाल्याने अखेर कडलगने वकिलामार्फत उच्च न्यायालयात धाव घेतली होती. यावर गुरुवारी (दि. २५) उच्च न्यायालयात अंतिम सुनावणी पार पडली. दोन्ही बाजूंचा युक्तिवाद् ऐकल्यानंतर न्यायालयाने पुरुषोत्तम कडलग याला सशर्त जामीन मंजूर केला.
